items.name: pd.DataFrame()

desc.zh: 从字典、列表、数组等多种数据源创建二维表格结构
desc.en: Create a 2D tabular structure from dict, list, array, or other sources

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame(
    data={'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'],
          'age': [25, 30, 35],
          'score': [88.5, 92.0, 78.5]},
    index=['a', 'b', 'c'],
    columns=['name', 'age', 'score'],
    dtype=None,
    copy=False
)
print(df)
items.output:
name  age  score
a    Alice   25   88.5
b      Bob   30   92.0
c  Charlie   35   78.5

desc.zh: 输入数据，可以是字典（键→列）、二维列表、NumPy 数组、另一个 DataFrame 等
desc.en: Input data: dict (keys→columns), 2D list, NumPy array, another DataFrame, etc.

desc.zh: 行标签；若不指定则自动生成 RangeIndex(0, 1, 2, …)
desc.en: Row labels; defaults to RangeIndex(0, 1, 2, …) if not provided

desc.zh: 列标签；对于字典数据默认使用键名，对于数组数据默认生成 RangeIndex
desc.en: Column labels; defaults to dict keys for dict data, RangeIndex for arrays

desc.zh: 强制所有列使用指定数据类型（如 'float64'）；None 表示自动推断
desc.en: Force all columns to this dtype (e.g. 'float64'); None means auto-infer

desc.zh: 是否复制输入数据；False 时可能共享内存（Copy-on-Write 模式下该参数被忽略）
desc.en: Whether to copy input data; False may share memory (ignored under Copy-on-Write)

items.name: pd.Series()

desc.zh: 创建一维带标签数组，是 DataFrame 的单列基础结构
desc.en: Create a one-dimensional labeled array, the building block of DataFrame columns

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series(
    data=[100, 200, 300, 400],
    index=['Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4'],
    dtype='float64',
    name='revenue',
    copy=False
)
print(s)
items.output:
Q1    100.0
Q2    200.0
Q3    300.0
Q4    400.0
Name: revenue, dtype: float64

desc.zh: 输入数据；标量值会广播到所有索引位置
desc.en: Input data; scalar values are broadcast to all index positions

desc.zh: 轴标签；对于字典数据默认使用字典键，否则生成 RangeIndex
desc.en: Axis labels; defaults to dict keys for dict input, otherwise RangeIndex

desc.zh: 数据类型（如 'int64', 'float64', 'str'）；None 时自动推断
desc.en: Data type (e.g. 'int64', 'float64', 'str'); None for auto-inference

desc.zh: Series 名称，成为 DataFrame 列名的来源
desc.en: Name of the Series, becomes the column name when converted to DataFrame

desc.zh: 是否复制输入数据
desc.en: Whether to copy input data

items.name: pd.DataFrame.from_dict()

desc.zh: 从字典创建 DataFrame，可控制字典键映射到行还是列
desc.en: Create DataFrame from dict with control over key-to-row or key-to-column mapping

items.example:
import pandas as pd

# orient='columns': 键→列名（默认）
data_col = {'name': ['Alice', 'Bob'],
            'score': [90, 85]}
df1 = pd.DataFrame.from_dict(data_col, orient='columns')
print(df1)
print('---')

# orient='index': 键→行索引
data_row = {'row1': [1, 2, 3],
            'row2': [4, 5, 6]}
df2 = pd.DataFrame.from_dict(
    data_row,
    orient='index',
    columns=['a', 'b', 'c']
)
print(df2)
items.output:
name  score
0  Alice     90
1    Bob     85
---
      a  b  c
row1  1  2  3
row2  4  5  6

desc.zh: 字典数据；orient='columns' 时值为列数据，orient='index' 时值为行数据
desc.en: Dict data; values are column data when orient='columns', row data when orient='index'

desc.zh: 字典键的方向；'columns' 键为列名，'index' 键为行索引，'tight' 需包含完整结构
desc.en: Key orientation; 'columns' keys→columns, 'index' keys→rows, 'tight' needs full structure

desc.zh: 强制数据类型
desc.en: Force data type for all columns

desc.zh: 仅 orient='index' 时有效，指定列名
desc.en: Column names, only valid when orient='index'

items.name: pd.DataFrame.from_records()

desc.zh: 从结构化记录（元组列表、字典列表等）创建 DataFrame
desc.en: Create DataFrame from structured records (list of tuples, list of dicts, etc.)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

records = [
    ('Alice', 'Engineering', 90000),
    ('Bob', 'Sales', 65000),
    ('Charlie', 'Engineering', 85000),
    ('Diana', 'Marketing', 72000),
]

df = pd.DataFrame.from_records(
    records,
    index=None,
    columns=['name', 'dept', 'salary'],
    coerce_float=False
)
print(df)
items.output:
name         dept  salary
0    Alice  Engineering   90000
1      Bob        Sales   65000
2  Charlie  Engineering   85000
3    Diana    Marketing   72000

desc.zh: 结构化数据：元组列表、字典列表或结构化 NumPy 数组
desc.en: Structured data: list of tuples, list of dicts, or structured NumPy array

desc.zh: 用作索引的字段名或数组
desc.en: Field name or array to use as index

desc.zh: 列名列表；对于字典列表同时起筛选和排序作用
desc.en: Column names; for list of dicts, also filters and orders columns

desc.zh: 是否尝试将非字符串/非数值列强制转为 float
desc.en: Whether to try converting non-string, non-numeric columns to float

items.name: Series.to_frame()

desc.zh: 将 Series 转为单列 DataFrame
desc.en: Convert Series to single-column DataFrame

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([1, 2, 3], name='value')
print(s.to_frame())
print(type(s.to_frame()))
items.output:
value
0      1
1      2
2      3
<class 'pandas.core.frame.DataFrame'>

desc.zh: 列名，默认用 Series.name
desc.en: Column name, defaults to Series.name

items.name: df.to_numpy() / df.values

desc.zh: 转为 NumPy 数组
desc.en: Convert to NumPy array

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 2], 'B': [3, 4]})
arr = df.to_numpy()
print(arr)
print(type(arr))
items.output:
[[1 3]
 [2 4]]
<class 'numpy.ndarray'>

desc.zh: 强制转换类型
desc.en: Force output dtype

desc.zh: True=返回副本，False=可能共享内存
desc.en: True=return copy, False=may share memory

desc.zh: NaN 的替换值
desc.en: Value to replace NaN with

items.name: df.to_records()

desc.zh: 转为 NumPy record array（带列名的结构化数组）
desc.en: Convert to NumPy record array (structured array with column names)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'name': ['Alice', 'Bob'], 'age': [25, 30]})
rec = df.to_records(index=False)
print(rec)
print(rec['name'])
items.output:
[('Alice', 25) ('Bob', 30)]
['Alice' 'Bob']

desc.zh: True=包含索引列
desc.en: True=include index column

items.name: Series.to_list() / Index.to_list()

desc.zh: 转为 Python 列表
desc.en: Convert to Python list

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([1, 2, 3])
print(s.to_list())
print(type(s.to_list()))

# 也可用于 Index
print(df.columns.to_list())
items.output:
[1, 2, 3]
<class 'list'>

title.zh: 从字典列表创建（每行一条记录）

items.code:
data = {
    'city': ['Beijing', 'Shanghai', 'Guangzhou'],
    'pop_million': [21.5, 24.9, 15.3],
    'area_km2': [16411, 6341, 7434]
}
df = pd.DataFrame(data)
# 每个键 → 一列，列表长度须一致

note.zh: 最常用的创建方式，字典键自动成为列名，所有列表长度必须相同
note.en: Most common creation pattern; dict keys become column names, all lists must have equal length

title.zh: 从记录列表创建（每行一个字典）

items.code:
records = [
    {'name': 'Alice', 'age': 25, 'city': 'Beijing'},
    {'name': 'Bob', 'age': 30, 'city': 'Shanghai'},
    {'name': 'Charlie', 'age': 35}  # 缺失键 → NaN
]
df = pd.DataFrame(records)
# 适合 JSON API 返回数据

note.zh: 适合处理 JSON/API 数据；缺失的键会自动填充 NaN
note.en: Great for JSON/API data; missing keys are auto-filled with NaN

items.code:
import numpy as np

arr = np.random.randn(4, 3)
df = pd.DataFrame(
    arr,
    index=['r1', 'r2', 'r3', 'r4'],
    columns=['feature_a', 'feature_b', 'feature_c']
)
# 共享内存（copy=False），修改 arr 会影响 df

note.zh: 默认不复制数据（共享内存），适合大数组；若需独立副本请设 copy=True
note.en: Default is zero-copy (shared memory), ideal for large arrays; set copy=True for independent copy

title.zh: 字典键不一致导致 NaN

note.zh: 字典值长度不一致会直接报错（非 NaN）
note.en: Mismatched dict value lengths raise ValueError (not NaN)

right.code:
# 方法1: 确保长度一致
data = {'a': [1, 2, 3], 'b': [4, 5, None]}

# 方法2: 使用 from_dict + orient='index'
# 方法3: 用记录列表（允许键缺失）
records = [{'a': 1, 'b': 4},
           {'a': 2, 'b': 5},
           {'a': 3}]  # 缺 'b' → NaN
df = pd.DataFrame(records)

note.zh: 用 None 补齐长度，或改用记录列表（缺失键会变 NaN 而不报错）
note.en: Pad with None to equalize length, or use list of dicts (missing keys become NaN without error)

title.zh: 循环中逐行追加 DataFrame（性能灾难）
title.en: Growing DataFrame in a loop (performance disaster)

wrong.code:
df = pd.DataFrame()
for i in range(10000):
    row = pd.DataFrame({'a': [i], 'b': [i*2]})
    df = pd.concat([df, row])  # O(n²) 性能！
# 每次 concat 都复制整个 DataFrame

note.zh: 每次 concat 都会复制整个 DataFrame，10000 行需要约 50 亿次复制操作
note.en: Each concat copies the entire DataFrame; 10k rows causes ~5 billion copy operations

right.code:
# 先收集到列表，最后一次性创建
rows = []
for i in range(10000):
    rows.append({'a': i, 'b': i * 2})
df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
# 或用列表推导更简洁
df = pd.DataFrame(
    [{'a': i, 'b': i*2} for i in range(10000)]
)

note.zh: 先收集到 Python 列表，最后一次性创建 DataFrame；性能提升 100 倍以上
note.en: Collect into a Python list first, then create DataFrame once; 100x+ faster

items.name: df.head() / df.tail()

desc.zh: 查看 DataFrame 的前/后 N 行，快速预览数据
desc.en: View the first/last N rows of a DataFrame for quick preview

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'product': ['Apple', 'Banana', 'Cherry', 'Date', 'Elderberry', 'Fig'],
    'price': [3.5, 1.2, 8.0, 12.0, 15.5, 4.0],
    'stock': [100, 200, 50, 30, 10, 80]
})

print('--- head(3) ---')
print(df.head(3))
print('--- tail(2) ---')
print(df.tail(2))
items.output:
--- head(3) ---
  product  price  stock
0   Apple    3.5    100
1  Banana    1.2    200
2  Cherry    8.0     50
--- tail(2) ---
      product  price  stock
4  Elderberry   15.5     10
5         Fig    4.0     80

desc.zh: 返回的行数；负数 n 表示返回除最后 |n| 行之外的所有行
desc.en: Number of rows to return; negative n returns all rows except last |n| rows

items.name: df.info()

desc.zh: 打印 DataFrame 的简要摘要：列名、非空数量、数据类型和内存占用
desc.en: Print concise summary: column names, non-null counts, dtypes, and memory usage

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', None, 'Diana'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35, np.nan],
    'salary': [50000.0, 65000.0, 72000.0, 80000.0],
    'dept': pd.Categorical(['Eng', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'HR'])
})
df.info(verbose=True, memory_usage='deep', show_counts=True)
items.output:
<class 'pandas.core.frame.DataFrame'>
RangeIndex: 4 entries, 0 to 3
Data columns (total 4 columns):
 #   Column  Non-Null Count  Dtype   
---  ------  --------------  -----   
 0   name    3 non-null      object  
 1   age     3 non-null      float64 
 2   salary  4 non-null      float64 
 3   dept    4 non-null      category
dtypes: category(1), float64(2), object(1)
memory usage: 484.0 bytes

desc.zh: 是否打印完整摘要；None 时列数超过设置阈值则自动省略
desc.en: Whether to print full summary; None auto-truncates if columns exceed threshold

desc.zh: 是否显示内存占用；'deep' 进行深度内存分析（更准确但较慢）
desc.en: Whether to show memory usage; 'deep' does deep introspection (more accurate but slower)

desc.zh: 是否显示非空计数；None 时行数大于阈值自动跳过
desc.en: Whether to show non-null counts; None auto-skips for large DataFrames

desc.zh: 是否从截断摘要切换为完整摘要的列数阈值
desc.en: Threshold for switching from truncated to full repr

items.name: df.describe()

desc.zh: 生成描述性统计信息：count/mean/std/min/25%/50%/75%/max
desc.en: Generate descriptive statistics: count/mean/std/min/25%/50%/75%/max

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'age': [25, 30, 35, 40, 28, 33],
    'salary': [50000, 65000, 72000, 90000, 55000, 68000],
    'dept': ['Eng', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'HR', 'Eng', 'Sales']
})

# 默认只统计数值列
print(df.describe(percentiles=[0.1, 0.5, 0.9]))
print('---')
# include='all' 包含所有类型
print(df.describe(include='all'))

desc.en: Percentiles to compute (between 0 and 1); defaults to [.25, .5, .75], always includes 50%

desc.zh: 要包含的数据类型白名单；'all' 包含所有列，None 只包含数值列
desc.en: Dtype whitelist; 'all' includes all columns, None includes only numeric

desc.zh: 要排除的数据类型黑名单
desc.en: Dtype blacklist to exclude from results

items.name: df.shape / df.size / len(df)

desc.zh: 获取 DataFrame 的维度信息：行列数、元素总数、行数
desc.en: Get DataFrame dimensions: rows×cols tuple, total elements, row count

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'a': [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
    'b': [10, 20, 30, 40, 50],
    'c': ['x', 'y', 'z', 'w', 'v']
})

print(f'shape: {df.shape}')       # (行数, 列数)
print(f'size:  {df.size}')        # 行数 × 列数
print(f'len:   {len(df)}')        # 行数
print(f'cols:  {len(df.columns)}')# 列数
items.output:
shape: (5, 3)
size:  15
len:   5
cols:  3

desc.zh: 返回 (行数, 列数) 元组
desc.en: Returns (n_rows, n_cols) tuple

desc.zh: 返回元素总数 = 行数 × 列数
desc.en: Returns total number of elements = n_rows × n_cols

desc.zh: 返回行数（等价于 df.shape[0]）
desc.en: Returns number of rows (equivalent to df.shape[0])

desc.zh: 返回维度数（DataFrame 始终为 2，Series 为 1）
desc.en: Returns number of dimensions (always 2 for DataFrame, 1 for Series)

items.name: df.dtypes / df.select_dtypes()

desc.zh: 查看所有列的数据类型，或按类型筛选列
desc.en: View data types of all columns, or filter columns by dtype

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35],
    'salary': [50000.0, 65000.0, 72000.0],
    'active': [True, False, True],
    'joined': pd.to_datetime(['2020-01-01', '2021-06-15', '2022-03-20'])
})

print(df.dtypes)
print('---')
print(df.select_dtypes(include=['number']).columns.tolist())
print(df.select_dtypes(exclude=['object', 'bool']).columns.tolist())
items.output:
name              object
age                int64
salary           float64
active              bool
joined    datetime64[ns]
dtype: object
---
['age', 'salary']
['age', 'salary', 'joined']

desc.zh: 要包含的类型：'number'、'object'、'bool'、'datetime'、'category' 等
desc.en: Types to include: 'number', 'object', 'bool', 'datetime', 'category', etc.

desc.zh: 要排除的类型；include 和 exclude 不能同时指定同一类型
desc.en: Types to exclude; include and exclude cannot overlap on the same type

items.name: df.value_counts()

desc.zh: 统计唯一值出现频次，支持多列组合计数和归一化
desc.en: Count unique value frequencies, supports multi-column combinations and normalization

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'dept': ['Eng', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'HR', 'Eng', 'Sales', 'HR', 'Eng'],
    'level': ['Senior', 'Junior', 'Junior', 'Senior', 'Senior', 'Senior', 'Junior', 'Junior']
})

# 多列组合计数
print(df.value_counts(subset=['dept', 'level']))
print('---')
# 归一化为比例
print(df.value_counts(
    subset=['dept'],
    normalize=True,
    sort=True,
    ascending=False
))
items.output:
dept   level 
Eng    Senior    2
       Junior    2
Sales  Senior    1
       Junior    1
HR     Senior    1
       Junior    1
Name: count, dtype: int64
---
dept
Eng      0.500
Sales    0.250
HR       0.250
Name: proportion, dtype: float64

desc.zh: 用于计数的列名列表；None 使用所有列
desc.en: Column names for counting; None uses all columns

desc.zh: True 返回相对频率（比例）而非绝对计数
desc.en: True returns relative frequencies (proportions) instead of absolute counts

desc.zh: 是否按频次排序
desc.en: Whether to sort by frequency

desc.zh: 排序方向；False 为降序（频率高的在前）
desc.en: Sort direction; False for descending (most frequent first)

desc.zh: 是否排除 NaN 值；False 会将 NaN 作为一个独立类别
desc.en: Whether to exclude NaN; False treats NaN as a separate category

items.name: df.sample()

desc.zh: 随机抽样 N 行或按比例抽样，支持有放回抽样和加权抽样
desc.en: Random sample of N rows or a fraction, supports replacement and weighted sampling

items.signature: df.sample(n=None, frac=None, replace=False, weights=None, random_state=None, axis=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana', 'Eve'],
    'score': [85, 92, 78, 95, 88],
    'weight': [0.1, 0.1, 0.1, 0.3, 0.4]
})

# Sample 3 rows with fixed seed
print(df.sample(n=3, random_state=42))
print('---')
# Sample 60% of rows
print(df.sample(frac=0.6, random_state=1))
print('---')
# Weighted sampling (higher weight = more likely)
print(df.sample(n=3, weights='weight', random_state=0))
items.output:
name  score  weight
1      Bob     92     0.1
4      Eve     88     0.4
0    Alice     85     0.1
---
      name  score  weight
2  Charlie     78     0.1
4      Eve     88     0.4
1      Bob     92     0.1
---
      name  score  weight
4      Eve     88     0.4
3    Diana     95     0.3
0    Alice     85     0.1

desc.zh: 抽样行数；与 frac 互斥，两者都为 None 时默认 n=1
desc.en: Number of rows to sample; mutually exclusive with frac, defaults to n=1 when both are None

desc.zh: 抽样比例（0~1 之间），如 0.5 表示 50%；与 n 互斥
desc.en: Fraction of rows to sample (0-1), e.g. 0.5 for 50%; mutually exclusive with n

desc.zh: 是否有放回抽样；True 时允许同一行被多次选中，可使 n > len(df)
desc.en: Whether to sample with replacement; True allows the same row to be picked multiple times, enabling n > len(df)

desc.zh: 抽样权重；可以是列名字符串或与 df 等长的数组，值越大越可能被选中
desc.en: Sampling weights; can be a column name string or array-like of same length, higher values increase selection probability

desc.zh: 随机数种子，设置后每次运行结果相同，便于复现
desc.en: Random seed for reproducibility; same seed produces identical results across runs

items.name: df.memory_usage()

desc.zh: 返回每列占用的内存字节数，deep=True 可精确测量 object 列
desc.en: Return memory usage in bytes per column; deep=True accurately measures object columns

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'id': [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana', 'Eve'],
    'salary': [50000.0, 65000.0, 72000.0, 55000.0, 90000.0]
})

print(df.memory_usage())
print('---')
print(df.memory_usage(deep=True))
print(f'Total: {df.memory_usage(deep=True).sum() / 1024:.2f} KB')
items.output:
Index      128
id          40
name        40
salary      40
dtype: int64
---
Index      128
id          40
name       310
salary      40
dtype: int64
Total: 0.51 KB

desc.zh: 是否包含索引的内存占用
desc.en: Whether to include the index memory usage

desc.zh: True 时深度检查 object 列的真实内存占用（较慢但更准确）
desc.en: True introspects object columns for real memory usage (slower but more accurate)

items.name: df.T / df.transpose()

desc.zh: 转置 DataFrame（行列互换）
desc.en: Transpose DataFrame (swap rows and columns)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'name': ['Alice', 'Bob'], 'age': [25, 30], 'city': ['BJ', 'SH']})
print(df.T)
items.output:
0    1
name  Alice  Bob
age      25   30
city     BJ   SH

items.name: df.equals()

desc.zh: 精确比较两个 DataFrame 是否完全相同（包括 NaN）
desc.en: Test if two DataFrames are exactly equal (NaN-safe)

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df1 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, np.nan]})
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, np.nan]})
print(df1.equals(df2))  # True，NaN == NaN
print((df1 == df2).all().all())  # False，NaN != NaN
items.output:
True
False

desc.zh: 要比较的另一个 DataFrame
desc.en: The other DataFrame to compare with

items.name: df.compare()

desc.zh: 显示两个 DataFrame 之间的差异
desc.en: Show differences between two DataFrames

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df1 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 2, 3], 'B': ['x', 'y', 'z']})
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 20, 3], 'B': ['x', 'y', 'w']})
print(df1.compare(df2))
items.output:
A          B
  self other self other
1  2.0  20.0  NaN   NaN
2  NaN   NaN    z     w

desc.zh: 要比较的 DataFrame
desc.en: DataFrame to compare against

desc.zh: True=保持原始形状（不省略相同行）
desc.en: True=keep original shape (don't omit equal rows)

desc.zh: True=也显示相同的值
desc.en: True=also show equal values

items.name: pd.testing.assert_frame_equal()

desc.zh: 断言两个 DataFrame 相等（测试用，不等时抛异常）
desc.en: Assert two DataFrames are equal (raises exception if not)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df1 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1.0, 2.0]})
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1.0, 2.0]})
pd.testing.assert_frame_equal(df1, df2)  # 通过，无输出

# 近似比较（浮点数）
pd.testing.assert_frame_equal(df1, df2, check_exact=False, atol=0.01)

desc.zh: True=也检查列类型是否一致
desc.en: True=also check column dtypes match

desc.zh: True=精确比较，False=允许浮点误差
desc.en: True=exact comparison, False=allow float tolerance

desc.zh: 允许的绝对误差（check_exact=False 时）
desc.en: Absolute tolerance (when check_exact=False)

items.name: df.empty / Series.empty

desc.zh: 检查是否为空（无行数据）
desc.en: Check if DataFrame/Series is empty (no rows)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame()
print(df.empty)  # True

df2 = pd.DataFrame({'a': [1]})
print(df2.empty)  # False
items.output:
True
False

items.name: Series.is_unique / Index.is_unique

desc.zh: 检查所有值是否唯一（无重复）
desc.en: Check if all values are unique (no duplicates)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s1 = pd.Series([1, 2, 3])
print(s1.is_unique)  # True

s2 = pd.Series([1, 2, 2])
print(s2.is_unique)  # False

# 常用于检查索引是否可做主键
print(df.index.is_unique)
items.output:
True
False

items.name: Series.is_monotonic_increasing / is_monotonic_decreasing

desc.zh: 检查是否单调递增/递减（判断是否已排序）
desc.en: Check if monotonically increasing/decreasing (is sorted?)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([1, 2, 3, 4])
print(s.is_monotonic_increasing)  # True
print(s.is_monotonic_decreasing)  # False

# 检查索引是否有序（MultiIndex 切片需要）
print(df.index.is_monotonic_increasing)
items.output:
True
False

items.name: Series.hasnans / Index.hasnans

desc.zh: 快速检查是否包含 NaN（比 isna().any() 快）
desc.en: Quick check for NaN (faster than isna().any())

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

s1 = pd.Series([1, 2, 3])
print(s1.hasnans)  # False

s2 = pd.Series([1, np.nan, 3])
print(s2.hasnans)  # True
items.output:
False
True

items.code:
# 每次拿到新数据，先跑这三步
print(f'Dimensions: {df.shape}')
df.info(memory_usage='deep')
df.describe(include='all')

# 额外：检查缺失值
print(df.isnull().sum())

note.zh: 拿到任何新数据集的标准起手式：看维度 → 看类型和缺失 → 看统计分布
note.en: Standard first steps for any new dataset: dimensions → dtypes & nulls → statistical distribution

items.code:
# object 列的真实内存占用需要 deep=True
mem = df.memory_usage(deep=True)
print(mem)
print(f'Total: {mem.sum() / 1024**2:.2f} MB')

# 优化建议：将 object 列转为 category
for col in df.select_dtypes('object'):
    if df[col].nunique() / len(df) < 0.5:
        df[col] = df[col].astype('category')

note.zh: object 列默认显示的内存不准确，deep=True 才能看到真实占用；低基数 object 列转 category 可省 90% 内存
note.en: Object columns show inaccurate memory by default; deep=True reveals true usage; low-cardinality object→category saves 90% memory

items.code:
# 大文件先读前 1000 行
df_preview = pd.read_csv('huge_file.csv', nrows=1000)

# 已加载的大 DataFrame 随机采样
df_sample = df.sample(n=500, random_state=42)
print(df_sample.describe())

# 按比例采样
df_sample = df.sample(frac=0.01, random_state=42)

note.zh: 对超大文件先用 nrows 预览结构，再 sample 采样做 EDA，避免内存溢出
note.en: Use nrows to preview structure of huge files, then sample for EDA to avoid memory overflow

title.zh: describe() 默认只统计数值列
title.en: describe() only covers numeric columns by default

note.zh: describe() 默认跳过 object/category 列，容易遗漏文本列的统计
note.en: describe() skips object/category columns by default, easily missing text column stats

right.code:
# 方法1: include='all' 包含所有类型
print(df.describe(include='all'))

# 方法2: 指定类型
print(df.describe(include=['object']))

# 方法3: 单独统计分类列
print(df['name'].value_counts())

note.zh: 使用 include='all' 查看所有列；对分类列使用 value_counts() 更直观
note.en: Use include='all' to see all columns; value_counts() is more intuitive for categorical columns

title.zh: 空 DataFrame 的布尔陷阱

wrong.code:
df = pd.DataFrame()
if df:  # ValueError!
    print('has data')
# ValueError: The truth value of a DataFrame is ambiguous

note.zh: 不能直接对 DataFrame 做布尔判断，会抛出 ValueError
note.en: Cannot use DataFrame directly in boolean context, raises ValueError

note.zh: 使用 df.empty、len(df)==0 或 df.shape[0]==0 来判断 DataFrame 是否为空
note.en: Use df.empty, len(df)==0, or df.shape[0]==0 to check if a DataFrame is empty

items.name: df[condition]

desc.zh: 布尔索引：用布尔 Series 筛选行，最基础也最常用的过滤方式
desc.en: Boolean indexing: filter rows with boolean Series, the most fundamental filtering method

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana', 'Eve'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35, 28, 42],
    'salary': [50000, 65000, 72000, 55000, 90000],
    'dept': ['Eng', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'HR', 'Eng']
})

# 单条件筛选
print(df[df['age'] > 30])
print('---')
# 多条件：& (AND), | (OR)
print(df[(df['dept'] == 'Eng') & (df['salary'] > 60000)])
items.output:
name  age  salary dept
2  Charlie   35   72000  Eng
4      Eve   42   90000  Eng
---
      name  age  salary dept
2  Charlie   35   72000  Eng
4      Eve   42   90000  Eng

desc.zh: 与 DataFrame 行数等长的布尔 Series；True 的行被保留
desc.en: Boolean Series with same length as DataFrame rows; True rows are kept

items.name: df.query()

desc.zh: 用字符串表达式筛选行，语法类似 SQL WHERE 子句
desc.en: Filter rows using string expression, syntax similar to SQL WHERE clause

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35, 28],
    'salary': [50000, 65000, 72000, 55000],
    'dept': ['Eng', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'HR']
})

# 基本查询
print(df.query('age > 28 and dept == "Eng"'))
print('---')
# 引用外部变量用 @
min_salary = 60000
print(df.query('salary >= @min_salary'))
print('---')
# in 操作符
print(df.query('dept in ["Eng", "HR"]'))
items.output:
name  age  salary dept
2  Charlie   35   72000  Eng
---
      name  age  salary dept
1      Bob   30   65000  Sales
2  Charlie   35   72000  Eng
---
      name  age  salary dept
0    Alice   25   50000  Eng
2  Charlie   35   72000  Eng
3    Diana   28   55000   HR

desc.zh: 查询表达式字符串；支持 and/or/not/in/not in，用 @ 引用外部变量
desc.en: Query expression string; supports and/or/not/in/not in, use @ for external variables

desc.zh: True 时直接修改原 DataFrame 并返回 None
desc.en: When True, modifies DataFrame in-place and returns None

desc.zh: 计算引擎；'numexpr' 更快但需安装该库，'python' 支持更多操作
desc.en: Computation engine; 'numexpr' is faster but needs the library, 'python' supports more ops

desc.zh: 传递给查询引擎的额外参数（如 local_dict/global_dict）
desc.en: Additional keyword arguments passed to the query engine

items.name: df.loc[row, col]

desc.zh: 基于标签的索引器，同时支持行筛选和列选择
desc.en: Label-based indexer supporting both row filtering and column selection

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35, 28],
    'salary': [50000, 65000, 72000, 55000]
}, index=['a', 'b', 'c', 'd'])

# 布尔条件 + 列选择
print(df.loc[df['age'] > 28, ['name', 'salary']])
print('---')
# 标签切片（包含两端）
print(df.loc['b':'d', 'name':'salary'])
print('---')
# callable 选择器
print(df.loc[lambda x: x['salary'].idxmax()])
items.output:
name  salary
b      Bob   65000
c  Charlie   72000
---
      name  age  salary
b      Bob   30   65000
c  Charlie   35   72000
d    Diana   28   55000
---
name      Charlie
age            35
salary      72000
Name: c, dtype: object

params.name: row_indexer
params.type: label | list | slice | bool Series | callable

desc.zh: 行选择器：单个标签、标签列表、标签切片、布尔 Series 或 callable
desc.en: Row selector: single label, label list, label slice, bool Series, or callable

params.name: column_indexer
params.type: label | list | slice | bool Series | callable

desc.zh: 列选择器（可选）：同行选择器的类型
desc.en: Column selector (optional): same types as row selector

items.name: Series.isin()

desc.zh: 检查 Series 中的每个值是否存在于给定集合中，返回布尔 Series
desc.en: Check whether each value in Series is in the given set, returns boolean Series

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana', 'Eve'],
    'dept': ['Eng', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'HR', 'Marketing'],
    'level': ['Senior', 'Junior', 'Senior', 'Junior', 'Senior']
})

# 单列 isin
target_depts = ['Eng', 'HR']
print(df[df['dept'].isin(target_depts)])
print('---')
# 取反：~
print(df[~df['dept'].isin(target_depts)])
items.output:
name dept   level
0    Alice  Eng  Senior
2  Charlie  Eng  Senior
3    Diana   HR  Junior
---
    name       dept   level
1    Bob      Sales  Junior
4    Eve  Marketing  Senior

desc.zh: 要匹配的值集合；用 set 比 list 更快（O(1) 查找）
desc.en: Set of values to match; using set is faster than list (O(1) lookup)

items.name: Series.between()

desc.zh: 检查值是否在给定范围内（含边界控制），返回布尔 Series
desc.en: Check if values fall within a range (with boundary control), returns boolean Series

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana', 'Eve'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35, 28, 42],
    'salary': [50000, 65000, 72000, 55000, 90000]
})

# 年龄 28-35 之间（含两端）
print(df[df['age'].between(28, 35)])
print('---')
# 不含右端
print(df[df['salary'].between(50000, 70000, inclusive='left')])
items.output:
name  age  salary
1      Bob   30   65000
2  Charlie   35   72000
3    Diana   28   55000
---
    name  age  salary
0  Alice   25   50000
3  Diana   28   55000

desc.zh: 范围左界
desc.en: Left boundary of the range

desc.zh: 范围右界
desc.en: Right boundary of the range

desc.zh: 边界包含方式：'both' 两端包含，'neither' 两端不含，'left'/'right' 单端包含
desc.en: Boundary inclusion: 'both' includes both, 'neither' excludes both, 'left'/'right' includes one side

items.name: df.where() / df.mask()

desc.zh: 条件替换：where 保留满足条件的值，mask 保留不满足条件的值
desc.en: Conditional replacement: where keeps values where True, mask keeps values where False

items.signature: df.where(cond, other=nan, inplace=False, axis=None) / df.mask(cond, other=nan, inplace=False, axis=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'A': [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
    'B': [10, 20, 30, 40, 50]
})

# where: 条件为 True → 保留原值，False → 替换
print(df.where(df > 2, other=-1))
print('---')
# mask: 条件为 True → 替换，False → 保留原值（与 where 相反）
print(df.mask(df > 3, other=0))

desc.zh: 布尔条件；where 在 True 处保留原值，mask 在 True 处替换
desc.en: Boolean condition; where keeps originals where True, mask replaces where True

desc.zh: 替换值；可以是标量、同形状 DataFrame 或 callable
desc.en: Replacement value; can be scalar, same-shape DataFrame, or callable

desc.zh: 是否原地修改
desc.en: Whether to modify in-place

desc.zh: 对齐轴（在 other 为 Series 时有用）
desc.en: Alignment axis (useful when other is a Series)

items.code:
# AND: 所有条件都满足
df[(df['age'] > 25) & (df['salary'] > 60000) & (df['dept'] == 'Eng')]

# OR: 至少一个条件满足
df[(df['dept'] == 'Eng') | (df['dept'] == 'HR')]

# 等价于 isin（更简洁）
df[df['dept'].isin(['Eng', 'HR'])]

note.zh: 每个条件必须用括号包裹！& 代替 and，| 代替 or，~ 代替 not
note.en: Each condition must be wrapped in parentheses! Use & for and, | for or, ~ for not

items.code:
# 常见场景：从数据库或配置获取 ID 列表
valid_ids = get_valid_user_ids()  # 返回 list 或 set
df_valid = df[df['user_id'].isin(valid_ids)]

# 取反：排除特定值
blacklist = {'spam', 'test', 'admin'}
df_clean = df[~df['username'].isin(blacklist)]

note.zh: isin 接受 list/set/Series；传入 set 性能最佳（hash 查找 O(1)）
note.en: isin accepts list/set/Series; passing set gives best performance (O(1) hash lookup)

items.code:
# 选择 NOT 满足条件的行
df[~(df['age'] > 30)]          # 等价于 df[df['age'] <= 30]
df[~df['name'].str.contains('a', case=False)]
df[~df['status'].isin(['deleted', 'banned'])]

note.zh: ~ 是按位取反操作符，用于翻转布尔 Series；注意要对整个条件加括号
note.en: ~ is bitwise NOT operator for flipping boolean Series; wrap the entire condition in parentheses

items.code:
# 包含子串
df[df['name'].str.contains('ali', case=False, na=False)]

# 正则匹配
df[df['email'].str.contains(r'@gmail\.com$', regex=True, na=False)]

# 多关键词 OR 匹配
keywords = 'python|java|golang'
df[df['skills'].str.contains(keywords, case=False, na=False)]

note.zh: 记得设 na=False 避免 NaN 行导致报错；regex=True 默认开启
note.en: Always set na=False to avoid NaN rows causing errors; regex=True is the default

wrong.code:
# Python 的 and/or 不能用于 Series！
df[df['age'] > 25 and df['salary'] > 60000]
# ValueError: The truth value of a Series is ambiguous.
# Use a.empty, a.bool(), a.item(), a.any() or a.all()

note.zh: Python 的 and/or 是标量布尔运算符，无法处理 Series 的逐元素运算
note.en: Python's and/or are scalar boolean operators, cannot handle element-wise Series operations

right.code:
# 使用位运算符 & (AND), | (OR), ~ (NOT)
df[(df['age'] > 25) & (df['salary'] > 60000)]

# 或使用 query() 字符串（支持 and/or）
df.query('age > 25 and salary > 60000')

note.zh: 布尔索引用 &/|/~，且每个条件必须加括号；query() 字符串中可以用 and/or
note.en: Boolean indexing uses &/|/~, each condition needs parens; query() strings can use and/or

wrong.code:
# 链式索引赋值 → 可能修改副本而非原数据
df[df['age'] > 30]['salary'] = 99999
# SettingWithCopyWarning!
# 原 df 可能未被修改

note.zh: 链式索引 df[cond]['col'] 可能创建临时副本，赋值只修改副本
note.en: Chained indexing df[cond]['col'] may create a temp copy, assignment only modifies the copy

right.code:
# 使用 .loc 一次性定位并赋值
df.loc[df['age'] > 30, 'salary'] = 99999

# 或使用 .where 进行条件替换
df['salary'] = df['salary'].where(df['age'] <= 30, 99999)

note.zh: 始终用 df.loc[condition, column] 进行条件赋值，避免链式索引
note.en: Always use df.loc[condition, column] for conditional assignment, avoid chained indexing

wrong.code:
# 运算符优先级：& 高于 > 和 ==
df[df['age'] > 25 & df['salary'] > 60000]
# 实际解析为: df[df['age'] > (25 & df['salary']) > 60000]
# 结果错误或报错！

note.zh: & 的优先级高于比较运算符 > < == 等，不加括号会导致逻辑错误
note.en: & has higher precedence than comparison operators > < ==, missing parens causes logic errors

right.code:
# 每个条件都用括号包裹
df[(df['age'] > 25) & (df['salary'] > 60000)]

# 或用 query() 避免括号问题
df.query('age > 25 and salary > 60000')

note.zh: 规则：只要有 &/|，每个比较表达式必须加括号
note.en: Rule: whenever using &/|, every comparison expression must be parenthesized

items.name: df.loc[]

desc.zh: 基于标签的索引器：通过行/列标签访问数据，切片包含两端
desc.en: Label-based indexer: access data by row/column labels, slicing is inclusive on both ends

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35, 28],
    'salary': [50000, 65000, 72000, 55000],
    'dept': ['Eng', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'HR']
}, index=['r1', 'r2', 'r3', 'r4'])

# 单行单列
print(df.loc['r1', 'name'])
print('---')
# 切片（包含两端!）
print(df.loc['r1':'r3', 'name':'salary'])
print('---')
# 布尔条件 + 列选择
print(df.loc[df['age'] > 28, ['name', 'salary']])
print('---')
# callable
print(df.loc[lambda x: x['salary'] == x['salary'].max()])
items.output:
Alice
---
      name  age  salary
r1   Alice   25   50000
r2     Bob   30   65000
r3  Charlie  35   72000
---
      name  salary
r2     Bob   65000
r3  Charlie  72000
---
      name  age  salary dept
r3  Charlie   35   72000  Eng

desc.zh: 行选择器：单标签、标签列表、标签切片（两端包含）、布尔 Series 或 callable
desc.en: Row selector: single label, label list, label slice (both ends inclusive), bool Series, or callable

desc.zh: 列选择器（可选）：同行选择器的类型
desc.en: Column selector (optional): same types as row selector

items.name: df.iloc[]

desc.zh: 基于位置的索引器：通过整数位置访问数据，切片不包含右端（Python 风格）
desc.en: Position-based indexer: access data by integer position, slicing excludes right end (Python-style)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35, 28],
    'salary': [50000, 65000, 72000, 55000]
}, index=['r1', 'r2', 'r3', 'r4'])

# 单元素
print(df.iloc[0, 1])  # 第0行第1列
print('---')
# 切片（不含右端!）
print(df.iloc[0:3, 0:2])
print('---')
# 负数索引
print(df.iloc[-2:, :])  # 最后两行
print('---')
# 花式索引
print(df.iloc[[0, 3], [0, 2]])
items.output:
25
---
      name  age
r1   Alice   25
r2     Bob   30
r3  Charlie   35
---
      name  age  salary
r3  Charlie   35   72000
r4    Diana   28   55000
---
     name  salary
r1  Alice   50000
r4  Diana   55000

desc.zh: 行位置：整数、整数列表、切片（不含右端）、布尔数组或 callable
desc.en: Row position: int, int list, slice (right-exclusive), bool array, or callable

desc.zh: 列位置（可选）：同行选择器的类型
desc.en: Column position (optional): same types as row selector

items.name: df.at[]

desc.zh: 快速标签索引：基于行/列标签访问单个标量值，比 loc 快
desc.en: Fast label indexer: access single scalar value by row/column labels, faster than loc

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35],
    'salary': [50000, 65000, 72000]
}, index=['a', 'b', 'c'])

# 读取单个值
print(df.at['b', 'name'])
print(df.at['c', 'salary'])

# 写入单个值
df.at['a', 'salary'] = 55000
print(df.at['a', 'salary'])

desc.zh: 行标签（必须是单个标签，不支持切片或列表）
desc.en: Row label (must be single label, no slicing or lists)

desc.zh: 列标签（必须是单个标签）
desc.en: Column label (must be single label)

items.name: df.iat[]

desc.zh: 快速位置索引：基于整数位置访问单个标量值，比 iloc 快
desc.en: Fast position indexer: access single scalar value by integer position, faster than iloc

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35],
    'salary': [50000, 65000, 72000]
})

# 读取单个值
print(df.iat[0, 0])   # 第0行第0列
print(df.iat[2, 2])   # 第2行第2列

# 写入单个值
df.iat[1, 2] = 70000
print(df.iat[1, 2])

# 性能比较
# %timeit df.iat[0, 0]   # ~2μs
# %timeit df.iloc[0, 0]  # ~10μs

desc.zh: 行位置（整数，从 0 开始）
desc.en: Row position (integer, 0-based)

desc.zh: 列位置（整数，从 0 开始）
desc.en: Column position (integer, 0-based)

items.name: df.xs()

desc.zh: 从多级索引（MultiIndex）中按 key 提取截面数据
desc.en: Extract cross-section from MultiIndex by key

items.example:
import pandas as pd

arrays = [
    ['Eng', 'Eng', 'Sales', 'Sales'],
    ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana']
]
index = pd.MultiIndex.from_arrays(arrays, names=['dept', 'name'])
df = pd.DataFrame({
    'salary': [80000, 75000, 65000, 70000],
    'years': [5, 3, 7, 2]
}, index=index)

print(df)
print('---')
# 提取 Eng 部门的截面
print(df.xs('Eng', level='dept'))
print('---')
# 保留被选择的级别
print(df.xs('Alice', level='name', drop_level=False))
items.output:
salary  years
dept  name                  
Eng   Alice    80000      5
      Bob      75000      3
Sales Charlie  65000      7
      Diana    70000      2
---
       salary  years
name                
Alice   80000      5
Bob     75000      3
---
             salary  years
dept name                 
Eng  Alice   80000      5

desc.zh: 要提取的索引值
desc.en: Index value to extract

desc.zh: 提取轴；0 为行（index），1 为列（columns）
desc.en: Axis to extract from; 0 for rows (index), 1 for columns

desc.zh: 多级索引中的级别名或编号；None 时 key 必须匹配第一级
desc.en: Level name or number in MultiIndex; None means key must match first level

desc.zh: 是否从结果中删除被选择的索引级别
desc.en: Whether to drop the selected index level from the result

title.zh: loc 中使用 callable（函数式选择）

items.code:
# callable 接收 DataFrame 自身作为参数
df.loc[lambda x: x['salary'] > x['salary'].median()]

# 链式操作中特别有用
(df
 .assign(bonus=lambda x: x['salary'] * 0.1)
 .loc[lambda x: x['bonus'] > 5000]
)

note.zh: callable 模式完美适配方法链，避免创建临时变量
note.en: Callable pattern works perfectly with method chaining, avoids temporary variables

items.code:
# 最后一行
df.iloc[-1]

# 最后3行，最后2列
df.iloc[-3:, -2:]

# 倒数第2行的第1列
df.iloc[-2, 0]

# 每隔一行取
df.iloc[::2]  # 步长为2

note.zh: iloc 完全遵循 Python 切片规则：支持负数索引和步长
note.en: iloc fully follows Python slicing rules: supports negative indexing and step

items.code:
# loc: 标签行 + 标签列
df.loc['r1':'r3', ['name', 'salary']]

# iloc: 位置行 + 位置列
df.iloc[0:3, [0, 2]]

# loc: 布尔行 + 标签列
df.loc[df['age'] > 30, 'name':'salary']

# 赋值：定位并修改
df.loc[df['dept'] == 'Eng', 'salary'] *= 1.1

note.zh: loc/iloc 的行列选择器之间用逗号分隔；这是避免 SettingWithCopyWarning 的最佳方式
note.en: Row and column selectors in loc/iloc are separated by comma; best way to avoid SettingWithCopyWarning

title.zh: 花式索引：用列表选取多行/多列
title.en: Fancy Indexing: select rows/cols with lists

items.code:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1,2,3,4,5], 'B': [10,20,30,40,50], 'C': ['a','b','c','d','e']})

# iloc 花式索引：用整数列表选行
print(df.iloc[[0, 2, 4]])  # 取第0、2、4行

# loc 花式索引：用标签列表选行和列
print(df.loc[[1, 3], ['A', 'C']])  # 取第1、3行的A和C列

# 用布尔 Series 索引（最常用）
mask = df['A'] > 2
print(df.loc[mask, 'B'])  # 取 A>2 的行的 B 列

# 结合 isin 做花式筛选
print(df.loc[df['C'].isin(['a', 'c', 'e'])])

note.zh: iloc 用整数列表，loc 用标签列表。布尔 Series 是 pandas 最常用的花式索引方式
note.en: iloc uses integer lists, loc uses label lists. Boolean Series is the most common fancy indexing in pandas

title.zh: loc 切片包含两端 vs iloc 切片不含右端
title.en: loc slice is inclusive vs iloc slice is right-exclusive

wrong.code:
df = pd.DataFrame({'v': [10, 20, 30, 40, 50]},
                   index=['a', 'b', 'c', 'd', 'e'])

# 误以为 loc 和 iloc 切片行为一样
print(df.loc['a':'c'])   # 3行: a, b, c（包含 'c'）
print(df.iloc[0:3])      # 3行: 0, 1, 2（不含 3）
# 结果行数相同但语义不同!

note.zh: loc 的标签切片包含两端（a, b, c 都在），iloc 的位置切片不含右端（Python 风格）
note.en: loc label slicing includes both ends (a, b, c all included), iloc position slicing excludes right end (Python-style)

right.code:
# 记住规则:
# loc['a':'c']  → 包含 'a', 'b', 'c'
# iloc[0:3]     → 包含 0, 1, 2（不含 3）

# 安全做法：明确预期
df.loc['a':'c']  # 我要 a 到 c 的所有行（含 c）
df.iloc[0:3]     # 我要前 3 行（位置 0, 1, 2）

note.zh: loc 包含两端是因为标签没有「下一个」概念；iloc 遵循 Python 惯例
note.en: loc includes both ends because labels have no 'next' concept; iloc follows Python convention

title.zh: 整数索引导致 loc/iloc 混淆

wrong.code:
df = pd.DataFrame({'v': [10, 20, 30]}, index=[2, 0, 1])

# loc 用标签（恰好是整数）
print(df.loc[0])    # 标签为 0 的行 → v=20
# iloc 用位置
print(df.iloc[0])   # 位置 0（第一行）→ v=10
# 同是 [0] 但结果不同！

note.zh: 当索引是整数时，loc[0] 查找标签 0，iloc[0] 查找第 0 个位置
note.en: When index is integer, loc[0] looks up label 0, iloc[0] looks up position 0

right.code:
df = pd.DataFrame({'v': [10, 20, 30]}, index=[2, 0, 1])

# 明确使用 loc（标签）或 iloc（位置）
print(df.loc[2])    # 标签 2 → v=10
print(df.iloc[2])   # 位置 2 → v=30

# 最佳实践：避免纯整数索引
# 使用 reset_index() 或设置有意义的索引

note.zh: 当行索引是整数时，始终明确使用 loc（标签）或 iloc（位置），不要用 df[0] 造成歧义
note.en: With integer index, always use loc (label) or iloc (position) explicitly, avoid ambiguous df[0]

wrong.code:
# 链式索引 → 可能操作副本
subset = df[df['age'] > 30]
subset['salary'] = 99999
# SettingWithCopyWarning: value is trying to be set
# on a copy of a slice from a DataFrame

note.zh: 筛选后的 DataFrame 可能是视图也可能是副本，对其赋值行为不确定
note.en: Filtered DataFrame may be a view or copy, assignment behavior is undefined

right.code:
# 方法1: loc 一步到位
df.loc[df['age'] > 30, 'salary'] = 99999

# 方法2: 显式复制后操作
subset = df[df['age'] > 30].copy()
subset['salary'] = 99999  # 安全，只修改副本

# 方法3: pandas 2.0+ 的 Copy-on-Write
pd.options.mode.copy_on_write = True

note.zh: 用 loc 一步定位赋值，或 .copy() 明确意图；pandas 2.0+ 的 CoW 模式从根本上解决此问题
note.en: Use loc for one-step assignment, or .copy() to clarify intent; pandas 2.0+ CoW mode fundamentally solves this

items.name: df.sort_values()

desc.zh: 按一列或多列的值排序，支持自定义排序键和缺失值位置
desc.en: Sort by values of one or more columns, supports custom sort key and NA position

items.signature: df.sort_values(by, axis=0, ascending=True, inplace=False, kind='quicksort', na_position='last', ignore_index=False, key=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana', 'Eve'],
    'dept': ['Eng', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'HR', 'Eng'],
    'salary': [80000, 65000, 72000, 55000, 90000],
    'age': [25, 30, 35, 28, 25]
})

# 单列排序
print(df.sort_values('salary', ascending=False))
print('---')
# 多列排序（先按 dept 升序，再按 salary 降序）
print(df.sort_values(
    by=['dept', 'salary'],
    ascending=[True, False]
))
items.output:
name   dept  salary  age
4      Eve    Eng   90000   25
0    Alice    Eng   80000   25
2  Charlie    Eng   72000   35
1      Bob  Sales   65000   30
3    Diana     HR   55000   28
---
      name   dept  salary  age
4      Eve    Eng   90000   25
0    Alice    Eng   80000   25
2  Charlie    Eng   72000   35
3    Diana     HR   55000   28
1      Bob  Sales   65000   30

desc.zh: 排序依据的列名或列名列表
desc.en: Column name or list of column names to sort by

desc.zh: 排序轴；0 按行排序（最常用），1 按列排序
desc.en: Sort axis; 0 sorts rows (most common), 1 sorts columns

desc.zh: 升序/降序；列表形式可为每列指定不同方向
desc.en: Ascending/descending; list form allows different direction per column

desc.zh: True 原地修改并返回 None；False 返回新 DataFrame
desc.en: True modifies in-place and returns None; False returns new DataFrame

desc.zh: 排序算法；'mergesort'/'stable' 是稳定排序（保持相等元素原始顺序）
desc.en: Sort algorithm; 'mergesort'/'stable' are stable sorts (preserve order of equal elements)

desc.zh: NaN 值的位置：'last' 放末尾，'first' 放开头
desc.en: Position of NaN values: 'last' at the end, 'first' at the beginning

desc.zh: True 重置索引为 0, 1, 2, ...；False 保留原索引
desc.en: True resets index to 0, 1, 2, ...; False preserves original index

desc.zh: 排序前对值应用的函数（如 str.lower），接收 Series 返回 Series
desc.en: Function applied to values before sorting (e.g. str.lower), takes Series returns Series

items.name: df.sort_index()

desc.zh: 按索引（行标签或列标签）排序
desc.en: Sort by index labels (row or column labels)

items.signature: df.sort_index(axis=0, level=None, ascending=True, inplace=False, kind='quicksort', na_position='last', sort_remaining=True, ignore_index=False)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'value': [30, 10, 20, 40]
}, index=['c', 'a', 'b', 'd'])

# 按行索引排序
print(df.sort_index())
print('---')
# 降序
print(df.sort_index(ascending=False))
print('---')
# 多级索引排序
arrays = [['B', 'A', 'B', 'A'], [2, 1, 1, 2]]
idx = pd.MultiIndex.from_arrays(arrays, names=['grp', 'num'])
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'val': [40, 10, 30, 20]}, index=idx)
print(df2.sort_index(level=['grp', 'num']))
items.output:
value
a     10
b     20
c     30
d     40
---
   value
d     40
c     30
b     20
a     10
---
         val
grp num     
A   1     10
    2     20
B   1     30
    2     40

desc.zh: 排序轴；0 排序行索引，1 排序列名
desc.en: Sort axis; 0 sorts row index, 1 sorts column names

desc.zh: 多级索引中要排序的级别；None 排序所有级别
desc.en: Level(s) to sort in MultiIndex; None sorts all levels

desc.zh: 升序/降序；多级索引可为每级指定方向
desc.en: Ascending/descending; list allows different direction per level

desc.zh: 是否原地修改
desc.en: Whether to modify in-place

desc.zh: NaN 索引值的位置
desc.en: Position of NaN index values

desc.zh: 多级索引中，指定 level 排序后是否继续对剩余级别排序
desc.en: In MultiIndex, whether to sort remaining levels after sorting specified level

items.name: df.nlargest()

desc.zh: 返回某列最大的 N 行，比 sort_values().head(n) 更快
desc.en: Return N rows with largest values in column, faster than sort_values().head(n)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana', 'Eve'],
    'salary': [80000, 65000, 80000, 55000, 90000],
    'age': [25, 30, 35, 28, 25]
})

# Top 3 薪资
print(df.nlargest(3, 'salary'))
print('---')
# 处理并列：keep='all' 保留所有并列行
print(df.nlargest(2, 'salary', keep='all'))
items.output:
name  salary  age
4      Eve   90000   25
0    Alice   80000   25
2  Charlie   80000   35
---
      name  salary  age
4      Eve   90000   25
0    Alice   80000   25
2  Charlie   80000   35

desc.zh: 返回的行数
desc.en: Number of rows to return

desc.zh: 排序依据的列名；多列时按优先级排序
desc.en: Column name(s) to sort by; multiple columns sorted by priority

desc.zh: 并列值处理：'first' 保留先出现的，'last' 保留后出现的，'all' 保留全部（可能超过 n 行）
desc.en: Tie handling: 'first' keeps first occurrence, 'last' keeps last, 'all' keeps all (may exceed n rows)

items.name: df.nsmallest()

desc.zh: 返回某列最小的 N 行，比 sort_values().head(n) 更快
desc.en: Return N rows with smallest values in column, faster than sort_values().head(n)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana', 'Eve'],
    'salary': [80000, 65000, 72000, 55000, 90000],
    'years': [5, 3, 7, 2, 10]
})

# 工龄最短的 3 人
print(df.nsmallest(3, 'years'))
print('---')
# 多列排序：先按 years 取最小，再按 salary
print(df.nsmallest(3, ['years', 'salary']))
items.output:
name  salary  years
3  Diana   55000      2
1    Bob   65000      3
0  Alice   80000      5
---
      name  salary  years
3    Diana   55000      2
1      Bob   65000      3
0    Alice   80000      5

desc.zh: 返回的行数
desc.en: Number of rows to return

desc.zh: 排序依据的列名
desc.en: Column name(s) to sort by

desc.zh: 并列值处理方式
desc.en: Tie handling method

items.name: df.rank()

desc.zh: 计算每个值在列中的排名，支持多种并列处理策略
desc.en: Compute rank of each value in column, supports multiple tie-breaking strategies

items.signature: df.rank(axis=0, method='average', numeric_only=False, na_option='keep', ascending=True, pct=False)
items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana', 'Eve'],
    'score': [90, 85, 90, 78, 95]
})

# 默认排名（average 方法处理并列）
df['rank_avg'] = df['score'].rank(ascending=False)
# 最小排名（并列取最小值）
df['rank_min'] = df['score'].rank(ascending=False, method='min')
# 百分比排名
df['rank_pct'] = df['score'].rank(ascending=False, pct=True)

print(df)
items.output:
name  score  rank_avg  rank_min  rank_pct
0    Alice     90       2.5       2.0       0.5
1      Bob     85       4.0       4.0       0.8
2  Charlie     90       2.5       2.0       0.5
3    Diana     78       5.0       5.0       1.0
4      Eve     95       1.0       1.0       0.2

desc.zh: 排名轴；0 沿列排名，1 沿行排名
desc.en: Rank axis; 0 ranks along columns, 1 ranks along rows

desc.zh: 并列处理：'average' 平均排名，'min' 最小排名，'max' 最大排名，'first' 出现顺序，'dense' 密集排名（无间隔）
desc.en: Tie-breaking: 'average' mean rank, 'min' lowest, 'max' highest, 'first' by occurrence, 'dense' no gaps

desc.zh: True 只对数值列计算排名
desc.en: True ranks only numeric columns

desc.zh: NaN 处理：'keep' 保持 NaN，'top' 排最前，'bottom' 排最后
desc.en: NaN handling: 'keep' stays NaN, 'top' ranked first, 'bottom' ranked last

desc.zh: True 时最小值排名 1；False 时最大值排名 1
desc.en: True: smallest value gets rank 1; False: largest value gets rank 1

desc.zh: True 返回百分比排名（0~1 之间）
desc.en: True returns percentage ranks (between 0 and 1)

items.name: Series.sort_values()

desc.zh: 对 Series 排序（df['col'].sort_values()）
desc.en: Sort a Series (df['col'].sort_values())

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([3, 1, 4, 1, 5], name='val')
print(s.sort_values())
print('---')
print(s.sort_values(ascending=False).head(3))
items.output:
1    1
3    1
0    3
2    4
4    5
Name: val
---
4    5
2    4
0    3
Name: val

desc.zh: True=升序，False=降序
desc.en: True=ascending, False=descending

desc.zh: NaN 放在 'first' 或 'last'
desc.en: Put NaN at 'first' or 'last'

desc.zh: 排序前对值应用的函数，如 str.lower
desc.en: Function to apply before sorting, e.g. str.lower

items.name: Series.idxmax() / Series.idxmin()

desc.zh: 返回最大/最小值的索引标签
desc.en: Return index label of max/min value

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([85, 92, 78, 95], index=['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana'])
print(f'最高分: {s.idxmax()} = {s.max()}')
print(f'最低分: {s.idxmin()} = {s.min()}')
items.output:
最高分: Diana = 95
最低分: Charlie = 78

desc.zh: 是否跳过 NaN
desc.en: Whether to skip NaN

items.name: Series.searchsorted()

desc.zh: 在有序 Series 中查找插入位置（二分查找）
desc.en: Find insertion point in sorted Series (binary search)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([10, 20, 30, 40, 50])
print(s.searchsorted(25))  # 2，应插入位置2
print(s.searchsorted([15, 35]))  # [1, 3]

desc.zh: 要查找插入位置的值
desc.en: Value(s) to find insertion point for

desc.zh: 'left'=插在相等值左边，'right'=右边
desc.en: 'left'=insert before equal values, 'right'=after

title.zh: 多列混合排序（升降序不同）

items.code:
# 先按 dept 字母升序，再按 salary 降序
df.sort_values(
    by=['dept', 'salary'],
    ascending=[True, False]
)

# 稳定排序确保相等元素保持原始顺序
df.sort_values('salary', kind='mergesort')

note.zh: ascending 列表长度必须与 by 列表一致；需要稳定排序时用 kind='mergesort'
note.en: ascending list length must match by list; use kind='mergesort' for stable sorting

title.zh: 自定义排序键（key 参数）

items.code:
# 按字符串长度排序
df.sort_values('name', key=lambda x: x.str.len())

# 大小写不敏感排序
df.sort_values('name', key=lambda x: x.str.lower())

# 自定义顺序排序
order = {'High': 0, 'Medium': 1, 'Low': 2}
df.sort_values('priority',
    key=lambda x: x.map(order))

note.zh: key 函数接收整个 Series 并返回 Series，比 apply 更高效
note.en: key function receives entire Series and returns Series, more efficient than apply

items.code:
# 每个部门薪资最高的 2 人
df.sort_values('salary', ascending=False) \
  .groupby('dept') \
  .head(2)

# 或使用 nlargest（更高效）
df.groupby('dept').apply(
    lambda x: x.nlargest(2, 'salary')
).reset_index(drop=True)

note.zh: 先排序再 groupby().head() 是最简洁的 Top N per group 写法
note.en: Sort first then groupby().head() is the most concise Top N per group pattern

wrong.code:
# inplace=True 返回 None！
result = df.sort_values('age', inplace=True).head(3)
# AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'head'

# 另一个常见错误
df = df.sort_values('age', inplace=True)
# df 变成 None！

note.zh: inplace=True 返回 None，赋值给变量或链式调用都会出错
note.en: inplace=True returns None, assigning to variable or chaining will fail

right.code:
# 方法1: 不用 inplace（推荐）
df = df.sort_values('age')
result = df.head(3)

# 方法2: 如果用 inplace，不要赋值或链式
df.sort_values('age', inplace=True)
result = df.head(3)

# 方法3: 链式操作
result = df.sort_values('age').head(3)  # 最简洁

note.zh: 现代 pandas 推荐不用 inplace，直接链式调用更清晰
note.en: Modern pandas recommends avoiding inplace; direct chaining is cleaner

title.zh: na_position 默认值导致 NaN 被忽视

wrong.code:
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'],
    'score': [90, np.nan, 85]
})

# NaN 默认排在最后，容易被 head() 截断忽略
print(df.sort_values('score').head(2))
# 只看到 85 和 90，NaN 被隐藏在末尾

note.zh: na_position='last' 是默认值，NaN 总在底部，用 head() 时容易遗漏
note.en: na_position='last' is default, NaN always at bottom, easily missed with head()

right.code:
# 先检查 NaN 数量
print(f"NaN count: {df['score'].isna().sum()}")

# 需要时将 NaN 放前面
df.sort_values('score', na_position='first')

# 或先处理 NaN 再排序
df_clean = df.dropna(subset=['score'])
df_clean.sort_values('score')

note.zh: 排序前先用 isna().sum() 检查缺失值；必要时设 na_position='first' 让 NaN 显眼
note.en: Check nulls with isna().sum() before sorting; set na_position='first' to make NaN visible when needed

items.name: df.agg() / df.aggregate()

desc.zh: 对列应用一个或多个聚合函数
desc.en: Apply one or more aggregation functions to columns

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 2, 3], 'B': [4, 5, 6]})

# 多个聚合
print(df.agg(['mean', 'std', 'min', 'max']))
# 每列不同聚合
print(df.agg({'A': ['sum', 'mean'], 'B': 'max'}))

desc.zh: 聚合函数：字符串、列表或字典（每列不同函数）
desc.en: Aggregation: string, list, or dict (different funcs per column)

desc.zh: 0=按列聚合，1=按行聚合
desc.en: 0=aggregate columns, 1=aggregate rows

items.name: df.corr() / df.cov()

desc.zh: 计算列间相关系数矩阵 / 协方差矩阵
desc.en: Correlation matrix / covariance matrix between columns

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'x': [1,2,3,4,5], 'y': [2,4,5,4,5], 'z': [5,4,3,2,1]})
print(df.corr().round(2))

desc.zh: 'pearson'/'kendall'/'spearman' 或自定义函数
desc.en: 'pearson'/'kendall'/'spearman' or custom callable

desc.zh: 每对列最少需要的非 NaN 观测数
desc.en: Min non-NaN observations needed per column pair

items.name: df.quantile()

desc.zh: 计算分位数
desc.en: Compute quantile values

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([10, 20, 30, 40, 50])
print(s.quantile([0.25, 0.5, 0.75]))

desc.zh: 分位数值，0-1 之间，可传列表计算多个
desc.en: Quantile(s), 0-1, can pass list for multiple

desc.zh: 'linear'/'lower'/'higher'/'nearest'/'midpoint' 插值方法
desc.en: 'linear'/'lower'/'higher'/'nearest'/'midpoint' interpolation

items.name: df.pct_change()

desc.zh: 计算当前值与前一个值的百分比变化
desc.en: Percentage change between current and prior element

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([100, 120, 108, 130])
print(s.pct_change())

desc.zh: 对比间隔，1=环比，12=同比（月度数据）
desc.en: Periods to shift, 1=MoM, 12=YoY (monthly data)

items.name: mean() / sum() / std() / var() / median()

desc.zh: 基础统计函数
desc.en: Basic statistical functions

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'score': [85, 92, 78, 95, 88], 'age': [20, 22, 21, 23, 20]})
print(f"均值: {df['score'].mean()}")
print(f"标准差: {df['score'].std():.2f}")
print(f"中位数: {df['score'].median()}")

desc.zh: 0=每列计算，1=每行计算
desc.en: 0=compute per column, 1=per row

desc.zh: 是否跳过 NaN
desc.en: Whether to skip NaN values

desc.zh: True=只计算数值列
desc.en: True=only numeric columns

items.name: Series.value_counts()

desc.zh: 统计每个唯一值的出现次数
desc.en: Count occurrences of each unique value

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series(['cat', 'dog', 'cat', 'bird', 'dog', 'cat'])
print(s.value_counts())
print('---')
print(s.value_counts(normalize=True))
items.output:
cat     3
dog     2
bird    1
---
cat     0.500
dog     0.333
bird    0.167

desc.zh: True=返回比例而非计数
desc.en: True=return proportions instead of counts

desc.zh: True=按计数排序
desc.en: True=sort by counts

desc.zh: 对数值数据分箱后计数
desc.en: Bin numeric data before counting

desc.zh: True=不统计 NaN
desc.en: True=exclude NaN from counts

items.name: Series.clip() / df.clip()

desc.zh: 将值裁剪到指定范围内
desc.en: Trim values to specified range

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([1, 5, 10, 15, 20])
print(s.clip(lower=5, upper=15))

desc.zh: 下界，小于此值的替换为 lower
desc.en: Lower bound, values below are replaced

desc.zh: 上界，大于此值的替换为 upper
desc.en: Upper bound, values above are replaced

items.name: Series.diff() / df.diff()

desc.zh: 计算当前值与前 N 个值的差
desc.en: Difference between current and Nth prior element

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([100, 120, 115, 130])
print(s.diff())  # 环比差值

desc.zh: 差分步长，1=环比差，12=同比差（月度）
desc.en: Periods to shift, 1=period diff, 12=YoY diff

items.name: df.count()

desc.zh: 统计每列的非 NaN 值个数
desc.en: Count non-NaN values per column

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 2, np.nan], 'B': [4, np.nan, np.nan]})
print(df.count())
items.output:
A    2
B    1

desc.zh: 0=每列计数，1=每行计数
desc.en: 0=count per column, 1=per row

items.name: df.all() / df.any()

desc.zh: 检查是否全部/任一为 True
desc.en: Check if all/any values are True

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [True, True, False], 'B': [True, False, False]})
print('all:', df.all().tolist())
print('any:', df.any().tolist())
items.output:
all: [False, False]
any: [True, True]

desc.zh: 0=按列检查，1=按行检查
desc.en: 0=check per column, 1=per row

desc.zh: 是否跳过 NaN
desc.en: Whether to skip NaN

items.name: df.abs()

desc.zh: 取绝对值
desc.en: Return absolute values

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([-3, -1, 0, 2, 5])
print(s.abs())

items.name: df.round()

desc.zh: 四舍五入到指定小数位
desc.en: Round values to given number of decimals

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1.234, 5.678], 'B': [9.1, 2.99]})
print(df.round(1))
print('---')
print(df.round({'A': 0, 'B': 2}))

desc.zh: 小数位数；字典可指定每列不同位数
desc.en: Decimal places; dict for per-column precision

items.name: df.mode()

desc.zh: 返回众数（出现次数最多的值）
desc.en: Return mode (most frequent value)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([1, 2, 2, 3, 3, 3])
print(s.mode())
items.output:
0    3
dtype: int64

desc.zh: 0=每列众数，1=每行众数
desc.en: 0=mode per column, 1=per row

desc.zh: 是否排除 NaN
desc.en: Whether to exclude NaN

items.name: df.skew() / df.kurt()

desc.zh: 计算偏度（分布不对称性）/ 峰度（尾部厚度）
desc.en: Skewness (asymmetry) / Kurtosis (tail heaviness)

items.signature:
df.skew(axis=0, skipna=True, numeric_only=False)
df.kurt(axis=0, skipna=True, numeric_only=False)
items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

np.random.seed(42)
s = pd.Series(np.random.exponential(1, 1000))
print(f'skew: {s.skew():.2f}')  # 正偏=右偏
print(f'kurt: {s.kurt():.2f}')  # >0=厚尾
items.output:
skew: 2.03
kurt: 5.80

desc.zh: 0=按列，1=按行
desc.en: 0=per column, 1=per row

desc.zh: 是否跳过 NaN
desc.en: Whether to skip NaN

items.name: df.idxmax() / df.idxmin()

desc.zh: 返回每列最大/最小值对应的索引标签
desc.en: Return index labels of max/min values per column

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'math': [85, 92, 78], 'english': [90, 75, 88]}, index=['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'])
print('最高分:', df.idxmax().to_dict())
print('最低分:', df.idxmin().to_dict())
items.output:
最高分: {'math': 'Bob', 'english': 'Alice'}
最低分: {'math': 'Charlie', 'english': 'Bob'}

desc.zh: 0=每列找，1=每行找
desc.en: 0=per column, 1=per row

desc.zh: 是否跳过 NaN
desc.en: Whether to skip NaN

items.name: Series.argmax() / Series.argmin()

desc.zh: 返回最大/最小值的位置索引（整数位置，非标签）
desc.en: Return position (integer) of max/min value

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([30, 10, 50, 20], index=['a', 'b', 'c', 'd'])
print(f'argmax={s.argmax()} (位置{s.argmax()}处值最大)')  # 2
print(f'argmin={s.argmin()} (位置{s.argmin()}处值最小)')  # 1

# 对比 idxmax/idxmin 返回的是标签
print(f'idxmax={s.idxmax()}')  # 'c'
items.output:
argmax=2 (位置2处值最大)
argmin=1 (位置1处值最小)
idxmax=c

title.zh: 一次性计算多个统计量

items.code:
# describe 一键出统计摘要
df.describe(percentiles=[.1, .25, .5, .75, .9])

# agg 灵活聚合
df.agg({'price': ['mean', 'median', 'std'],
        'quantity': ['sum', 'count']})

note.zh: describe 快速概览，agg 精确控制
note.en: describe for quick overview, agg for precise control

items.code:
# 找出与目标变量强相关的特征
corr = df.corr()['target'].abs().sort_values(ascending=False)
strong_features = corr[corr > 0.5].index.tolist()

note.zh: abs() 取绝对值看相关强度，不区分正负
note.en: abs() for correlation strength regardless of direction

title.zh: std() 默认是样本标准差 (ddof=1)

wrong.code:
s = pd.Series([1, 2, 3])
print(s.std())  # 1.0（样本标准差，除以 N-1）
# 与 numpy 默认不同！
import numpy as np
print(np.std([1, 2, 3]))  # 0.816（总体标准差，除以 N）

note.zh: pandas std 默认 ddof=1（样本），numpy 默认 ddof=0（总体）
note.en: pandas std defaults ddof=1 (sample), numpy defaults ddof=0 (population)

right.code:
# 如果要总体标准差，指定 ddof=0
s.std(ddof=0)  # 0.816，与 numpy 一致

# 或统一用 numpy
np.std([1, 2, 3], ddof=1)  # 1.0，与 pandas 一致

note.zh: ddof=0 总体标准差，ddof=1 样本标准差，注意两个库默认不同
note.en: ddof=0 for population, ddof=1 for sample; note different defaults

items.name: df.isna() / df.isnull()

desc.zh: 逐元素检测缺失值，返回同形状的布尔 DataFrame
desc.en: Element-wise detection of missing values, returns a boolean DataFrame of the same shape

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', None, 'Charlie'],
    'age': [25, np.nan, 30],
    'score': [88.5, 92.0, np.nan]
})
print(df.isna())
items.output:
name    age  score
0  False  False  False
1   True   True  False
2  False  False   True

desc.zh: 调用该方法的 DataFrame 或 Series 对象
desc.en: The DataFrame or Series object calling this method

desc.zh: 该方法不接受额外参数；isna() 与 isnull() 完全等价
desc.en: This method takes no additional arguments; isna() and isnull() are exact aliases

items.name: df.notna() / df.notnull()

desc.zh: 逐元素检测非缺失值，返回布尔 DataFrame（isna 的取反）
desc.en: Element-wise detection of non-missing values, returns boolean DataFrame (inverse of isna)

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'city': ['Beijing', None, 'Shanghai'],
    'pop': [21.54, np.nan, 24.87],
    'area': [16410, 6340, np.nan]
})
print(df.notna())
print()
print('Non-null counts per column:')
print(df.notna().sum())
items.output:
city    pop   area
0   True   True   True
1  False  False   True
2   True   True  False

Non-null counts per column:
city    2
pop     2
area    2
dtype: int64

desc.zh: 调用该方法的 DataFrame 或 Series 对象
desc.en: The DataFrame or Series object calling this method

desc.zh: 该方法不接受额外参数；notna() 与 notnull() 完全等价
desc.en: This method takes no additional arguments; notna() and notnull() are exact aliases

items.name: df.fillna()

desc.zh: 用指定值或方法填充缺失值
desc.en: Fill missing values with a specified value or method

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'A': [1, np.nan, 3, np.nan, 5],
    'B': [np.nan, 2, np.nan, 4, np.nan],
    'C': [10, 20, np.nan, np.nan, 50]
})

# Fill with a scalar
print(df.fillna(0))
print()

# Fill with a dict (per-column values)
print(df.fillna({'A': 99, 'B': -1, 'C': df['C'].mean()}))

desc.zh: 用于填充的值；可以是标量、字典（按列指定）、Series 或 DataFrame
desc.en: Value used to fill holes; can be scalar, dict (per-column), Series, or DataFrame

desc.zh: 填充方法：'ffill' 前向填充，'bfill' 后向填充（已弃用，推荐用 df.ffill()/df.bfill()）
desc.en: Fill method: 'ffill' forward fill, 'bfill' backward fill (deprecated, prefer df.ffill()/df.bfill())

desc.zh: 沿哪个轴填充：0 或 'index' 按行方向，1 或 'columns' 按列方向
desc.en: Axis along which to fill: 0/'index' fills down rows, 1/'columns' fills across columns

desc.zh: 是否原地修改，为 True 时返回 None
desc.en: If True, modify in place and return None

desc.zh: 连续填充的最大数量；与 method 配合使用时限制连续填充步数
desc.en: Maximum number of consecutive NaN values to fill; limits consecutive fills when used with method

items.name: df.dropna()

desc.zh: 删除包含缺失值的行或列
desc.en: Remove rows or columns containing missing values

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', None, 'Diana'],
    'math': [90, np.nan, 85, np.nan],
    'english': [88, 76, np.nan, 92]
})

# Drop rows where ANY value is NaN
print(df.dropna())
print()

# Drop only if ALL values in row are NaN
print(df.dropna(how='all'))
print()

# Require at least 3 non-null values per row
print(df.dropna(thresh=3))
print()

# Only check specific columns
print(df.dropna(subset=['name', 'english']))
items.output:
name  math  english
0  Alice  90.0     88.0

    name  math  english
0  Alice  90.0     88.0
1    Bob   NaN     76.0
2   None  85.0      NaN
3  Diana   NaN     92.0

    name  math  english
0  Alice  90.0     88.0

    name  math  english
0  Alice  90.0     88.0
1    Bob   NaN     76.0
3  Diana   NaN     92.0

desc.zh: 0 或 'index' 删除含 NaN 的行；1 或 'columns' 删除含 NaN 的列
desc.en: 0/'index' to drop rows with NaN; 1/'columns' to drop columns with NaN

desc.zh: 'any' 表示任意一个 NaN 就删除；'all' 表示全部为 NaN 才删除
desc.en: 'any' drops if any NaN present; 'all' drops only if all values are NaN

desc.zh: 保留至少有 thresh 个非空值的行/列；设置后 how 参数被忽略
desc.en: Keep rows/columns with at least thresh non-null values; overrides how when set

desc.zh: 仅检查指定列（axis=0 时）或指定行（axis=1 时）的缺失值
desc.en: Only check for NaN in the specified columns (axis=0) or rows (axis=1)

desc.zh: 是否原地修改，为 True 时返回 None
desc.en: If True, modify in place and return None

items.name: df.interpolate()

desc.zh: 根据插值方法填充缺失值（线性、时间序列等）
desc.en: Fill missing values using an interpolation method (linear, time-based, etc.)

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'temp': [20.0, np.nan, np.nan, 26.0, np.nan, 30.0],
    'humidity': [45, 50, np.nan, np.nan, np.nan, 70]
})

# Default linear interpolation
print(df.interpolate())
print()

# Limit to fill at most 1 consecutive NaN
print(df.interpolate(limit=1))

desc.zh: 插值方法：'linear'、'time'、'index'、'pad'、'nearest'、'polynomial'、'spline' 等
desc.en: Interpolation method: 'linear', 'time', 'index', 'pad', 'nearest', 'polynomial', 'spline', etc.

desc.zh: 沿哪个轴插值：0 沿行方向（纵向），1 沿列方向（横向）
desc.en: Axis to interpolate along: 0 along rows (downward), 1 along columns (across)

desc.zh: 最多连续填充的 NaN 个数
desc.en: Maximum number of consecutive NaN values to fill

desc.zh: 限制填充方向：'forward' 只向前，'backward' 只向后，'both' 双向
desc.en: Direction of fill limit: 'forward' only ahead, 'backward' only behind, 'both' in both directions

desc.zh: 是否原地修改，为 True 时返回 None
desc.en: If True, modify in place and return None

items.name: pd.isna() / pd.notna()

desc.zh: 顶层函数，检测任意对象是否为缺失值（支持标量、数组、Series 等）
desc.en: Top-level functions to detect missing values on any object (scalar, array, Series, etc.)

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Scalar checks
print(pd.isna(np.nan))       # True
print(pd.isna(None))         # True
print(pd.isna(42))           # False
print(pd.notna('hello'))     # True
print()

# Works on lists and arrays
result = pd.isna([1, np.nan, 'foo', None])
print(result)
items.output:
True
True
False
True

[False  True False  True]

desc.zh: 要检测的对象；可以是标量、列表、ndarray、Series 或 DataFrame
desc.en: Object to check; can be scalar, list, ndarray, Series, or DataFrame

items.name: pd.NA / pd.NaT / np.nan

desc.zh: 三种缺失值的区别和适用场景
desc.en: Three types of missing values and their use cases

items.signature:
np.nan   # float NaN，传统方式
pd.NA    # pandas 2.0+ 的统一缺失值
pd.NaT   # 日期时间专用缺失值
items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

print(type(np.nan))    # float
print(type(pd.NA))     # NAType
print(type(pd.NaT))    # NaTType

# np.nan 会让 int 列变 float
s1 = pd.Series([1, np.nan])  # float64
# pd.NA 保持 nullable int
s2 = pd.Series([1, pd.NA], dtype='Int64')  # Int64
items.output:
<class 'float'>
<class 'pandas._libs.missing.NAType'>
<class 'pandas._libs.tslibs.nattype.NaTType'>

items.name: df.ffill() / df.bfill()

desc.zh: 向前填充 / 向后填充缺失值（替代 fillna(method=)）
desc.en: Forward fill / backward fill NaN (replaces fillna(method=))

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

s = pd.Series([1, np.nan, np.nan, 4, np.nan])
print('ffill:', s.ffill().tolist())
print('bfill:', s.bfill().tolist())
print('ffill limit=1:', s.ffill(limit=1).tolist())

desc.zh: 0=沿行方向填充，1=沿列方向
desc.en: 0=fill along rows, 1=along columns

desc.zh: 最多连续填充几个 NaN
desc.en: Max consecutive NaN to fill

title.zh: 前向填充 / 后向填充

items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

s = pd.Series([1, np.nan, np.nan, 4, np.nan, 6])

# Forward fill: propagate last valid value forward
print(s.ffill())
# 0    1.0
# 1    1.0
# 2    1.0
# 3    4.0
# 4    4.0
# 5    6.0

# Backward fill: use next valid value
print(s.bfill())
# 0    1.0
# 1    4.0
# 2    4.0
# 3    4.0
# 4    6.0
# 5    6.0

note.zh: 推荐使用 df.ffill() / df.bfill() 而非 fillna(method='ffill')，后者已弃用。可配合 limit 参数限制连续填充数量。
note.en: Prefer df.ffill() / df.bfill() over fillna(method='ffill'), which is deprecated. Combine with limit parameter to restrict consecutive fills.

title.zh: 按列使用不同值填充（字典模式）
title.en: Fill Different Values Per Column (Dict Pattern)

items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'category': ['A', None, 'B', None],
    'price': [10.5, np.nan, 25.0, np.nan],
    'quantity': [100, 200, np.nan, np.nan]
})

df_filled = df.fillna({
    'category': 'Unknown',
    'price': df['price'].median(),
    'quantity': 0
})
print(df_filled)
#   category  price  quantity
# 0        A  10.50     100.0
# 1  Unknown  17.75     200.0
# 2        B  25.00       0.0
# 3  Unknown  17.75       0.0

note.zh: 字典模式允许每列使用不同的填充策略：固定值、均值、中位数等。比逐列调用 fillna 更简洁。
note.en: Dict pattern allows different fill strategies per column: constant, mean, median, etc. More concise than calling fillna column by column.

title.zh: 使用 thresh 参数智能删除稀疏行

items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'survey_q1': [5, np.nan, 3, np.nan],
    'survey_q2': [4, np.nan, np.nan, 2],
    'survey_q3': [np.nan, np.nan, 4, 5],
    'survey_q4': [3, np.nan, 5, 1]
})

# Keep rows with at least 3 out of 4 answers
df_clean = df.dropna(thresh=3)
print(df_clean)
#    survey_q1  survey_q2  survey_q3  survey_q4
# 2        3.0        NaN        4.0        5.0
# 3        NaN        2.0        5.0        1.0

note.zh: thresh 比 how='any' 更灵活：允许存在少量缺失值而不丢弃整行。常用于问卷/调查数据清洗。
note.en: thresh is more flexible than how='any': allows a few missing values without dropping the entire row. Common for survey data cleaning.

title.zh: fillna 默认不修改原 DataFrame
title.en: fillna Does Not Modify the Original DataFrame by Default

wrong.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, np.nan, 3]})
df.fillna(0)  # returns a new DataFrame, original unchanged!
print(df)
# 0  1.0
# 1  NaN  <-- still NaN!
# 2  3.0

note.zh: fillna() 默认返回新对象，原 DataFrame 不变。这是初学者最常见的错误之一。
note.en: fillna() returns a new object by default; the original DataFrame is unchanged. This is one of the most common beginner mistakes.

right.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, np.nan, 3]})

# Option 1: reassign the result
df = df.fillna(0)

# Option 2: use inplace=True
# df.fillna(0, inplace=True)

print(df)
#      A
# 0  1.0
# 1  0.0
# 2  3.0

note.zh: 要么重新赋值 df = df.fillna(0)，要么使用 inplace=True。推荐前者，因为链式调用更清晰。
note.en: Either reassign df = df.fillna(0) or use inplace=True. The former is preferred for cleaner method chaining.

title.zh: 整数列出现 NaN 会自动变为浮点数
title.en: NaN in Integer Column Silently Converts to Float

wrong.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'user_id': [101, 102, 103]})
print(df.dtypes)  # int64

df.loc[1, 'user_id'] = np.nan
print(df.dtypes)  # float64!  Silent conversion
print(df)
#    user_id
# 0    101.0  <-- now float!
# 1      NaN
# 2    103.0

note.zh: 标准 int64 不支持 NaN，pandas 会静默转换为 float64。ID 列变成 101.0 可能导致 join 失败或显示异常。
note.en: Standard int64 does not support NaN, so pandas silently converts to float64. IDs becoming 101.0 can cause join failures or display issues.

right.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Use nullable integer type Int64 (capital I)
df = pd.DataFrame({'user_id': pd.array([101, 102, 103], dtype='Int64')})
df.loc[1, 'user_id'] = pd.NA
print(df.dtypes)  # Int64 (preserved!)
print(df)
#    user_id
# 0      101
# 1     <NA>
# 2      103

note.zh: 使用 pandas 可空整数类型 'Int64'（大写 I）可以在保持整数类型的同时支持缺失值 pd.NA。
note.en: Use pandas nullable integer type 'Int64' (capital I) to keep integer dtype while supporting missing values via pd.NA.

items.name: df.duplicated()

desc.zh: 标记重复行，返回布尔 Series
desc.en: Mark duplicate rows, returns boolean Series

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Alice', 'Bob'],
                   'age': [25, 30, 25, 35]})
print(df.duplicated())
print('---')
print(df.duplicated(subset='name', keep=False))
items.output:
0    False
1    False
2     True
3    False
---
0     True
1     True
2     True
3     True

desc.zh: None=所有列，指定列名则只按这些列判断重复
desc.en: None=all columns, specify columns to check for duplicates

desc.zh: 'first'=首次出现标 False，'last'=最后出现标 False，False=所有重复都标 True
desc.en: 'first'=mark first as non-dup, 'last'=mark last, False=mark all dups

items.name: df.drop_duplicates()

desc.zh: 删除重复行
desc.en: Remove duplicate rows

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Alice', 'Charlie'],
                   'dept': ['Eng', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'HR']})
print(df.drop_duplicates(subset='name'))
print('---')
print(df.drop_duplicates(subset='name', keep='last'))
items.output:
name   dept
0    Alice    Eng
1      Bob  Sales
3  Charlie     HR
---
      name   dept
1      Bob  Sales
2    Alice    Eng
3  Charlie     HR

desc.zh: 按哪些列判断重复
desc.en: Columns to identify duplicates

desc.zh: 'first'=保留首次出现，'last'=保留最后出现，False=删除所有重复
desc.en: 'first'=keep first, 'last'=keep last, False=drop all dups

desc.zh: True=重新编号索引
desc.en: True=reset index after dropping

items.name: Series.unique() / Series.nunique()

desc.zh: 获取唯一值数组 / 唯一值个数
desc.en: Get unique values array / count of unique values

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series(['a', 'b', 'a', 'c', 'b', None])
print(s.unique())
print(s.nunique())
print(s.nunique(dropna=False))
items.output:
['a' 'b' 'c' None]
3
4

desc.zh: nunique 中是否排除 NaN 计数
desc.en: Whether to exclude NaN from nunique count

items.name: df.nunique()

desc.zh: 统计每列的唯一值个数
desc.en: Count unique values per column

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 1, 2, 3], 'B': ['x', 'y', 'x', None]})
print(df.nunique())
print('---')
print(df.nunique(dropna=False))
items.output:
A    3
B    2
dtype: int64
---
A    3
B    3
dtype: int64

desc.zh: 0=每列计数，1=每行计数
desc.en: 0=per column, 1=per row

desc.zh: True=不把 NaN 算作唯一值
desc.en: True=don't count NaN as unique

title.zh: 保留每组最新/最大的记录

items.code:
# 按 user_id 去重，保留最新的记录
df_sorted = df.sort_values('timestamp')
df_latest = df_sorted.drop_duplicates(subset='user_id', keep='last')

# 或用 groupby + idxmax
idx = df.groupby('user_id')['timestamp'].idxmax()
df_latest = df.loc[idx]

note.zh: 先排序再 drop_duplicates(keep='last') 是常见模式
note.en: Sort then drop_duplicates(keep='last') is a common pattern

title.zh: 检查数据质量：有多少重复？

items.code:
# 重复行数
print(df.duplicated().sum())
# 每列的唯一值数
print(df.nunique())
# 重复率
print(f'{df.duplicated().mean():.1%} rows are duplicates')

note.zh: EDA 时先检查重复率，再决定如何处理
note.en: Check duplicate rate during EDA before deciding how to handle

title.zh: keep=False 会删除所有重复（包括第一次出现）
title.en: keep=False drops ALL duplicates (including first occurrence)

wrong.code:
# 想保留唯一记录，删除所有出现多次的
df.drop_duplicates(keep=False)
# 结果：所有重复的行全删了，可能不是你想要的

note.zh: keep=False 连第一次出现的也删掉了
note.en: keep=False removes even the first occurrence

right.code:
# 如果只想删除重复项中的多余行
df.drop_duplicates(keep='first')  # 保留第一次出现

# 如果要找出完全唯一的行
unique_mask = ~df.duplicated(keep=False)
df_unique = df[unique_mask]

note.zh: keep='first' 保留首次出现，keep=False 则全部删除
note.en: keep='first' keeps first occurrence, keep=False removes all

items.name: df.astype()

desc.zh: 将 DataFrame 或 Series 转换为指定数据类型
desc.en: Cast a DataFrame or Series to a specified dtype

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'price': ['10.5', '20.3', '15.8'],
    'quantity': [1, 2, 3],
    'active': [1, 0, 1]
})

# Convert single column
df['price'] = df['price'].astype(float)

# Convert multiple columns at once
df = df.astype({'quantity': 'float32', 'active': 'bool'})
print(df)
print(df.dtypes)
items.output:
price  quantity  active
0   10.5       1.0    True
1   20.3       2.0   False
2   15.8       3.0    True
price       float64
quantity    float32
active         bool
dtype: object

desc.zh: 目标类型；可以是类型字符串、NumPy 类型，或字典（按列指定）
desc.en: Target type; can be type string, NumPy dtype, or dict (per-column mapping)

desc.zh: 是否返回副本；默认行为取决于 pandas CoW 设置
desc.en: Whether to return a copy; default behavior depends on pandas Copy-on-Write setting

desc.zh: 'raise' 在转换失败时抛出异常；'ignore' 静默保留原值（已弃用）
desc.en: 'raise' throws on conversion failure; 'ignore' silently keeps original values (deprecated)

items.name: pd.to_numeric()

desc.zh: 将参数安全地转换为数值类型，可处理无法转换的值
desc.en: Safely convert argument to numeric type, with error handling for non-convertible values

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series(['1', '2.5', 'N/A', '4', 'missing'])

# errors='coerce' turns invalid values into NaN
result = pd.to_numeric(s, errors='coerce')
print(result)
print()
print(result.dtype)
print()

# Downcast to save memory
result_small = pd.to_numeric(
    pd.Series([1, 2, 3, 4]),
    downcast='integer'
)
print(result_small.dtype)
items.output:
0    1.0
1    2.5
2    NaN
3    4.0
4    NaN
dtype: float64

float64

int8

desc.zh: 要转换的参数
desc.en: Argument to convert to numeric

desc.zh: 'raise' 抛出异常；'coerce' 将无效值变为 NaN；'ignore' 返回原始输入（已弃用）
desc.en: 'raise' throws error; 'coerce' converts invalid to NaN; 'ignore' returns original input (deprecated)

desc.zh: 尝试将结果向下转换为最小适用的数值类型以节省内存
desc.en: Try to downcast result to the smallest applicable numeric type to save memory

items.name: pd.to_datetime()

desc.zh: 将参数转换为 datetime 类型，支持多种格式和时区
desc.en: Convert argument to datetime, supporting various formats and timezones

items.signature: pd.to_datetime(arg, errors='raise', dayfirst=False, yearfirst=False, format=None, utc=False)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

# Mixed format strings
s = pd.Series(['2024-01-15', '2024/02/20', 'Mar 5, 2024'])
result = pd.to_datetime(s)
print(result)
print()

# With explicit format (faster for known formats)
dates = pd.to_datetime(
    ['15-01-2024', '20-02-2024'],
    format='%d-%m-%Y'
)
print(dates)
print()

# Handle errors gracefully
bad = pd.to_datetime(
    ['2024-01-01', 'not-a-date', '2024-03-01'],
    errors='coerce'
)
print(bad)
items.output:
0   2024-01-15
1   2024-02-20
2   2024-03-05
dtype: datetime64[ns]

DatetimeIndex(['2024-01-15', '2024-02-20'], dtype='datetime64[ns]', freq=None)

DatetimeIndex(['2024-01-01', 'NaT', '2024-03-01'], dtype='datetime64[ns]', freq=None)

desc.zh: 要转换的日期时间数据
desc.en: The datetime data to convert

desc.zh: 'raise' 抛出异常；'coerce' 将无效值变为 NaT；'ignore' 返回原始输入
desc.en: 'raise' throws error; 'coerce' converts invalid to NaT; 'ignore' returns original input
Whether to parse first number as day (e.g., 10/11/12 → 2012-11-10)
Whether to parse first number as year (e.g., 10/11/12 → 2010-11-12)

desc.zh: 指定解析格式字符串（如 '%Y-%m-%d'），可显著提升解析速度
desc.en: Specify parsing format string (e.g., '%Y-%m-%d'), can significantly speed up parsing

desc.zh: 为 True 时返回 UTC 时间的 DatetimeIndex
desc.en: If True, return a UTC-localized DatetimeIndex

items.name: pd.to_timedelta()

desc.zh: 将参数转换为 Timedelta 类型（表示时间差）
desc.en: Convert argument to Timedelta type (representing a duration)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

# From strings
td = pd.to_timedelta(['1 days', '2 days 3 hours', '1h30min'])
print(td)
print()

# From numeric with unit
td2 = pd.to_timedelta([1, 2, 3], unit='h')
print(td2)
print()

# Arithmetic with timedelta
df = pd.DataFrame({
    'start': pd.to_datetime(['2024-01-01', '2024-01-02']),
    'duration_hours': [8, 12]
})
df['end'] = df['start'] + pd.to_timedelta(df['duration_hours'], unit='h')
print(df)
items.output:
TimedeltaIndex(['1 days 00:00:00', '2 days 03:00:00', '0 days 01:30:00'], dtype='timedelta64[ns]', freq=None)

TimedeltaIndex(['0 days 01:00:00', '0 days 02:00:00', '0 days 03:00:00'], dtype='timedelta64[ns]', freq=None)

       start  duration_hours                 end
0 2024-01-01               8 2024-01-01 08:00:00
1 2024-01-02              12 2024-01-02 12:00:00

params.name: arg
params.type: str | int | float | list | Series | ndarray

desc.zh: 要转换的时间差数据；字符串或数值均可
desc.en: Duration data to convert; accepts strings or numeric values

desc.zh: 数值参数的单位：'D'天、'h'小时、'min'分钟、's'秒、'ms'毫秒等
desc.en: Unit for numeric arg: 'D' days, 'h' hours, 'min' minutes, 's' seconds, 'ms' milliseconds, etc.

desc.zh: 'raise' 抛出异常；'coerce' 将无效值变为 NaT；'ignore' 返回原始输入
desc.en: 'raise' throws error; 'coerce' converts invalid to NaT; 'ignore' returns original input

items.name: df.convert_dtypes()

desc.zh: 自动推断并转换为最佳可空类型（StringDtype、Int64、boolean 等）
