desc.en: If True, discard the index instead of converting to column

desc.zh: 是否原地修改
desc.en: Whether to modify in place

desc.zh: 对于多级列名，指定将索引插入到哪个列层级
desc.en: For MultiIndex columns, specify which level to insert the index into

desc.zh: 多级列名时，其他层级的填充值
desc.en: For MultiIndex columns, fill value for other levels

items.name: df.reindex()

desc.zh: 按照新的标签重新对齐 DataFrame，缺失的标签填充 NaN 或指定值
desc.en: Realign DataFrame to new labels, filling missing labels with NaN or a specified value

items.signature: DataFrame.reindex(labels=None, index=None, columns=None, axis=None, method=None, fill_value=NaN, limit=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'A': [1, 2, 3],
    'B': [4, 5, 6]
}, index=['x', 'y', 'z'])

# Reindex rows: add new, reorder, NaN for missing
df_new = df.reindex(['z', 'y', 'x', 'w'])
print(df_new)
print()

# Reindex columns
df_cols = df.reindex(columns=['B', 'A', 'C'], fill_value=0)
print(df_cols)
print()

# Forward-fill method for ordered data
df_time = pd.DataFrame(
    {'val': [10, 20, 30]},
    index=pd.to_datetime(['2024-01-01', '2024-01-03', '2024-01-05'])
)
full_range = pd.date_range('2024-01-01', '2024-01-05')
print(df_time.reindex(full_range, method='ffill'))

desc.zh: 新的标签序列（需配合 axis 使用）
desc.en: New label sequence (used with axis)

desc.zh: 新的行索引标签
desc.en: New row index labels

desc.zh: 新的列标签
desc.en: New column labels

desc.zh: 指定 labels 作用于行还是列
desc.en: Specify whether labels apply to rows or columns

desc.zh: 填充方法：'ffill' 前向填充、'bfill' 后向填充、'nearest' 最近值（仅限单调索引）
desc.en: Fill method: 'ffill' forward fill, 'bfill' backward fill, 'nearest' nearest value (monotonic index only)

desc.zh: 新标签对应的默认填充值（method 为 None 时使用）
desc.en: Default fill value for new labels (used when method is None)

desc.zh: 连续填充的最大数量（与 method 配合使用）
desc.en: Maximum number of consecutive fills (used with method)

items.name: df.columns = [...]

desc.zh: 直接赋值替换所有列名（一次性批量重命名）
desc.en: Directly assign new column names (batch rename all at once)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'col_a': [1, 2, 3],
    'col_b': [4, 5, 6],
    'col_c': [7, 8, 9]
})
print('Before:')
print(df.columns.tolist())

# Replace ALL column names at once
df.columns = ['x', 'y', 'z']
print('\nAfter:')
print(df)
print()

# Common pattern: clean up column names
df2 = pd.DataFrame({' Name ': [1], 'AGE': [2], 'score (%)': [3]})
df2.columns = (
    df2.columns
    .str.strip()
    .str.lower()
    .str.replace(r'[^a-z0-9]', '_', regex=True)
    .str.strip('_')
)
print(df2.columns.tolist())
items.output:
Before:
['col_a', 'col_b', 'col_c']

After:
   x  y  z
0  1  4  7
1  2  5  8
2  3  6  9

['name', 'age', 'score']

desc.zh: 新列名列表；长度必须与当前列数完全一致
desc.en: New column name list; length must exactly match the current number of columns

items.name: df.set_axis()

desc.zh: 直接设置轴标签（行或列名）
desc.en: Set axis labels (row or column names) directly

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 2], 'B': [3, 4]})
print(df.set_axis(['row1', 'row2']))
print('---')
print(df.set_axis(['col1', 'col2'], axis=1))
items.output:
A  B
row1  1  3
row2  2  4
---
   col1  col2
0     1     3
1     2     4

desc.zh: 新的标签列表
desc.en: New labels

desc.zh: 0=设置行标签，1=设置列标签
desc.en: 0=set row labels, 1=set column labels

title.zh: rename + lambda 批量变换列名
title.en: Batch Transform Column Names with rename + lambda

items.code:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'User Name': [1], 'Order Date': [2], 'Total Amount': [3]
})

# Snake_case conversion
df = df.rename(columns=lambda c: c.lower().replace(' ', '_'))
print(df.columns.tolist())
# ['user_name', 'order_date', 'total_amount']

# Add prefix/suffix
df = df.rename(columns=lambda c: f'raw_{c}')
print(df.columns.tolist())
# ['raw_user_name', 'raw_order_date', 'raw_total_amount']

# Or use add_prefix / add_suffix methods
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'a': [1], 'b': [2]})
print(df2.add_prefix('col_').columns.tolist())
# ['col_a', 'col_b']

note.zh: rename(columns=func) 对每个列名调用 func，适合统一格式化。add_prefix()/add_suffix() 是快捷方法。
note.en: rename(columns=func) calls func on each column name, ideal for uniform formatting. add_prefix()/add_suffix() are shortcuts.

title.zh: set_index 作为 merge/join 的准备

items.code:
import pandas as pd

orders = pd.DataFrame({
    'order_id': [1, 2, 3],
    'customer_id': [101, 102, 101],
    'amount': [50, 80, 30]
})

customers = pd.DataFrame({
    'customer_id': [101, 102, 103],
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie']
})

# Set index for efficient joins
orders_idx = orders.set_index('customer_id')
customers_idx = customers.set_index('customer_id')

# join uses index by default
result = orders_idx.join(customers_idx)
print(result)
#              order_id  amount   name
# customer_id
# 101                 1      50  Alice
# 102                 2      80    Bob
# 101                 3      30  Alice

# Remember to reset_index if needed later
result_flat = result.reset_index()

note.zh: set_index + join 比 merge 更高效（基于索引的对齐）。join 后常需 reset_index() 恢复平坦结构。
note.en: set_index + join is more efficient than merge (index-based alignment). Often need reset_index() after join to restore flat structure.

title.zh: 批量重命名列名（字典映射）
title.en: Batch Rename Columns with Dict Mapping

items.code:
import pandas as pd

# Common scenario: rename columns from an external API or database
column_map = {
    'usr_nm': 'user_name',
    'em_addr': 'email',
    'reg_dt': 'registration_date',
    'lst_lgn': 'last_login'
}

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'usr_nm': ['Alice'], 'em_addr': ['a@b.com'],
    'reg_dt': ['2024-01-01'], 'lst_lgn': ['2024-03-15'],
    'other_col': [42]
})

# Only renames columns present in the dict; others stay unchanged
df = df.rename(columns=column_map)
print(df.columns.tolist())
# ['user_name', 'email', 'registration_date', 'last_login', 'other_col']

note.zh: 字典映射只影响指定的列，未在字典中的列保持不变。适合数据库/API 字段名规范化。
note.en: Dict mapping only affects specified columns; others remain unchanged. Ideal for normalizing database/API field names.

title.en: set_index Drops the Column by Default

wrong.code:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'id': [1, 2, 3],
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie']
})

df = df.set_index('id')
print(df.columns.tolist())  # ['name'] -- 'id' is gone from columns!
print(df.loc[1, 'id'])
# KeyError: 'id'  -- it's the index now, not a column

note.zh: set_index 默认 drop=True，列会从 DataFrame 中消失。后续按列名访问会 KeyError。
note.en: set_index defaults to drop=True, removing the column. Subsequent column-name access raises KeyError.

right.code:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'id': [1, 2, 3],
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie']
})

# Option 1: Keep the column with drop=False
df_keep = df.set_index('id', drop=False)
print(df_keep.columns.tolist())  # ['id', 'name']

# Option 2: Access via .index after set_index
df_idx = df.set_index('id')
print(df_idx.index.tolist())  # [1, 2, 3]  -- access via .index
print(df_idx.index.name)       # 'id'

# Option 3: reset_index to get it back as a column
df_flat = df_idx.reset_index()
print(df_flat.columns.tolist())  # ['id', 'name']

note.zh: 使用 drop=False 同时保留列和索引；或用 reset_index() 将索引恢复为列。
note.en: Use drop=False to keep both column and index; or reset_index() to restore index as a column.

title.zh: reindex 不是 loc：不会筛选，而是重新对齐
title.en: reindex Is Not loc: It Realigns, Not Filters

wrong.code:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'A': [10, 20, 30]
}, index=['x', 'y', 'z'])

# Expecting to select rows 'x' and 'y' only
result = df.reindex(['x', 'y', 'w'])
print(result)
#       A
# x  10.0
# y  20.0
# w   NaN  <-- NaN row added, not just filtering!

note.zh: reindex 会添加不存在的标签（填 NaN），而非像 loc 那样只选择已有的。混用会导致意外的 NaN 行。
note.en: reindex adds rows for non-existent labels (filled with NaN), unlike loc which only selects existing ones. Confusing them introduces unexpected NaN rows.

right.code:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'A': [10, 20, 30]
}, index=['x', 'y', 'z'])

# To SELECT existing rows: use loc
result = df.loc[['x', 'y']]
print(result)
#     A
# x  10
# y  20

# To REALIGN to a new index (adding missing): use reindex
result = df.reindex(['x', 'y', 'w'], fill_value=0)
print(result)
#    A
# x  10
# y  20
# w   0

note.zh: 筛选用 loc/iloc，重新对齐用 reindex。reindex 的用途是确保索引完整性（如时间序列补齐）。
note.en: Use loc/iloc for filtering, reindex for realignment. reindex ensures index completeness (e.g., filling gaps in time series).

items.name: df.groupby()

desc.zh: 分组聚合的核心方法，支持按列名、函数、字典、Series 分组
desc.en: Core groupby method, supports grouping by column, function, dict, or Series

items.signature: df.groupby(by=None, axis=0, level=None, as_index=True, sort=True, group_keys=True, observed=no_default, dropna=True)
items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Carol', 'Dave', 'Eve', 'Frank'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35, 28, 42, 38],
    'salary': [50, 80, 90, 60, 95, 70]
})

# 1. 按列名分组
print(df.groupby('name')['salary'].sum().head(3))

# 2. 按函数分组（年龄分段）
print(df.groupby(lambda i: 'young' if df.loc[i,'age'] < 30 else 'senior')['salary'].mean())

# 3. 按 Series/字典映射分组
age_group = pd.cut(df['age'], bins=[0,30,40,100], labels=['青年','中年','资深'])
print(df.groupby(age_group)['salary'].mean())

# 4. 按多列分组
dept = pd.Series(['A','A','B','B','A','B'])
print(df.groupby([dept, age_group])['salary'].count())
items.output:
name
Alice    50
Bob      80
Carol    90
Name: salary
---
senior    78.75
young     55.00
Name: salary
---
age
青年    65.0
中年    80.0
资深    95.0
Name: salary

desc.zh: 用于分组的列名、列名列表或函数
desc.en: Column name(s), function, dict, or Series to group by

desc.zh: 沿行(0)或列(1)分组；1.5.0 后已弃用
desc.en: Group along rows (0) or columns (1); deprecated since 1.5.0

desc.zh: 对 MultiIndex 的指定层级进行分组
desc.en: Group by a particular level or levels of a MultiIndex

desc.zh: True 时分组键作为索引；False 时作为普通列
desc.en: If True, group keys become the index; if False, they become columns

desc.zh: 是否对分组键进行排序
desc.en: Whether to sort group keys; turn off for better performance

desc.zh: apply 时是否将分组键加入索引
desc.en: Whether to add group keys to the index when calling apply

desc.zh: 对 Categorical 分组列，是否只显示出现过的值
desc.en: For Categorical groupers, only show observed values (not all categories)

desc.zh: True 时排除分组键中的 NaN 行
desc.en: If True, exclude NaN values in group keys

items.name: GroupBy.agg()

desc.zh: 对分组结果应用一个或多个聚合函数
desc.en: Apply one or more aggregation functions to grouped data

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'dept': ['Sales', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'Eng', 'Eng'],
    'salary': [70, 80, 90, 85, 95],
    'bonus': [5, 8, 10, 7, 12]
})

result = df.groupby('dept').agg(
    avg_salary=pd.NamedAgg(column='salary', aggfunc='mean'),
    max_bonus=pd.NamedAgg(column='bonus', aggfunc='max'),
    headcount=pd.NamedAgg(column='salary', aggfunc='count')
)
print(result)
items.output:
avg_salary  max_bonus  headcount
dept                                    
Eng          90.0         12          3
Sales        75.0          8          2

desc.zh: 聚合函数，如 'mean'、'sum'，或函数列表/字典
desc.en: Aggregation function: string, callable, list, or dict of column→func

desc.zh: 传递给聚合函数的位置参数
desc.en: Positional arguments passed to the aggregation function

desc.zh: 传递给聚合函数的关键字参数，或 NamedAgg 命名聚合
desc.en: Keyword arguments passed to the function, or NamedAgg named aggregations

desc.zh: 执行引擎：'cython' 或 'numba'
desc.en: Execution engine: 'cython' or 'numba'

desc.zh: 传递给引擎的额外关键字参数
desc.en: Additional keyword arguments passed to the engine

items.name: GroupBy.transform()

desc.zh: 对每组应用函数，返回与原 DataFrame 同形状的结果
desc.en: Apply a function to each group, returning same-shaped result as input

desc.zh: 应用于每组的函数；必须返回与组同形状或可广播的结果
desc.en: Function to apply to each group; must return same shape or broadcastable

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的位置参数
desc.en: Positional arguments passed to func

desc.zh: 执行引擎：'cython' 或 'numba'
desc.en: Execution engine: 'cython' or 'numba'

desc.zh: 传递给引擎的额外参数
desc.en: Additional keyword arguments for the engine

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的关键字参数
desc.en: Keyword arguments passed to func

items.name: GroupBy.apply()

desc.zh: 对每组应用自定义函数，灵活返回任意形状
desc.en: Apply a custom function to each group with flexible return shape

items.output:
dept   name  salary
4    Eng    Eve      95
1  Sales    Bob      80

desc.zh: 应用于每组 DataFrame 的函数
desc.en: Function to apply to each group DataFrame/Series

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的位置参数
desc.en: Positional arguments passed to func

desc.zh: 是否将分组列包含在传递给 func 的 DataFrame 中（2.2.0 新增）
desc.en: Whether to include group columns in the DataFrame passed to func (new in 2.2.0)

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的关键字参数
desc.en: Keyword arguments passed to func

desc.zh: 通过 groupby(group_keys=...) 控制输出是否附加组键索引
desc.en: Controlled via groupby(group_keys=...) to add group keys to index

items.name: GroupBy.filter()

desc.zh: 根据组级条件过滤，保留满足条件的整组数据
desc.en: Filter groups by a condition, keeping entire groups that satisfy it

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'dept': ['Sales', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'Eng', 'Eng'],
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Carol', 'Dave', 'Eve'],
    'salary': [70, 80, 90, 85, 95]
})

# Keep only departments with mean salary > 80
result = df.groupby('dept').filter(lambda g: g['salary'].mean() > 80)
print(result)
items.output:
dept   name  salary
2  Eng  Carol      90
3  Eng   Dave      85
4  Eng    Eve      95

desc.zh: 接收组 DataFrame/Series，返回 True/False 的函数
desc.en: Function that takes a group and returns True (keep) or False (drop)

desc.zh: 如果函数返回的不是布尔值，True 时丢弃该组
desc.en: If func does not return a boolean, drop the group when True

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的位置参数
desc.en: Positional arguments passed to func

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的关键字参数
desc.en: Keyword arguments passed to func

desc.zh: 通过 groupby 的 group_keys 参数控制
desc.en: Controlled via the groupby group_keys parameter

items.name: GroupBy.pipe()

desc.zh: 将 GroupBy 对象传入函数链，方便组合操作
desc.en: Pipe the GroupBy object into a function for chainable operations

items.output:
mean   std  count
dept                     
Eng    90.0   5.0      3
Sales  75.0   7.07     2

desc.zh: 第一个参数接收 GroupBy 对象的函数
desc.en: Function whose first argument is the GroupBy object

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的位置参数
desc.en: Positional arguments passed to func

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的关键字参数
desc.en: Keyword arguments passed to func

desc.zh: 可传入 (func, 'arg_name') 元组，将 GroupBy 对象作为指定参数传入
desc.en: Pass (func, 'arg_name') tuple to pipe GroupBy as a named argument

desc.zh: 可链式调用多个 pipe，如 .pipe(f1).pipe(f2)
desc.en: Can chain multiple pipes: .pipe(f1).pipe(f2)

items.name: pd.NamedAgg()

desc.zh: 命名聚合的辅助类，配合 groupby().agg() 使用
desc.en: Helper namedtuple for named aggregations in groupby().agg()

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'dept': ['Sales', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'Eng'],
    'salary': [70, 80, 90, 85],
    'bonus': [5, 8, 10, 7]
})

result = df.groupby('dept').agg(
    mean_sal=pd.NamedAgg(column='salary', aggfunc='mean'),
    total_bonus=pd.NamedAgg(column='bonus', aggfunc='sum'),
    min_sal=pd.NamedAgg(column='salary', aggfunc='min'),
    max_sal=pd.NamedAgg(column='salary', aggfunc='max')
)
print(result)
items.output:
mean_sal  total_bonus  min_sal  max_sal
dept                                          
Eng        87.5           17       85       90
Sales      75.0           13       70       80

desc.zh: 要聚合的列名
desc.en: Name of the column to aggregate

desc.zh: 聚合函数，如 'mean'、'sum'、'count' 或自定义函数
desc.en: Aggregation function: 'mean', 'sum', 'count', or a custom callable

desc.zh: 在 .agg() 中用关键字参数指定输出列名
desc.en: Use keyword argument name in .agg() to set output column name

desc.zh: 可以对同一列指定多个不同的聚合
desc.en: Can specify multiple different aggregations on the same column

desc.zh: 也可使用字典形式 .agg({'salary': 'mean', 'bonus': 'sum'})
desc.en: Alternatively use dict form: .agg({'salary': 'mean', 'bonus': 'sum'})

items.name: GroupBy.first() / last() / nth()

desc.zh: 取每组的第一个/最后一个/第 N 个值
desc.en: Get first/last/nth value per group

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'g': ['A','A','B','B','B'], 'v': [1,2,3,4,5]})
print(df.groupby('g').first())
print('---')
print(df.groupby('g').nth(1))
items.output:
v
g   
A  1
B  3
---
   v
g   
A  2
B  4

desc.zh: nth: 第几行（0-based），可传列表
desc.en: nth: row position (0-based), can pass list

items.name: GroupBy.cumcount() / ngroup()

desc.zh: 组内行号 / 组编号
desc.en: Row number within group / group number

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'g': ['A','A','B','B','B'], 'v': [1,2,3,4,5]})
df['row_in_group'] = df.groupby('g').cumcount()
df['group_id'] = df.groupby('g').ngroup()
print(df)
items.output:
g  v  row_in_group  group_id
0  A  1             0         0
1  A  2             1         0
2  B  3             0         1
3  B  4             1         1
4  B  5             2         1

desc.zh: True=从0开始递增
desc.en: True=ascending from 0

items.name: GroupBy.size() vs GroupBy.count()

desc.zh: size=每组总行数（含NaN），count=每列非NaN数
desc.en: size=total rows per group (incl NaN), count=non-NaN per column

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'g': ['A','A','B'], 'v': [1, np.nan, 3]})
print('size:', df.groupby('g').size().tolist())
print('count:')
print(df.groupby('g').count())
items.output:
size: [2, 1]
count:
   v
g   
A  1
B  1

items.name: pd.Grouper()

desc.zh: 灵活指定分组方式（按时间频率、按列等）
desc.en: Flexible grouping specification (by time freq, by column, etc.)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'date': pd.date_range('2024-01-01', periods=6, freq='M'),
    'sales': [100, 120, 90, 150, 130, 110]
})
# 按季度分组
print(df.groupby(pd.Grouper(key='date', freq='QE')).sum())

desc.zh: 要分组的列名
desc.en: Column to group by

desc.zh: 时间频率：'D'=日,'W'=周,'ME'=月末,'QE'=季末,'YE'=年末
desc.en: Time frequency: 'D'=day,'W'=week,'ME'=month end,'QE'=quarter end,'YE'=year end

items.name: GroupBy.rank() / shift() / diff() / pct_change()

desc.zh: 组内排名/移位/差分/变化率
desc.en: Within-group rank/shift/diff/pct_change

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'g': ['A','A','A','B','B','B'], 'v': [10,20,30,100,200,300]})
df['rank'] = df.groupby('g')['v'].rank()
df['prev'] = df.groupby('g')['v'].shift(1)
df['change'] = df.groupby('g')['v'].pct_change()
print(df)

desc.zh: rank: 'average'/'min'/'max'/'first'/'dense'
desc.en: rank: 'average'/'min'/'max'/'first'/'dense'

desc.zh: shift/diff/pct_change 的步长
desc.en: Number of periods for shift/diff/pct_change

items.name: GroupBy.rolling() / expanding()

desc.zh: 组内滚动/扩展窗口计算
desc.en: Within-group rolling/expanding window calculations

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'g': ['A','A','A','B','B','B'], 'v': [1,2,3,10,20,30]})
# 每组内的累积求和
df['cumsum'] = df.groupby('g')['v'].expanding().sum().reset_index(drop=True)
# 每组内的 2 期滚动均值
df['ma2'] = df.groupby('g')['v'].rolling(2).mean().reset_index(drop=True)
print(df)

desc.zh: rolling 窗口大小
desc.en: Rolling window size

title.zh: 命名聚合——清晰的输出列名
title.en: Named Aggregation for clear output columns

items.code:
df.groupby('dept').agg(
    avg_salary=pd.NamedAgg(column='salary', aggfunc='mean'),
    headcount=pd.NamedAgg(column='salary', aggfunc='count')
)

note.zh: 用 NamedAgg 代替字典嵌套，输出列名更直观，避免 MultiIndex 列
note.en: Use NamedAgg instead of nested dicts for cleaner output column names and no MultiIndex columns

title.zh: transform 广播组级计算到每行
title.en: Broadcast group-level calculation to each row via transform

items.code:
df['pct_of_dept'] = (
    df.groupby('dept')['salary']
    .transform(lambda x: x / x.sum())
)

note.zh: transform 返回与原 DataFrame 等长的 Series，适合做组内占比、标准化等
note.en: transform returns a Series aligned with the original DataFrame; ideal for within-group ratios and normalization

title.zh: 字典形式多列不同聚合

note.zh: 字典形式为不同列指定不同聚合函数，结果是 MultiIndex 列
note.en: Dict form applies different aggregations per column; result has MultiIndex columns

note.zh: 使用 apply + nlargest 实现分组内取前 N，group_keys=False 避免重复索引
note.en: Use apply + nlargest for top-N per group; group_keys=False avoids duplicate index levels

title.zh: 按函数分组（自定义分箱）

items.code:
# 方法1：lambda + 行索引
df.groupby(lambda i: '高薪' if df.loc[i, 'salary'] > 80 else '普通')['name'].count()

# 方法2：pd.cut 分箱后分组（更推荐）
bins = pd.cut(df['salary'], bins=[0, 60, 80, 100], labels=['低', '中', '高'])
df.groupby(bins)['name'].count()

# 方法3：np.where 二分组
df.groupby(np.where(df['age'] > 30, '资深', '新人'))['salary'].mean()

note.zh: pd.cut 分箱比 lambda 更清晰高效；np.where 适合二分类
note.en: pd.cut is cleaner than lambda; np.where for binary grouping

items.code:
# 用字典将列值映射为分组键
region_map = {'Beijing': '北方', 'Shanghai': '东部', 'Guangzhou': '南方', 'Shenzhen': '南方'}
df.groupby(df['city'].map(region_map))['sales'].sum()

# 用 Series 分组（长度须与 DataFrame 行数一致）
team = pd.Series(['A', 'A', 'B', 'B', 'A'], index=df.index)
df.groupby(team)['score'].mean()

# 按列的某个属性分组
df.groupby(df['date'].dt.quarter)['revenue'].sum()  # 按季度分组

note.zh: map 字典适合类别映射；Series 适合外部分组标签；dt/str 访问器适合按属性分组
note.en: dict for category mapping; Series for external labels; dt/str accessor for attribute grouping

items.code:
# 列名 + 函数 + Series 可以混合
df.groupby([
    'department',                        # 按列名
    pd.cut(df['age'], bins=3),           # 按分箱
    df['hire_date'].dt.year              # 按年份
])['salary'].mean()

note.zh: groupby 的 by 参数接受列表，列表元素可以是列名、Series、函数的任意组合
note.en: by parameter accepts a list mixing column names, Series, and functions

title.zh: as_index=True 导致分组键变成索引而非列
title.en: as_index=True makes group keys the index instead of columns

wrong.code:
result = df.groupby('dept')['salary'].mean()
# result 是 Series，dept 在索引中
result['dept']  # KeyError!

note.zh: 默认 as_index=True，分组键成为索引，无法直接当列访问
note.en: Default as_index=True puts group keys in the index, not accessible as a column

right.code:
result = df.groupby('dept', as_index=False)['salary'].mean()
# result 是 DataFrame，dept 是普通列
print(result['dept'])

note.zh: 设置 as_index=False 让分组键保留为普通列，便于后续操作
note.en: Set as_index=False to keep group keys as regular columns for easier downstream use

title.zh: transform 与 apply 的返回形状不同
title.en: transform vs apply return different shapes

wrong.code:
# 想给每行加上组均值列，却用了 apply
df['dept_mean'] = df.groupby('dept')['salary'].apply('mean')
# ValueError: 形状不匹配

note.zh: apply 返回的是压缩后的分组结果（每组一行），长度与原 DataFrame 不同
note.en: apply returns a reduced result (one row per group), mismatching the original DataFrame length

right.code:
# 用 transform 广播组级结果到每行
df['dept_mean'] = df.groupby('dept')['salary'].transform('mean')

note.zh: transform 保证返回与输入同长度的结果，可直接赋值为新列
note.en: transform guarantees same-length output, safe to assign as a new column

title.zh: 聚合时 NaN 被默认跳过
title.en: NaN values silently skipped in aggregations

wrong.code:
import numpy as np
df = pd.DataFrame({'g': ['a','a','b'], 'v': [1, np.nan, 3]})
result = df.groupby('g')['v'].sum()
# g=a 的 sum 是 1.0 而非 NaN，可能不符合预期

note.zh: pandas 聚合函数默认 skipna=True，NaN 会被静默忽略
note.en: Pandas aggregation functions default to skipna=True, silently ignoring NaN

right.code:
# 方法1: 使用 min_count 要求最少非 NaN 个数
result = df.groupby('g')['v'].sum(min_count=2)

# 方法2: 自定义函数显式处理
result = df.groupby('g')['v'].agg(lambda x: x.sum() if x.notna().all() else np.nan)

note.zh: 使用 min_count 参数或自定义函数来显式控制 NaN 行为
note.en: Use min_count parameter or a custom function to explicitly control NaN behavior

items.name: df.pivot_table()

desc.zh: 创建电子表格风格的透视表，支持聚合
desc.en: Create a spreadsheet-style pivot table with aggregation

items.signature: df.pivot_table(values=None, index=None, columns=None, aggfunc='mean', fill_value=None, margins=False, margins_name='All', observed=no_default, sort=True)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'date': ['Mon','Mon','Tue','Tue','Mon','Tue'],
    'city': ['BJ','SH','BJ','SH','BJ','SH'],
    'sales': [100, 200, 150, 250, 120, 180]
})

result = df.pivot_table(
    values='sales',
    index='date',
    columns='city',
    aggfunc='sum',
    fill_value=0,
    margins=True
)
print(result)
items.output:
city   BJ   SH   All
date                 
Mon   220  200   420
Tue   150  430   580
All   370  630  1000

desc.zh: 要聚合的列；若为 None 则聚合所有数值列
desc.en: Column(s) to aggregate; if None, aggregates all numeric columns

desc.zh: 透视表的行分组键
desc.en: Keys to group by on the pivot table rows

desc.zh: 透视表的列分组键
desc.en: Keys to group by on the pivot table columns

desc.zh: 聚合函数，如 'sum'、'mean'、'count' 或自定义函数
desc.en: Aggregation function: 'sum', 'mean', 'count', list, dict, or callable

desc.zh: 用于替换缺失值的标量
desc.en: Value to replace missing values with in the result

desc.zh: 是否添加行/列合计
desc.en: Whether to add row/column subtotals

desc.zh: 合计行/列的标签名称
desc.en: Label name for the margins row/column

desc.zh: 对 Categorical 列，是否只显示观察到的值
desc.en: For Categorical columns, only show observed values

desc.zh: 是否对结果排序
desc.en: Whether to sort the result

items.name: df.pivot()

desc.zh: 将长表转为宽表（不聚合，要求无重复）
desc.en: Reshape long to wide format without aggregation (requires unique entries)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'date': ['Mon', 'Mon', 'Tue', 'Tue'],
    'metric': ['clicks', 'views', 'clicks', 'views'],
    'value': [10, 100, 15, 120]
})

result = df.pivot(index='date', columns='metric', values='value')
print(result)
items.output:
metric  clicks  views
date                 
Mon         10    100
Tue         15    120

desc.zh: 用作新列名的列
desc.en: Column(s) whose unique values become new column headers

desc.zh: 用作新行索引的列；不指定则使用现有索引
desc.en: Column(s) to use as new row index; uses existing index if not specified

desc.zh: 用作新表值的列；不指定则使用所有剩余列
desc.en: Column(s) to fill the values; uses all remaining columns if not specified

desc.zh: index + columns 组合必须唯一，否则抛出 ValueError
desc.en: Combination of index + columns must be unique; raises ValueError otherwise

desc.zh: 如果存在重复需要聚合，改用 pivot_table
desc.en: Use pivot_table instead if duplicates exist and aggregation is needed

items.name: pd.melt()

desc.zh: 将宽表转为长表（逆透视）
desc.en: Unpivot wide format to long format

items.signature: pd.melt(frame, id_vars=None, value_vars=None, var_name=None, value_name='value', col_level=None, ignore_index=True)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob'],
    'math': [90, 85],
    'english': [88, 92],
    'science': [95, 78]
})

result = pd.melt(
    df,
    id_vars='name',
    value_vars=['math', 'english', 'science'],
    var_name='subject',
    value_name='score'
)
print(result)
items.output:
name  subject  score
0  Alice     math     90
1    Bob     math     85
2  Alice  english     88
3    Bob  english     92
4  Alice  science     95
5    Bob  science     78

desc.zh: 要融合的 DataFrame
desc.en: The DataFrame to melt

desc.zh: 保持不变的标识列
desc.en: Column(s) to use as identifier variables (kept as-is)

desc.zh: 要融合的列；None 时使用除 id_vars 外的所有列
desc.en: Column(s) to unpivot; if None, uses all columns not in id_vars

desc.zh: 融合后变量列的列名；默认为 'variable'
desc.en: Name for the variable column; defaults to 'variable'

desc.zh: 融合后值列的列名
desc.en: Name for the value column

desc.zh: MultiIndex 列时使用哪一级别
desc.en: Which level of MultiIndex columns to melt

desc.zh: True 时重置索引为 0..n-1
desc.en: If True, reset the index to 0..n-1

items.name: df.stack()

desc.zh: 将列级别堆叠为行级别（宽转长）
desc.en: Stack column level(s) into row index level(s)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(
    {'math': [90, 85], 'english': [88, 92]},
    index=['Alice', 'Bob']
)

result = df.stack()
print(result)
items.output:
Alice  math       90
       english    88
Bob    math       85
       english    92
dtype: int64

desc.zh: 要堆叠的列的级别（默认最内层）
desc.en: Column level(s) to stack (default: innermost)

desc.zh: 是否丢弃结果中全为 NaN 的行
desc.en: Whether to drop rows with all NaN values in the result

desc.zh: 是否对新的行索引级别排序
desc.en: Whether to sort the new index level

desc.zh: 是否使用新的实现方式（pandas 2.1+ 推荐）
desc.en: Whether to use the new implementation (recommended in pandas 2.1+)

desc.zh: stack 的逆操作是 unstack
desc.en: The inverse of stack is unstack

items.name: df.unstack()

desc.zh: 将行级别展开为列级别（长转宽）
desc.en: Unstack row index level(s) into column level(s)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

index = pd.MultiIndex.from_tuples(
    [('Alice','math'), ('Alice','english'),
     ('Bob','math'), ('Bob','english')],
    names=['student','subject']
)
s = pd.Series([90, 88, 85, 92], index=index, name='score')

result = s.unstack(level='subject')
print(result)
items.output:
subject  english  math
student                
Alice         88    90
Bob           92    85

desc.zh: 要展开的行索引级别（默认最内层）
desc.en: Row index level(s) to unstack (default: innermost)

desc.zh: 用于填充缺失组合的值
desc.en: Value to fill for missing combinations

desc.zh: 是否对结果中的级别排序
desc.en: Whether to sort the levels in the result

desc.zh: 需要行索引是 MultiIndex 才能展开
desc.en: Requires a MultiIndex on the rows to unstack

desc.zh: unstack 的逆操作是 stack
desc.en: The inverse of unstack is stack

items.name: pd.crosstab()

desc.zh: 交叉频率表（pivot_table 的快捷方式）
desc.en: Cross-tabulation (shortcut for pivot_table on frequencies)

items.signature: pd.crosstab(index, columns, values=None, aggfunc=None, margins=False, normalize=False)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'gender': ['M','F','M','F','M'], 'dept': ['Eng','HR','Eng','Eng','HR']})
print(pd.crosstab(df['gender'], df['dept']))
print('---')
print(pd.crosstab(df['gender'], df['dept'], normalize='index'))
items.output:
dept    Eng  HR
gender
F         1   1
M         2   1
---
dept      Eng   HR
gender
F         0.5  0.5
M         0.67 0.33

desc.zh: 行分组的数据
desc.en: Data for row grouping

desc.zh: 列分组的数据
desc.en: Data for column grouping

desc.zh: True/'index'/'columns'/'all' 归一化为比例
desc.en: True/'index'/'columns'/'all' for proportions

desc.zh: True=添加行列合计
desc.en: True=add row/column totals

items.name: Series.explode() / df.explode()

desc.zh: 将列表元素展开为多行
desc.en: Explode list-like elements into separate rows

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'name': ['Alice', 'Bob'], 'skills': [['Python','SQL'], ['Java','Go','Rust']]})
print(df.explode('skills', ignore_index=True))
items.output:
name  skills
0  Alice  Python
1  Alice     SQL
2    Bob    Java
3    Bob      Go
4    Bob    Rust

desc.zh: 要展开的列名
desc.en: Column(s) to explode

desc.zh: True=重新编号索引
desc.en: True=reset index after exploding

items.name: pd.get_dummies()

desc.zh: 独热编码：将分类列展开为 0/1 列
desc.en: One-hot encoding: expand categorical column into 0/1 columns

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'color': ['red', 'blue', 'red', 'green'], 'size': [1, 2, 3, 1]})
print(pd.get_dummies(df, columns=['color'], drop_first=True))
items.output:
size  color_green  color_red
0     1        False       True
1     2        False      False
2     3        False       True
3     1         True      False

desc.zh: 要编码的列，None=所有 object/category 列
desc.en: Columns to encode, None=all object/category

desc.zh: 新列名前缀
desc.en: Prefix for new column names

desc.zh: True=删除第一个类别（避免多重共线性）
desc.en: True=drop first category (avoid multicollinearity)

desc.zh: 输出类型，bool 更省内存
desc.en: Output dtype, bool saves memory

items.name: pd.factorize()

desc.zh: 将值编码为整数 + 唯一值数组
desc.en: Encode values as integers + unique values array

items.example:
import pandas as pd

codes, uniques = pd.factorize(['cat', 'dog', 'cat', 'bird', 'dog'])
print(f'codes: {codes}')
print(f'uniques: {uniques}')
items.output:
codes: [0 1 0 2 1]
uniques: ['cat' 'dog' 'bird']

desc.zh: 要编码的值
desc.en: Values to encode

desc.zh: True=按值排序编码
desc.en: True=sort unique values before encoding

items.name: pd.wide_to_long()

desc.zh: 宽表转长表（按列名前缀+数字后缀拆分）
desc.en: Wide to long format (split columns by prefix + numeric suffix)

items.signature: pd.wide_to_long(df, stubnames, i, j, sep='', suffix='\d+')
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'id': [1, 2],
    'score_2022': [80, 90],
    'score_2023': [85, 95],
    'rank_2022': [3, 1],
    'rank_2023': [2, 1]
})
result = pd.wide_to_long(df, stubnames=['score', 'rank'], i='id', j='year', sep='_')
print(result.reset_index())

desc.zh: 列名前缀列表，如 ['score', 'rank']
desc.en: Column name prefixes, e.g. ['score', 'rank']

desc.zh: 行标识列（不参与转换）
desc.en: ID column(s) (not transformed)

desc.zh: 新列名，存放后缀值（如年份）
desc.en: New column name for suffix values (e.g. year)

desc.zh: 前缀和后缀之间的分隔符
desc.en: Separator between prefix and suffix

desc.zh: 后缀的正则匹配模式
desc.en: Regex pattern for suffix matching

items.name: pd.from_dummies()

desc.zh: 将独热编码还原为分类列（get_dummies 的逆操作）
desc.en: Convert one-hot encoded columns back to categorical (inverse of get_dummies)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

# 先用 get_dummies 编码
df = pd.DataFrame({'color': ['red', 'blue', 'green', 'red']})
dummies = pd.get_dummies(df['color'])
print('独热编码:')
print(dummies)

# 用 from_dummies 还原
original = pd.from_dummies(dummies)
print('\n还原:')
print(original)
items.output:
独热编码:
    blue  green   red
0  False  False  True
1   True  False  False
2  False   True  False
3  False  False  True

还原:
  0
0  red
1  blue
2  green
3  red

desc.zh: 独热编码的 DataFrame
desc.en: One-hot encoded DataFrame

desc.zh: 列名中前缀和类别的分隔符（如 get_dummies 用了 prefix_sep）
desc.en: Separator in column names between prefix and category

desc.zh: 全为 0 时的默认类别
desc.en: Default category when all values are 0

items.code:
df.pivot_table(
    values='sales', index='region', columns='product',
    aggfunc='sum', margins=True, margins_name='Total'
)

note.zh: margins=True 自动添加行列合计行，margins_name 可自定义标签
note.en: margins=True adds automatic row/column totals; margins_name customizes the label

items.code:
# 宽表: 每个科目一列
# 长表: subject 和 score 两列
pd.melt(wide_df, id_vars=['student'],
        var_name='subject', value_name='score')

note.zh: melt 是 pivot 的逆操作；显式指定 id_vars 避免意外融合标识列
note.en: melt is the inverse of pivot; always specify id_vars explicitly to avoid melting identifier columns

items.code:
pd.crosstab(
    df['gender'], df['department'],
    values=df['salary'], aggfunc='mean',
    margins=True
)

note.zh: crosstab 是 pivot_table 的便捷包装，直接传入 Series 而非列名
note.en: crosstab is a convenience wrapper around pivot_table; pass Series directly instead of column names

title.zh: pivot 遇到重复值会报错
title.en: pivot raises ValueError on duplicate entries

wrong.code:
df = pd.DataFrame({
    'date': ['Mon', 'Mon', 'Mon'],
    'city': ['BJ', 'BJ', 'SH'],
    'sales': [100, 120, 200]
})
df.pivot(index='date', columns='city', values='sales')
# ValueError: Index contains duplicate entries, cannot reshape

note.zh: pivot 要求 index+columns 组合唯一，有重复会报错
note.en: pivot requires unique index+columns combinations; duplicates cause ValueError

right.code:
# 有重复时改用 pivot_table，它会自动聚合
df.pivot_table(index='date', columns='city',
               values='sales', aggfunc='sum')

note.zh: pivot_table 支持聚合，可以处理重复的 index+columns 组合
note.en: pivot_table supports aggregation and handles duplicate index+columns combinations

title.zh: melt 不指定 id_vars 导致标识列也被融合
title.en: Forgetting id_vars in melt melts identifier columns too

wrong.code:
df = pd.DataFrame({'name': ['A','B'], 'q1': [10,20], 'q2': [30,40]})
pd.melt(df)  # name 列也被融合了！
# variable  value
#     name      A
#     name      B
#       q1     10
#       ...

note.zh: 不指定 id_vars 时，所有列都会被融合，包括标识列
note.en: Without id_vars, all columns are melted including identifiers

right.code:
pd.melt(df, id_vars='name', var_name='quarter', value_name='amount')
#   name quarter  amount
# 0    A      q1      10
# 1    B      q1      20
# 2    A      q2      30
# 3    B      q2      40

note.zh: 始终显式指定 id_vars 保留标识列
note.en: Always explicitly specify id_vars to preserve identifier columns

items.name: df.rolling()

desc.zh: 滚动窗口计算（移动平均、移动标准差等）
desc.en: Rolling window calculations (moving average, moving std, etc.)

items.signature: df.rolling(window, min_periods=None, center=False, win_type=None, on=None, closed=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'date': pd.date_range('2024-01-01', periods=7),
                   'sales': [100, 120, 90, 150, 130, 110, 140]})
df = df.set_index('date')

# 3日移动平均
df['ma_3'] = df['sales'].rolling(window=3).mean()
# 3日移动标准差
df['std_3'] = df['sales'].rolling(window=3).std()
print(df)

desc.zh: 窗口大小，可以是行数或时间段
desc.en: Window size, number of rows or time offset

desc.zh: 窗口内最少需要的非 NaN 值数，默认等于 window
desc.en: Min non-NaN values needed, defaults to window size

desc.zh: True=窗口以当前行为中心，False=窗口在当前行结束
desc.en: True=center window on current row, False=window ends at current row

desc.zh: 窗口类型：'gaussian'/'triang'/'blackman' 等加权窗口
desc.en: Window type: 'gaussian'/'triang'/'blackman' etc. for weighted windows

desc.zh: 用指定的日期列做时间窗口（而非用索引）
desc.en: Use specified datetime column for window (instead of index)

desc.zh: 窗口边界：'right'/'left'/'both'/'neither'
desc.en: Window boundary: 'right'/'left'/'both'/'neither'

items.name: df.expanding()

desc.zh: 扩展窗口：从第一行开始累积计算
desc.en: Expanding window: cumulative calculation from first row

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([10, 20, 30, 40, 50])

# 累积均值
print(s.expanding().mean())
# 累积最大值
print(s.expanding().max())

desc.zh: 最少需要的非 NaN 值数
desc.en: Min non-NaN values needed

items.name: df.ewm()

desc.zh: 指数加权移动窗口：近期数据权重更大
desc.en: Exponentially weighted moving window: more weight on recent data

items.signature: df.ewm(com=None, span=None, halflife=None, alpha=None, min_periods=0, adjust=True)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([100, 120, 90, 150, 130])

# span=3 的指数加权移动平均
print(s.ewm(span=3).mean())

desc.zh: 衰减跨度，alpha = 2/(span+1)，最常用
desc.en: Decay span, alpha = 2/(span+1), most commonly used

desc.zh: 衰减中心质量，alpha = 1/(1+com)
desc.en: Center of mass decay, alpha = 1/(1+com)

desc.zh: 半衰期，权重衰减到一半的周期
desc.en: Half-life, period for weight to decay to half

desc.zh: 平滑因子，0 < alpha ≤ 1，直接指定
desc.en: Smoothing factor, 0 < alpha ≤ 1, specify directly

desc.zh: True=除以衰减调整因子（初始偏差校正）
desc.en: True=divide by decaying adjustment factor (bias correction)

items.name: cumsum() / cumprod() / cummax() / cummin()

desc.zh: 累积运算：累积求和/乘积/最大/最小值
desc.en: Cumulative operations: sum/product/max/min

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 2, 3, 4], 'B': [10, 20, 30, 40]})
print(df.cumsum())
print('---')
print(df.cumprod())

desc.zh: 0=沿行方向累积，1=沿列方向累积
desc.en: 0=accumulate along rows, 1=along columns

desc.zh: 是否跳过 NaN，False 则遇到 NaN 后续全为 NaN
desc.en: Skip NaN; if False, all values after NaN become NaN

items.name: df.shift()

desc.zh: 将数据沿轴移动指定步数（用于计算环比/同比）
desc.en: Shift data by specified periods (for period-over-period calculations)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([100, 120, 90, 150])

# 环比变化
print(s - s.shift(1))
# 环比增长率
print(s.pct_change())

desc.zh: 移动步数，正数向下移，负数向上移
desc.en: Number of periods to shift, positive=down, negative=up

desc.zh: 用于时间索引的频率偏移
desc.en: Frequency offset for datetime index

desc.zh: 移动后空位的填充值（默认 NaN）
desc.en: Fill value for newly introduced positions (default NaN)

title.zh: 滚动窗口 + 自定义聚合

items.code:
# 自定义滚动计算
df['volatility'] = df['price'].rolling(20).apply(lambda x: x.std() / x.mean())

# 滚动窗口同时计算多个指标
df[['ma_5', 'ma_20']] = df['close'].rolling(5).mean().to_frame('ma_5').join(
    df['close'].rolling(20).mean().rename('ma_20'))

note.zh: rolling().apply() 支持任意函数，但比内置聚合慢很多
note.en: rolling().apply() supports any function but much slower than built-in aggregations

title.zh: 时间窗口（而非行数窗口）

items.code:
# 以时间为窗口（需要 DatetimeIndex）
df = df.set_index('date')
df['ma_7d'] = df['sales'].rolling('7D').mean()  # 7天窗口
df['ma_30d'] = df['sales'].rolling('30D').sum()  # 30天累积

note.zh: 传入字符串如 '7D' 表示时间窗口，自动处理缺失日期
note.en: Pass string like '7D' for time window, handles missing dates automatically

items.code:
# 环比增长率（等价写法）
df['growth'] = df['revenue'].pct_change()  # 简写
df['growth'] = (df['revenue'] - df['revenue'].shift(1)) / df['revenue'].shift(1)  # 手写

# 同比（去年同期对比）
df['yoy'] = df['revenue'].pct_change(periods=12)  # 12个周期前

note.zh: pct_change(n) 等价于 (x - x.shift(n)) / x.shift(n)
note.en: pct_change(n) equals (x - x.shift(n)) / x.shift(n)

title.zh: rolling 默认前 N-1 行是 NaN
title.en: rolling defaults to NaN for first N-1 rows

wrong.code:
df['ma'] = df['price'].rolling(7).mean()
# 前 6 行都是 NaN！数据丢失严重

note.zh: window=7 需要 7 个值才能计算，前 6 个不够
note.en: window=7 needs 7 values to compute, first 6 are insufficient

right.code:
# 方案1：允许更少的数据点
df['ma'] = df['price'].rolling(7, min_periods=1).mean()

# 方案2：用 expanding 代替初始阶段
df['ma'] = df['price'].expanding(min_periods=1).mean()

note.zh: min_periods=1 允许不满窗口也计算
note.en: min_periods=1 allows computation with fewer values

title.zh: ewm 的 span/com/halflife/alpha 只能选一个
title.en: ewm: only one of span/com/halflife/alpha allowed

wrong.code:
df.ewm(span=10, alpha=0.5).mean()
# ValueError: 只能指定 com/span/halflife/alpha 中的一个

note.zh: 四个参数是同一个衰减因子的不同表达方式
note.en: Four params are different ways to express the same decay factor

right.code:
# 用 span（最直观）
df.ewm(span=10).mean()  # alpha = 2/(10+1) ≈ 0.182

# 或直接用 alpha
df.ewm(alpha=0.2).mean()

note.zh: 推荐用 span，最直观：span 越大越平滑
note.en: Recommend span, most intuitive: larger span = smoother

items.name: df.merge()

desc.zh: SQL 风格的表连接（内/左/右/外连接）
desc.en: SQL-style join between two DataFrames

items.signature: df.merge(right, how='inner', on=None, left_on=None, right_on=None, left_index=False, right_index=False, sort=False, suffixes=('_x', '_y'), indicator=False, validate=None)
items.output:
order_id  customer_id  amount   name      _merge
0         1          101      50  Alice  both      
1         2          102      75    Bob  both      
2         3          103      60    NaN  left_only 
3         4          104      90    NaN  left_only

desc.zh: 要合并的右侧 DataFrame
desc.en: Right DataFrame to merge with

desc.zh: 连接类型：'inner'、'left'、'right'、'outer'、'cross'
desc.en: Join type: 'inner', 'left', 'right', 'outer', 'cross'

desc.zh: 两表共有的连接键列名
desc.en: Column name(s) common to both DataFrames to join on

desc.zh: 左表的连接键（当左右列名不同时使用）
desc.en: Left DataFrame join key(s) when column names differ

desc.zh: 右表的连接键
desc.en: Right DataFrame join key(s) when column names differ

desc.zh: 是否用左表索引作为连接键
desc.en: Whether to use the left DataFrame index as join key

desc.zh: 是否用右表索引作为连接键
desc.en: Whether to use the right DataFrame index as join key

desc.zh: 重名列的后缀
desc.en: Suffixes for overlapping column names

desc.zh: True 时添加 _merge 列标明每行来源
desc.en: If True, adds _merge column showing each row's source
Validate merge type: '1:1', '1:m', 'm:1', 'm:m'

desc.zh: 是否按连接键排序结果
desc.en: Whether to sort the result by join keys

items.name: pd.concat()

desc.zh: 沿轴方向拼接多个 DataFrame/Series
desc.en: Concatenate pandas objects along an axis

items.signature: pd.concat(objs, *, axis=0, join='outer', ignore_index=False, keys=None, levels=None, names=None, verify_integrity=False, sort=False, copy=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df1 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 2], 'B': [3, 4]})
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [5, 6], 'B': [7, 8]})
df3 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [9], 'B': [10]})

result = pd.concat(
    [df1, df2, df3],
    keys=['batch1', 'batch2', 'batch3'],
    ignore_index=False
)
print(result)
items.output:
A   B
batch1 0      1   3
       1      2   4
batch2 0      5   7
       1      6   8
batch3 0      9  10

desc.zh: 要拼接的 DataFrame 或 Series 列表
desc.en: List of DataFrames or Series to concatenate

desc.zh: 拼接方向：0 为纵向（行），1 为横向（列）
desc.en: Concatenation axis: 0 for rows, 1 for columns

desc.zh: 另一轴的处理方式：'outer'（并集）或 'inner'（交集）
desc.en: How to handle other axis: 'outer' (union) or 'inner' (intersection)

desc.zh: True 时重新生成 0..n-1 的索引
desc.en: If True, reset the index to 0..n-1

desc.zh: 为每个片段添加层级键，构建 MultiIndex
desc.en: Hierarchical keys for each piece, creating a MultiIndex

desc.zh: True 时检查拼接后索引是否有重复
desc.en: If True, check for duplicate index values after concatenation

desc.zh: 当 join='outer' 时是否对另一轴排序
desc.en: Whether to sort the other axis when join='outer'

items.name: df.join()

desc.zh: 基于索引的快捷连接方法
desc.en: Convenient index-based join method

items.signature: df.join(other, on=None, how='left', lsuffix='', rsuffix='', sort=False, validate=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df1 = pd.DataFrame(
    {'salary': [70, 80, 90]},
    index=['Alice', 'Bob', 'Carol']
)
df2 = pd.DataFrame(
    {'dept': ['Eng', 'Sales']},
    index=['Alice', 'Bob']
)

result = df1.join(df2, how='left')
print(result)
items.output:
salary   dept
Alice      70    Eng
Bob        80  Sales
Carol      90    NaN

desc.zh: 要连接的另一个 DataFrame（基于索引）
desc.en: Other DataFrame to join (index-based)

desc.zh: 调用方的列名作为连接键（与 other 的索引对齐）
desc.en: Caller column(s) to join on (aligned with other's index)

desc.zh: 连接类型：'left'、'right'、'outer'、'inner'、'cross'
desc.en: Join type: 'left', 'right', 'outer', 'inner', 'cross'

desc.zh: 左表重名列的后缀
desc.en: Suffix for overlapping column names from left

desc.zh: 右表重名列的后缀
desc.en: Suffix for overlapping column names from right

desc.zh: 是否按连接键排序
desc.en: Whether to sort the result by join keys
Validate join type: '1:1', '1:m', 'm:1', 'm:m'

items.name: df.combine_first()

desc.zh: 用另一个 DataFrame 填充自身的 NaN 值
desc.en: Fill NaN values in caller with values from another DataFrame

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df1 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, np.nan, 3], 'B': [np.nan, 5, 6]})
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [10, 20, 30], 'B': [40, 50, 60]})

result = df1.combine_first(df2)
print(result)

desc.zh: 用来填充 NaN 的 DataFrame
desc.en: DataFrame to use for filling NaN values

desc.zh: 按索引和列对齐后再填充
desc.en: Aligns on both index and columns before filling

desc.zh: self 的非 NaN 值优先保留
desc.en: Non-NaN values from self take priority

desc.zh: 结果包含两个 DataFrame 所有行和列的并集
desc.en: Result includes the union of all rows and columns from both DataFrames

desc.zh: 结果的 dtype 可能因 NaN 填充而提升（如 int→float）
desc.en: Result dtype may be upcast (e.g., int to float) due to NaN handling

items.name: df.update()

desc.zh: 用另一个 DataFrame 的非 NaN 值原地更新自身
desc.en: Modify in place using non-NaN values from another DataFrame

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 2, 3], 'B': [400, 500, 600]})
new_data = pd.DataFrame({'A': [10, np.nan, 30]})

df.update(new_data)
print(df)

desc.zh: 包含更新值的 DataFrame
desc.en: DataFrame with updated values

desc.zh: 只更新 self 中已有的列（'left'）
desc.en: Only update columns present in self ('left')

desc.zh: True 时用 other 的非 NaN 值覆盖 self；False 时只填充 self 中的 NaN
desc.en: If True, overwrite with non-NaN from other; if False, only fill NaN in self

desc.zh: 对每个元素返回 True/False 决定是否更新
desc.en: Function returning True/False per element to decide whether to update

desc.zh: 'raise' 时若 self 和 other 在相同位置都有非 NaN 值则报错
desc.en: 'raise' to error when both self and other have non-NaN at the same location

items.name: pd.merge_asof()

desc.zh: 按最近键值进行近似合并（常用于时间序列）
desc.en: Merge by nearest key match (commonly used for time series)

items.signature: pd.merge_asof(left, right, on=None, left_on=None, right_on=None, left_index=False, right_index=False, by=None, left_by=None, right_by=None, suffixes=('_x', '_y'), tolerance=None, allow_exact_matches=True, direction='backward')

desc.zh: 左侧 DataFrame
desc.en: Left DataFrame

desc.zh: 右侧 DataFrame
desc.en: Right DataFrame

desc.zh: 用于近似匹配的有序键列名（必须已排序）
desc.en: Ordered key column for approximate matching (must be sorted)

desc.zh: 精确匹配的分组键（如 ticker）
desc.en: Exact-match group key(s) (e.g., ticker)

desc.zh: 允许的最大匹配距离
desc.en: Maximum allowed distance for matching

desc.zh: 搜索方向：'backward'、'forward'、'nearest'
desc.en: Search direction: 'backward', 'forward', 'nearest'

desc.zh: 是否允许精确匹配
desc.en: Whether to allow exact matches

desc.zh: 重名列的后缀
desc.en: Suffixes for overlapping column names

items.name: pd.merge_ordered()

desc.zh: 有序合并（适合时间序列，自动填充缺失）
desc.en: Ordered merge (for time series, with fill methods)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df1 = pd.DataFrame({'date': ['2024-01', '2024-03'], 'A': [1, 3]})
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'date': ['2024-01', '2024-02', '2024-03'], 'B': [10, 20, 30]})
print(pd.merge_ordered(df1, df2, on='date', fill_method='ffill'))

desc.zh: 合并键
desc.en: Join key(s)

desc.zh: 'ffill'=向前填充缺失值
desc.en: 'ffill'=forward fill missing values

title.zh: 左连接保留所有左表记录
title.en: Left join to keep all left-side records

items.code:
result = orders.merge(customers, on='customer_id', how='left')
# 所有订单都保留，缺失客户信息填 NaN

note.zh: how='left' 保留左表全部行，右表无匹配时填 NaN；最常用的连接方式
note.en: how='left' keeps all left rows, fills NaN for unmatched right rows; most common join type

title.zh: concat + keys 标记数据来源
title.en: concat with keys to label data sources

items.code:
combined = pd.concat(
    [df_2023, df_2024, df_2025],
    keys=['2023', '2024', '2025'],
    names=['year', 'idx']
)

note.zh: keys 参数为每个片段创建 MultiIndex 级别，方便溯源和分组
note.en: keys parameter creates a MultiIndex level for each piece, enabling easy filtering by source

title.zh: indicator 检查合并匹配情况
title.en: Use indicator to inspect merge matches

items.code:
merged = df1.merge(df2, on='id', how='outer', indicator=True)
print(merged['_merge'].value_counts())
# both          8
# left_only     2
# right_only    1

note.zh: indicator=True 添加 _merge 列，清晰展示每行匹配来源，便于数据质量检查
note.en: indicator=True adds _merge column showing match source; great for data quality checks

title.zh: merge_asof 时间序列近似合并
title.en: merge_asof for time series approximate joins

items.code:
pd.merge_asof(
    trades, quotes,
    on='timestamp', by='symbol',
    tolerance=pd.Timedelta('2s'),
    direction='backward'
)

note.zh: merge_asof 按时间戳找最近的匹配，tolerance 限制最大距离，常用于金融数据
note.en: merge_asof finds nearest timestamp match; tolerance limits max distance; widely used in finance

title.zh: 多对多合并导致行数爆炸

wrong.code:
# 两表在连接键上都有重复
df1 = pd.DataFrame({'key': ['a','a'], 'v1': [1,2]})
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'key': ['a','a'], 'v2': [3,4]})
result = df1.merge(df2, on='key')
# 结果: 2×2 = 4 行！

note.zh: 多对多连接产生笛卡尔积，行数 = 左重复 × 右重复，可能导致内存溢出
note.en: Many-to-many join creates a Cartesian product; rows = left_dups x right_dups, may cause OOM

right.code:
# 使用 validate 参数提前检查
result = df1.merge(df2, on='key', validate='1:1')
# MergeError: 检测到多对多关系

# 或先去重再合并
df2_dedup = df2.drop_duplicates('key')
result = df1.merge(df2_dedup, on='key')

note.zh: 用 validate='1:1' 或 '1:m' 在合并前检查，避免意外的行数膨胀
note.en: Use validate='1:1' or '1:m' to check before merging; prevents unexpected row explosion

wrong.code:
df1 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1]}, index=[0])
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'A': [2]}, index=[0])
result = pd.concat([df1, df2])
# 索引 [0, 0] 重复，后续 .loc[0] 返回多行

note.zh: 默认保留原索引，拼接后可能出现重复索引，导致定位困难
note.en: Default preserves original index; concat may produce duplicates, making .loc unpredictable

right.code:
result = pd.concat([df1, df2], ignore_index=True)
# 索引变为 [0, 1]，保证唯一

# 或者用 verify_integrity 检查
result = pd.concat([df1, df2], verify_integrity=True)
# ValueError: Indexes have overlapping values

note.zh: 使用 ignore_index=True 重建唯一索引，或 verify_integrity=True 提前发现重复
note.en: Use ignore_index=True for unique index, or verify_integrity=True to catch duplicates early

title.zh: 合并时重名列自动加后缀引发混乱
title.en: Automatic suffix on overlapping columns causes confusion

wrong.code:
df1 = pd.DataFrame({'id': [1], 'value': [10]})
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'id': [1], 'value': [20]})
result = df1.merge(df2, on='id')
# 列: id, value_x, value_y  —— 意义不明！

note.zh: 默认后缀 _x, _y 缺乏语义，容易在后续代码中引起混乱
note.en: Default _x, _y suffixes lack meaning and cause confusion in downstream code

right.code:
result = df1.merge(
    df2, on='id',
    suffixes=('_orders', '_returns')
)
# 列: id, value_orders, value_returns —— 清晰明了

note.zh: 始终指定有意义的 suffixes，让重名列语义清晰
note.en: Always specify meaningful suffixes so overlapping columns have clear semantics

items.name: df.set_index([col1, col2])

desc.zh: 设置多列为层级索引
desc.en: Set multiple columns as hierarchical index

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'dept': ['Eng','Eng','Sales','Sales'],
                   'name': ['Alice','Bob','Charlie','Diana'],
                   'salary': [80000, 75000, 60000, 65000]})
df2 = df.set_index(['dept', 'name'])
print(df2)
print('---')
print(df2.loc['Eng'])
items.output:
salary
dept  name
Eng   Alice    80000
      Bob      75000
Sales Charlie  60000
      Diana    65000
---
       salary
name
Alice   80000
Bob     75000

desc.zh: 列名或列名列表，设为索引
desc.en: Column(s) to set as index

desc.zh: True=从数据列中删除（移入索引）
desc.en: True=remove from columns (move to index)

desc.zh: True=追加到现有索引，False=替换
desc.en: True=append to existing index, False=replace

items.name: df.xs(key, level)

desc.zh: 按层级索引的某一级取值
desc.en: Select data at a particular level of MultiIndex

items.example:
# 在上面的 df2 上
print(df2.xs('Alice', level='name'))
print('---')
print(df2.xs('Eng', level='dept'))
items.output:
salary
dept
Eng    80000
---
       salary
name
Alice   80000
Bob     75000

desc.zh: 要选取的索引值
desc.en: Index value to select

desc.zh: 在哪一级索引上选取
desc.en: Which index level to select from

desc.zh: True=结果中删除该层级
desc.en: True=drop the selected level from result

items.name: idx.get_level_values(level)

desc.zh: 获取某一级索引的所有值
desc.en: Get values for a specific index level

items.example:
print(df2.index.get_level_values('dept'))
print(df2.index.get_level_values('name'))
items.output:
Index(['Eng', 'Eng', 'Sales', 'Sales'], dtype='object', name='dept')
Index(['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana'], dtype='object', name='name')

desc.zh: 索引层级编号或名称
desc.en: Level number or name

items.name: df.droplevel(level) / df.swaplevel()

desc.zh: 删除/交换索引层级
desc.en: Drop or swap index levels

items.example:
# 删除一个层级
print(df2.droplevel('dept'))
print('---')
# 交换层级顺序
print(df2.swaplevel().sort_index())
items.output:
salary
name
Alice     80000
Bob       75000
Charlie   60000
Diana     65000
---
               salary
name    dept
Alice   Eng    80000
Bob     Eng    75000
Charlie Sales  60000
Diana   Sales  65000

desc.zh: 要删除的层级
desc.en: Level(s) to drop

items.name: MultiIndex.from_product()

desc.zh: 从多个列表的笛卡尔积创建 MultiIndex
desc.en: Create MultiIndex from cartesian product of iterables

items.example:
import pandas as pd

idx = pd.MultiIndex.from_product(
    [['2023', '2024'], ['Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4']],
    names=['year', 'quarter']
)
print(idx)
print(f'共 {len(idx)} 个组合')

desc.zh: 每个列表对应一个层级，取笛卡尔积
desc.en: Each list becomes one level, cartesian product taken

desc.zh: 每个层级的名称
desc.en: Names for each level

items.name: MultiIndex.from_arrays()

desc.zh: 从多个等长数组创建 MultiIndex
desc.en: Create MultiIndex from arrays of equal length

items.example:
import pandas as pd

idx = pd.MultiIndex.from_arrays(
    [['Eng', 'Eng', 'Sales', 'Sales'],
     ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana']],
    names=['dept', 'name']
)
print(idx)
items.output:
MultiIndex([('Eng', 'Alice'), ('Eng', 'Bob'), ('Sales', 'Charlie'), ('Sales', 'Diana')],
           names=['dept', 'name'])

desc.zh: 等长数组列表，每个数组对应一个层级
desc.en: List of equal-length arrays, each becomes one level

desc.zh: 每个层级的名称
desc.en: Names for each level

items.name: MultiIndex.from_tuples()

desc.zh: 从元组列表创建 MultiIndex
desc.en: Create MultiIndex from list of tuples

items.example:
import pandas as pd

idx = pd.MultiIndex.from_tuples(
    [('A', 1), ('A', 2), ('B', 1), ('B', 2)],
    names=['letter', 'number']
)
print(idx)
items.output:
MultiIndex([('A', 1), ('A', 2), ('B', 1), ('B', 2)],
           names=['letter', 'number'])

desc.zh: 元组列表，每个元组是一个索引项
desc.en: List of tuples, each tuple is one index entry

desc.zh: 每个层级的名称
desc.en: Names for each level

items.name: MultiIndex.from_frame()

desc.zh: 从 DataFrame 的列创建 MultiIndex
desc.en: Create MultiIndex from DataFrame columns

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'dept': ['Eng', 'Sales'], 'year': [2023, 2024]})
idx = pd.MultiIndex.from_frame(df)
print(idx)
items.output:
MultiIndex([('Eng', 2023), ('Sales', 2024)],
           names=['dept', 'year'])

desc.zh: 每列对应一个层级
desc.en: Each column becomes one level

desc.zh: 覆盖列名作为层级名
desc.en: Override column names as level names

items.name: pd.Index()

desc.zh: 创建普通索引对象
desc.en: Create an Index object

items.example:
import pandas as pd

idx = pd.Index(['a', 'b', 'c'], name='letter')
print(idx)
print(idx.dtype)
items.output:
Index(['a', 'b', 'c'], dtype='object', name='letter')
object

desc.zh: 索引数据
desc.en: Index data

desc.zh: 数据类型
desc.en: Data type

desc.zh: 索引名称
desc.en: Index name

items.name: idx.intersection() / union() / difference()

desc.zh: 索引集合运算：交集/并集/差集
desc.en: Index set operations: intersection/union/difference

items.example:
import pandas as pd

a = pd.Index([1, 2, 3, 4])
b = pd.Index([3, 4, 5, 6])
print('交集:', a.intersection(b).tolist())
print('并集:', a.union(b).tolist())
print('差集:', a.difference(b).tolist())

desc.zh: 另一个索引
desc.en: The other Index

items.name: pd.IndexSlice

desc.zh: MultiIndex 切片辅助工具
desc.en: Helper for MultiIndex slicing

items.example:
import pandas as pd

idx = pd.MultiIndex.from_product([['A','B','C'], [1,2,3]], names=['letter','num'])
df = pd.DataFrame({'val': range(9)}, index=idx)

slc = pd.IndexSlice
print(df.loc[slc['A':'B', 2:], :])
items.output:
val
letter num     
A      2      1
       3      2
B      1      3
       2      4
       3      5

title.zh: groupby/pivot 结果的 MultiIndex 处理

items.code:
# groupby 产生 MultiIndex
result = df.groupby(['dept', 'level']).agg({'salary': ['mean', 'count']})
# 展平列名
result.columns = ['_'.join(col) for col in result.columns]
# 重置索引变回普通列
result = result.reset_index()

note.zh: groupby 多列聚合后常需 reset_index() + 列名展平
note.en: After multi-col groupby, often need reset_index() + flatten column names

items.code:
# 用 pd.IndexSlice 进行花式切片
idx = pd.IndexSlice
df2.loc[idx['Eng', :], :]  # dept=Eng 的所有行
df2.loc[idx[:, 'Alice'], :]  # name=Alice 的所有行

note.zh: pd.IndexSlice 是 MultiIndex 切片的标准工具
note.en: pd.IndexSlice is the standard tool for MultiIndex slicing

title.zh: MultiIndex 必须先排序才能切片
title.en: MultiIndex must be sorted before slicing

wrong.code:
# 未排序的 MultiIndex 切片会警告或报错
df2.loc['Eng':'Sales']  # UnsortedIndexError!

note.zh: 未排序的 MultiIndex 不支持切片操作
note.en: Unsorted MultiIndex doesn't support slicing

right.code:
df2_sorted = df2.sort_index()
df2_sorted.loc['Eng':'Sales']  # ✓ 排序后可以切片

note.zh: 先 sort_index() 再切片
note.en: sort_index() first, then slice

items.name: df.apply()

desc.zh: 沿轴方向对 DataFrame 的行或列应用函数
desc.en: Apply a function along an axis of the DataFrame

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'math': [90, 85, 78],
    'english': [88, 92, 75]
})

# 每列求最大最小差值
result = df.apply(lambda col: col.max() - col.min(), axis=0)
print(result)
print('---')
# 每行求均分
row_mean = df.apply(lambda row: row.mean(), axis=1)
print(row_mean)
items.output:
math       12
english    17
dtype: int64
---
0    89.0
1    88.5
2    76.5
dtype: float64

desc.zh: 应用于每行或每列的函数
desc.en: Function to apply to each row or column

desc.zh: 0/'index' 对每列应用；1/'columns' 对每行应用
desc.en: 0/'index' applies to each column; 1/'columns' applies to each row

desc.zh: True 时传入 numpy 数组而非 Series（更快）
desc.en: If True, pass numpy array instead of Series (faster)

desc.zh: 'expand'、'reduce'、'broadcast' 控制返回类型
desc.en: 'expand', 'reduce', or 'broadcast' to control return type

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的额外位置参数
desc.en: Additional positional arguments passed to func

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的额外关键字参数
desc.en: Additional keyword arguments passed to func

items.name: Series.map()

desc.zh: 对 Series 的每个元素应用映射（函数、字典或 Series）
desc.en: Map each element of a Series using a function, dict, or Series

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series(['cat', 'dog', 'bird', None])

# 用字典映射
mapped = s.map({'cat': '猫', 'dog': '狗', 'bird': '鸟'})
print(mapped)
print('---')
# 用函数映射
upper = s.map(str.upper, na_action='ignore')
print(upper)
items.output:
0      猫
1      狗
2      鸟
3    NaN
dtype: object
---
0     CAT
1     DOG
2    BIRD
3    None
dtype: object

desc.zh: 映射关系：函数、字典或 Series
desc.en: Mapping: function, dict, or Series

desc.zh: 'ignore' 时跳过 NaN 不传入函数
desc.en: 'ignore' to skip NaN values without passing them to the function

desc.zh: 字典映射时，未找到的值变为 NaN
desc.en: With dict mapping, values not found become NaN

desc.zh: map 支持字典和 Series 映射，apply 只接受函数
desc.en: map supports dict and Series mapping; apply only accepts callables

desc.zh: 字典映射经过内部优化，比 apply + lambda 更快
desc.en: Dict mapping is internally optimized and faster than apply + lambda

items.name: DataFrame.map()

desc.zh: 对 DataFrame 的每个元素应用函数（原 applymap，1.5 后改名）
desc.en: Apply a function element-wise to a DataFrame (renamed from applymap in 2.1)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'A': [1.234, 5.678],
    'B': [9.012, 3.456]
})

result = df.map(lambda x: f'{x:.1f}')
print(result)
print('---')
print(df.map(lambda x: x ** 2))

desc.zh: 应用于每个元素的函数
desc.en: Function to apply to each element

desc.zh: 'ignore' 时跳过 NaN
desc.en: 'ignore' to skip NaN values

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的额外关键字参数
desc.en: Additional keyword arguments passed to func

desc.zh: pandas 2.1 起 applymap 正式更名为 map；旧名已弃用
desc.en: Renamed from applymap to map in pandas 2.1; old name is deprecated

desc.zh: 元素级操作通常可用向量化运算替代（更快）
desc.en: Element-wise operations can often be replaced by vectorized operations (faster)

items.name: Series.apply()

desc.zh: 对 Series 的每个元素应用函数（比 map 更灵活）
desc.en: Apply a function to each element of a Series (more flexible than map)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series([10, 20, 30, 40, 50])

# 返回标量
result = s.apply(lambda x: 'high' if x > 25 else 'low')
print(result)
print('---')
# 返回 Series (expand)
result2 = s.apply(lambda x: pd.Series({'doubled': x*2, 'halved': x/2}))
print(result2)
items.output:
0     low
1     low
2    high
3    high
4    high
dtype: object
---
   doubled  halved
0     20.0     5.0
1     40.0    10.0
2     60.0    15.0
3     80.0    20.0
4    100.0    25.0

desc.zh: 应用于每个元素的函数
desc.en: Function to apply to each element

desc.zh: 是否自动推断更优的 dtype（已弃用，改用 by_row）
desc.en: Whether to infer better dtype (deprecated, use by_row instead)

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的额外位置参数
desc.en: Additional positional arguments passed to func

desc.zh: 控制函数是否逐元素应用；'compat' 尝试逐行再回退
desc.en: Control element-wise vs whole-series application; 'compat' tries by-row then falls back

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的额外关键字参数
desc.en: Additional keyword arguments passed to func

items.name: df.pipe()

desc.zh: 将 DataFrame 作为第一个参数传入函数，支持链式调用
desc.en: Pipe the DataFrame into a function for method chaining

items.output:
name  math  english  total grade
0  Alice    90       85    175     A
1    Bob    75       80    155     B
2  Carol    88       92    180     A

desc.zh: 接收 DataFrame 作为第一个参数的函数
desc.en: Function that takes the DataFrame as first argument

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的额外位置参数
desc.en: Additional positional arguments passed to func

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的额外关键字参数
desc.en: Additional keyword arguments passed to func

desc.zh: 传入 (func, 'arg_name') 可将 DataFrame 作为指定参数传入
desc.en: Pass (func, 'arg_name') to pipe DataFrame as a named argument

desc.zh: 支持 df.pipe(f1).pipe(f2).pipe(f3) 链式调用
desc.en: Supports chaining: df.pipe(f1).pipe(f2).pipe(f3)

items.name: df.transform(func)

desc.zh: 逐列应用函数，返回与原 DataFrame 同形状
desc.en: Apply function per column, return same shape as input

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 2, 3], 'B': [10, 20, 30]})
# 每列标准化
print(df.transform(lambda x: (x - x.mean()) / x.std()))

desc.zh: 函数、函数名字符串、列表或字典
desc.en: Function, function name string, list, or dict

desc.zh: 0=按列，1=按行
desc.en: 0=per column, 1=per row

items.code:
# 慢: apply
df['bmi'] = df.apply(lambda r: r['weight'] / (r['height']/100)**2, axis=1)
# 快: 向量化
df['bmi'] = df['weight'] / (df['height'] / 100) ** 2

note.zh: 向量化运算比 apply 快 10-100 倍，始终优先考虑
note.en: Vectorized operations are 10-100x faster than apply; always try them first

items.code:
result = (
    raw_df
    .pipe(clean_columns)
    .pipe(filter_outliers, threshold=3)
    .pipe(add_features)
    .pipe(normalize, method='zscore')
)

note.zh: pipe 让数据处理流程像管道一样清晰可读，每个函数负责一步转换
note.en: pipe makes data processing pipelines readable; each function handles one transformation step

title.en: Use dict mapping instead of apply

items.code:
# 慢: apply + if-elif
df['level'] = df['score'].apply(lambda x: 'A' if x>=90 else 'B' if x>=80 else 'C')
# 快: pd.cut + 字典
df['level'] = pd.cut(df['score'], bins=[0,80,90,100], labels=['C','B','A'])

note.zh: pd.cut/pd.qcut 和字典映射通常比 apply + lambda 更快且更清晰
note.en: pd.cut/pd.qcut and dict mapping are usually faster and clearer than apply + lambda

title.zh: apply 性能陷阱——逐行 Python 循环
title.en: apply performance trap: row-by-row Python loop

wrong.code:
# 100 万行时非常慢
df['full_name'] = df.apply(
    lambda r: f"{r['first']} {r['last']}", axis=1
)

note.zh: axis=1 的 apply 本质是 Python 逐行循环，大数据集上极慢
note.en: apply with axis=1 is essentially a Python loop over rows, extremely slow on large datasets

right.code:
# 向量化字符串操作，快 50 倍+
df['full_name'] = df['first'] + ' ' + df['last']

note.zh: 字符串拼接可直接用 + 运算符向量化完成
note.en: String concatenation can be vectorized using the + operator

wrong.code:
# pandas >= 2.1 会发出 FutureWarning
df.applymap(lambda x: x * 2)
# FutureWarning: DataFrame.applymap has been deprecated.

note.zh: applymap 在 pandas 2.1 后已弃用，将在未来版本移除
note.en: applymap is deprecated since pandas 2.1 and will be removed in a future version

right.code:
# 使用新名称 map
df.map(lambda x: x * 2)

# 或直接用向量化操作
df * 2

note.zh: 使用 DataFrame.map() 替代 applymap()；简单运算优先用向量化
note.en: Use DataFrame.map() instead of applymap(); prefer vectorized ops for simple operations

title.zh: apply 的 axis 参数容易混淆

wrong.code:
# 想对每行求和，却写成 axis=0
df.apply(sum, axis=0)  # 这是对每列求和！

note.zh: axis=0 表示 '沿行方向'（即操作每列），容易与直觉相反
note.en: axis=0 means 'along rows' (operates on each column), opposite to intuition

right.code:
# axis=1 对每行应用函数
df.apply(sum, axis=1)  # 每行求和

# 记忆：axis=0 压缩行 → 每列一个值
#       axis=1 压缩列 → 每行一个值

note.zh: axis=0 消除行维度（每列一个结果），axis=1 消除列维度（每行一个结果）
note.en: axis=0 collapses rows (one result per column), axis=1 collapses columns (one result per row)

items.name: pd.read_csv()

desc.zh: 从 CSV 文件读取数据为 DataFrame
desc.en: Read a CSV file into a DataFrame

items.signature: pd.read_csv(filepath_or_buffer, *, sep=',', header='infer', names=no_default, index_col=None, usecols=None, dtype=None, parse_dates=None, nrows=None, skiprows=None, encoding=None, na_values=None, chunksize=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

# 基本读取
df = pd.read_csv('sales.csv')

# 指定参数精确控制
df = pd.read_csv(
    'sales.csv',
    sep=',',
    header=0,
    usecols=['date', 'product', 'amount'],
    dtype={'product': 'category', 'amount': 'float32'},
    parse_dates=['date'],
    na_values=['N/A', 'missing'],
    nrows=1000
)
print(df.dtypes)
items.output:
date       datetime64[ns]
product          category
amount            float32
dtype: object

desc.zh: 文件路径、URL 或文件对象
desc.en: File path, URL, or file-like object

desc.zh: 分隔符；TSV 文件用 '\t'
desc.en: Delimiter; use '\t' for TSV files

desc.zh: 用作列名的行号；None 表示无表头
desc.en: Row number(s) for column names; None means no header

desc.zh: 自定义列名列表
desc.en: Custom column names

desc.zh: 用作行索引的列
desc.en: Column(s) to use as row index

desc.zh: 只读取指定的列（节省内存）
desc.en: Read only specified columns (saves memory)

desc.zh: 指定列的数据类型，如 {'col': 'float32'}
desc.en: Data type for columns, e.g., {'col': 'float32'}

desc.zh: 要解析为日期的列
desc.en: Columns to parse as dates

desc.zh: 只读取前 N 行（用于预览大文件）
desc.en: Read only first N rows (useful for previewing large files)

desc.zh: 文件编码，如 'utf-8'、'gbk'、'latin1'
desc.en: File encoding: 'utf-8', 'gbk', 'latin1', etc.

desc.zh: 额外识别为 NaN 的字符串
desc.en: Additional strings to recognize as NaN

desc.zh: 分块读取，返回迭代器而非 DataFrame
desc.en: Read in chunks; returns an iterator instead of DataFrame

items.name: pd.read_excel()

desc.zh: 从 Excel 文件读取数据为 DataFrame
desc.en: Read an Excel file into a DataFrame

items.signature: pd.read_excel(io, sheet_name=0, *, header=0, names=None, index_col=None, usecols=None, dtype=None, engine=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

# 读取指定 sheet
df = pd.read_excel(
    'report.xlsx',
    sheet_name='Q1 Sales',
    header=0,
    usecols='A:D',
    dtype={'product_id': str}
)
print(df.head(3))

# 一次读取多个 sheet
sheets = pd.read_excel('report.xlsx', sheet_name=['Q1', 'Q2'])
print(type(sheets))  # dict
items.output:
product_id product_name  quantity  revenue
0      P001       Widget        50   2500.0
1      P002       Gadget        30   4500.0
2      P003       Gizmo         80   3200.0
<class 'dict'>

desc.zh: 文件路径或 ExcelFile 对象
desc.en: File path, URL, or ExcelFile object

desc.zh: 工作表名称或索引；None 读取所有 sheet
desc.en: Sheet name, index, or list; None reads all sheets

desc.zh: 用作列名的行号
desc.en: Row number(s) for column names

desc.zh: 自定义列名
desc.en: Custom column names

desc.zh: 用作行索引的列
desc.en: Column(s) to use as row index

desc.zh: 要读取的列；可用 Excel 范围如 'A:D'
desc.en: Columns to read; supports Excel ranges like 'A:D'

desc.zh: 指定列的数据类型
desc.en: Data type for columns

desc.zh: 解析引擎：'openpyxl'（xlsx）、'xlrd'（xls）、'odf'、'calamine'
desc.en: Parser engine: 'openpyxl' (xlsx), 'xlrd' (xls), 'odf', 'calamine'

items.name: pd.read_json()

desc.zh: 从 JSON 文件或字符串读取数据为 DataFrame
desc.en: Read JSON into a DataFrame

items.signature: pd.read_json(path_or_buf, *, orient=None, typ='frame', dtype=None, convert_dates=True, lines=False, chunksize=None, encoding=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

# 读取 JSON Lines 格式（每行一个 JSON 对象）
df = pd.read_json(
    'events.jsonl',
    lines=True,
    dtype={'user_id': 'int32'},
    convert_dates=['timestamp']
)
print(df.head(2))

# 从 JSON 字符串读取
json_str = '[{"a": 1, "b": 2}, {"a": 3, "b": 4}]'
df2 = pd.read_json(json_str, orient='records')
print(df2)

desc.zh: JSON 文件路径、URL 或 JSON 字符串
desc.en: JSON file path, URL, or JSON string

desc.zh: JSON 格式：'records'、'columns'、'index'、'values'、'split'、'table'
desc.en: JSON format: 'records', 'columns', 'index', 'values', 'split', 'table'

desc.zh: 返回类型：'frame'（DataFrame）或 'series'
desc.en: Return type: 'frame' (DataFrame) or 'series'

desc.zh: 指定列的数据类型
desc.en: Data type for columns

desc.zh: 是否尝试解析日期列
desc.en: Whether to attempt to parse date columns

desc.zh: True 时按行读取 JSON Lines 格式
desc.en: If True, read line-delimited JSON (JSON Lines format)

desc.zh: 分块读取行数（仅 lines=True 时有效）
desc.en: Number of lines per chunk (only with lines=True)

desc.zh: 文件编码
desc.en: File encoding

items.name: df.to_csv()

desc.zh: 将 DataFrame 写入 CSV 文件
desc.en: Write DataFrame to a CSV file

items.signature: df.to_csv(path_or_buf=None, sep=',', na_rep='', columns=None, header=True, index=True, mode='w', encoding=None, lineterminator=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob'],
    'score': [95, 87]
})

# 常见: 不输出索引
df.to_csv('output.csv', index=False)

# 追加模式，无表头
df.to_csv('output.csv', mode='a', header=False, index=False)

# 输出为字符串
csv_string = df.to_csv(index=False)
print(csv_string)
items.output:
name,score
Alice,95
Bob,87

desc.zh: 文件路径；None 时返回字符串
desc.en: File path; if None, returns the CSV as a string

desc.zh: 分隔符
desc.en: Field separator

desc.zh: NaN 的替代字符串
desc.en: String representation of NaN

desc.zh: 要输出的列；None 输出所有列
desc.en: Columns to write; None writes all columns

desc.zh: 是否输出列名；也可传入自定义列名列表
desc.en: Whether to write column names; can also pass custom header names

desc.zh: 是否输出行索引
desc.en: Whether to write the row index

desc.zh: 写入模式：'w'（覆盖）或 'a'（追加）
desc.en: File mode: 'w' (overwrite) or 'a' (append)

desc.zh: 文件编码，默认 'utf-8'
desc.en: File encoding, defaults to 'utf-8'

items.name: df.to_parquet()

desc.zh: 将 DataFrame 写入 Parquet 格式（高效列式存储）
desc.en: Write DataFrame to Parquet format (efficient columnar storage)

items.signature: df.to_parquet(path=None, engine='auto', compression='snappy', index=None, partition_cols=None, storage_options=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'date': pd.date_range('2026-01-01', periods=3),
    'region': ['East', 'West', 'East'],
    'sales': [100, 200, 150]
})

# 写入 parquet，按 region 分区
df.to_parquet(
    'sales_data.parquet',
    engine='pyarrow',
    compression='snappy',
    index=False
)

# 读回
df2 = pd.read_parquet('sales_data.parquet')
print(df2)

desc.zh: 文件路径；None 时返回 bytes

items.name: pd.read_sql()

desc.zh: 从 SQL 查询或表读取数据为 DataFrame
desc.en: Read SQL query or table into a DataFrame

items.signature: pd.read_sql(sql, con, index_col=None, coerce_float=True, params=None, parse_dates=None, columns=None, chunksize=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import create_engine

engine = create_engine('sqlite:///mydb.sqlite')

# 读取 SQL 查询
df = pd.read_sql(
    'SELECT name, age, city FROM users WHERE age > :min_age',
    con=engine,
    params={'min_age': 25},
    parse_dates=['created_at']
)
print(df.head(3))

# 分块读取大表
for chunk in pd.read_sql('SELECT * FROM logs', engine, chunksize=10000):
    process(chunk)
items.output:
name  age      city
0  Alice   30  New York
1    Bob   28   Chicago
2  Carol   35    Boston

desc.en: Database connection object

desc.zh: 用作行索引的列

desc.zh: 尝试将非字符串非数值列转为浮点数

desc.zh: SQL 参数化查询的参数

desc.zh: 要解析为日期的列

desc.en: Number of rows per chunk; returns an iterator
