desc.zh: 'w'=覆盖, 'a'=追加（需要 openpyxl）
desc.en: 'w'=overwrite, 'a'=append (requires openpyxl)

title.zh: read_csv 时指定 dtype 节省内存
title.en: Specify dtypes in read_csv to save memory

note.zh: 指定 dtype 避免默认 int64/float64/object 浪费内存，category 对低基数列效果显著
note.en: Specifying dtypes avoids wasteful int64/float64/object defaults; category is great for low-cardinality columns

items.code:
chunks = []
for chunk in pd.read_csv('huge.csv', chunksize=100000):
    filtered = chunk[chunk['status'] == 'active']
    chunks.append(filtered)
result = pd.concat(chunks, ignore_index=True)

note.zh: chunksize 返回迭代器，逐块处理避免内存不足；最终用 concat 合并
note.en: chunksize returns an iterator; process chunk by chunk to avoid OOM; concat at the end

items.code:
# CSV: 慢，大文件
df.to_csv('data.csv', index=False)  # 500MB

# Parquet: 快，小文件，保留类型
df.to_parquet('data.parquet')        # ~100MB

# 读取速度: Parquet 比 CSV 快 5-10 倍
df = pd.read_parquet('data.parquet')

note.zh: Parquet 列式存储：体积小 3-5 倍，读取快 5-10 倍，保留精确 dtype，支持分区
note.en: Parquet columnar storage: 3-5x smaller, 5-10x faster reads, preserves exact dtypes, supports partitioning

title.zh: 编码错误导致读取失败

wrong.code:
# 中文 CSV 文件，默认 utf-8 可能报错
df = pd.read_csv('chinese_data.csv')
# UnicodeDecodeError: 'utf-8' codec can't decode byte 0xb5...

note.zh: 许多中文/日文 CSV 使用 GBK/Shift_JIS 编码而非 UTF-8
note.en: Many Chinese/Japanese CSV files use GBK/Shift_JIS encoding instead of UTF-8

right.code:
# 指定正确编码
df = pd.read_csv('chinese_data.csv', encoding='gbk')

# 不确定时用 chardet 检测
import chardet
with open('chinese_data.csv', 'rb') as f:
    result = chardet.detect(f.read(10000))
    print(result['encoding'])  # 'GB2312'

df = pd.read_csv('chinese_data.csv', encoding=result['encoding'])

note.zh: 使用 chardet 检测编码或显式指定 encoding 参数
note.en: Use chardet to detect encoding or explicitly specify the encoding parameter

title.en: to_csv writes index column by default

wrong.code:
df.to_csv('output.csv')
# 输出文件多了一列 Unnamed: 0（索引）
df2 = pd.read_csv('output.csv')
print(df2.columns)  # Index(['Unnamed: 0', 'name', 'score'], ...)

note.zh: to_csv 默认 index=True，重新读取时索引变成 Unnamed: 0 列
note.en: to_csv defaults to index=True; reading it back creates an 'Unnamed: 0' column

right.code:
# 写入时关闭索引
df.to_csv('output.csv', index=False)

# 或读取时指定索引列
df2 = pd.read_csv('output.csv', index_col=0)

note.zh: 除非索引有意义，否则始终设置 index=False；或读取时用 index_col 指定
note.en: Always set index=False unless the index is meaningful; or use index_col when reading

items.name: df.eval()

desc.zh: 用字符串表达式高效计算列运算（内存节省、速度快）
desc.en: Evaluate a string expression efficiently (lower memory, fast)

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'a': np.random.randn(100000),
    'b': np.random.randn(100000),
    'c': np.random.randn(100000)
})

# eval 避免中间临时数组
df.eval('d = (a + b) * c - a / b', inplace=True)
print(df[['a','b','c','d']].head(3))

desc.zh: 要计算的表达式字符串，可引用列名
desc.en: Expression string to evaluate; can reference column names

desc.zh: True 时将结果赋值回 DataFrame
desc.en: If True, assign result back to the DataFrame

desc.zh: 计算引擎：None（自动）、'numexpr'（快）、'python'
desc.en: Computation engine: None (auto), 'numexpr' (fast), 'python'

desc.zh: 表达式解析器：'pandas'（支持 == 等）或 'python'
desc.en: Expression parser: 'pandas' (supports == etc.) or 'python'

desc.zh: 可用 @ 前缀引用局部变量，如 'a > @threshold'
desc.en: Use @ prefix to reference local variables: 'a > @threshold'

items.name: df.query()

desc.zh: 用字符串表达式高效过滤行
desc.en: Filter rows using a string expression efficiently

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Carol', 'Dave', 'Eve'],
    'age': [25, 30, 35, 28, 42],
    'salary': [50000, 60000, 70000, 55000, 80000],
    'dept': ['Eng', 'Sales', 'Eng', 'Sales', 'Eng']
})

min_salary = 55000
result = df.query('dept == "Eng" and salary >= @min_salary')
print(result)
items.output:
name  age  salary dept
2  Carol   35   70000  Eng
4    Eve   42   80000  Eng

desc.zh: 布尔表达式字符串，用于过滤行
desc.en: Boolean expression string to filter rows

desc.zh: True 时原地修改 DataFrame
desc.en: If True, modify the DataFrame in place

desc.zh: 计算引擎：'numexpr'（大数据更快）或 'python'
desc.en: Computation engine: 'numexpr' (faster for large data) or 'python'

desc.zh: 表达式解析器
desc.en: Expression parser

desc.zh: 用 @var 引用 Python 变量，如 'age > @min_age'
desc.en: Use @var to reference Python variables: 'age > @min_age'

items.name: pd.Categorical()

desc.zh: 创建分类类型，大幅减少低基数列的内存占用
desc.en: Create categorical type for massive memory savings on low-cardinality columns

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# 100万行的状态列
s_str = pd.Series(np.random.choice(['active','inactive','pending'], 1000000))
s_cat = s_str.astype('category')

print(f'object:   {s_str.memory_usage(deep=True) / 1e6:.1f} MB')
print(f'category: {s_cat.memory_usage(deep=True) / 1e6:.1f} MB')
print(f'节省: {(1 - s_cat.memory_usage(deep=True)/s_str.memory_usage(deep=True))*100:.0f}%')
items.output:
object:   64.0 MB
category:  1.0 MB
节省: 98%

desc.zh: 输入数据
desc.en: Input data

desc.zh: 手动指定类别集合；None 从数据中推断
desc.en: Manually specify category set; None infers from data

desc.zh: 是否有序分类（如 low < medium < high）
desc.en: Whether categories are ordered (e.g., low < medium < high)

desc.zh: 使用 CategoricalDtype 指定类别和顺序
desc.en: Use CategoricalDtype to specify categories and ordering

desc.zh: 通常用 s.astype('category') 更方便
desc.en: Usually more convenient to use s.astype('category')

items.name: df.memory_usage()

desc.zh: 查看 DataFrame 每列的内存占用
desc.en: Get memory usage of each column in the DataFrame

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'int_col': np.arange(100000, dtype='int64'),
    'float_col': np.random.randn(100000),
    'str_col': [f'item_{i}' for i in range(100000)],
    'cat_col': pd.Categorical(np.random.choice(['a','b','c'], 100000))
})

print(df.memory_usage(deep=True))
print(f'\nTotal: {df.memory_usage(deep=True).sum() / 1e6:.1f} MB')
items.output:
Index          128
int_col     800000
float_col   800000
str_col    6400000
cat_col     100324
dtype: int64

Total: 8.1 MB

desc.zh: 是否包含索引的内存占用
desc.en: Whether to include memory usage of the index

desc.zh: True 时深度计算 object 列的实际内存（更准确但更慢）
desc.en: If True, introspect object dtypes for actual memory (accurate but slower)

desc.zh: 对于 object 列，必须用 deep=True 才能看到真实内存占用
desc.en: For object columns, deep=True is required to see actual memory usage

desc.zh: df.info(memory_usage='deep') 可一次查看全部信息
desc.en: df.info(memory_usage='deep') shows all info at once

desc.zh: 用 .sum() 获取总内存：df.memory_usage(deep=True).sum()
desc.en: Use .sum() for total: df.memory_usage(deep=True).sum()

items.name: df.iterrows() / itertuples() / items()

desc.zh: 遍历行/列的三种方式（性能差异巨大）
desc.en: Three ways to iterate rows/cols (huge performance difference)

items.signature:
df.iterrows()   # 慢，返回 (index, Series)
df.itertuples() # 快 10-100x，返回 namedtuple
df.items()      # 按列遍历，返回 (col_name, Series)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'name': ['Alice', 'Bob'], 'age': [25, 30]})

# itertuples 比 iterrows 快 10-100x
for row in df.itertuples():
    print(f'{row.name}: {row.age}')

# 但向量化比两者都快 100-1000x
# df['age'] * 2  ← 优先用这个
items.output:
Alice: 25
Bob: 30

desc.zh: itertuples: 是否包含索引
desc.en: itertuples: whether to include index

desc.zh: itertuples: namedtuple 的名字
desc.en: itertuples: name of the namedtuple

items.name: pd.set_option() / pd.get_option()

desc.zh: 设置/获取 pandas 全局显示选项
desc.en: Set/get pandas global display options

items.example:
import pandas as pd

pd.set_option('display.max_rows', 100)
pd.set_option('display.max_columns', 20)
pd.set_option('display.float_format', '{:.2f}'.format)
print(pd.get_option('display.max_rows'))

desc.zh: 'display.max_rows/max_columns/float_format/max_colwidth/precision' 等
desc.en: 'display.max_rows/max_columns/float_format/max_colwidth/precision' etc.

items.name: pd.option_context()

desc.zh: 临时修改选项（with 语句结束后自动恢复）
desc.en: Temporarily change options (auto-restores after with block)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

with pd.option_context('display.max_rows', 5, 'display.float_format', '{:.1f}'.format):
    print(pd.get_option('display.max_rows'))  # 5
print(pd.get_option('display.max_rows'))  # 恢复默认

desc.zh: 成对传入 key-value，可同时设多个
desc.en: Pass key-value pairs, can set multiple at once

items.code:
# 慢 (10s): apply 逐行循环
df['bmi'] = df.apply(lambda r: r['w'] / (r['h']/100)**2, axis=1)

# 快 (0.1s): NumPy 向量化
df['bmi'] = df['w'] / (df['h'] / 100) ** 2

# 条件赋值: np.where 代替 apply
df['label'] = np.where(df['score'] >= 60, 'pass', 'fail')

note.zh: 向量化运算利用 C/Fortran 底层实现，比 Python 循环快 10-100 倍
note.en: Vectorized operations use C/Fortran under the hood, 10-100x faster than Python loops

title.zh: 低基数列转 category 节省内存

note.zh: 当唯一值数量远小于行数时（如性别、国家），category 可节省 90%+ 内存
note.en: When unique values are much fewer than rows (e.g., gender, country), category saves 90%+ memory

title.zh: 数值列降低精度节省内存
title.en: Downcast numeric columns to save memory

items.code:
# int64 → int32/int16/int8
df['age'] = pd.to_numeric(df['age'], downcast='integer')
df['price'] = pd.to_numeric(df['price'], downcast='float')

# 或手动指定
df['age'] = df['age'].astype('int8')      # -128~127
df['count'] = df['count'].astype('int16')  # -32768~32767

note.zh: int64 用 8 字节，int8 只用 1 字节；确保值域不超范围
note.en: int64 uses 8 bytes, int8 only 1 byte; ensure values fit in the target range

title.zh: 避免 iterrows，用向量化或 itertuples
title.en: Avoid iterrows; use vectorization or itertuples

items.code:
# 最慢: iterrows (类型转换开销大)
for idx, row in df.iterrows():
    process(row['a'], row['b'])

# 中等: itertuples (快 10-100 倍)
for row in df.itertuples(index=False):
    process(row.a, row.b)

# 最快: 向量化
result = vectorized_func(df['a'].values, df['b'].values)

note.zh: iterrows 每行创建 Series 对象开销大；itertuples 返回命名元组更快；向量化最佳
note.en: iterrows creates a Series per row (slow); itertuples returns named tuples (faster); vectorization is best

title.zh: iterrows 比向量化慢 100-1000 倍

note.zh: iterrows 每行生成一个 Series，涉及类型推断和对象创建开销
note.en: iterrows generates a Series per row with type inference and object creation overhead

right.code:
# 100 万行耗时 ~0.05 秒
total = df.loc[df['status'] == 'active', 'amount'].sum()

note.zh: 布尔索引 + 聚合完全在 C 层执行，快 1000 倍以上
note.en: Boolean indexing + aggregation runs entirely in C, 1000x+ faster

title.zh: 循环中 concat 导致 O(n^2) 复杂度
title.en: concat in a loop causes O(n^2) complexity

wrong.code:
# 每次 concat 复制整个 DataFrame → O(n^2)
result = pd.DataFrame()
for file in files:
    df = pd.read_csv(file)
    result = pd.concat([result, df])  # 越来越慢！

note.zh: 每次 concat 都创建新 DataFrame 并复制全部数据，n 次循环总复制量为 O(n^2)
note.en: Each concat creates a new DataFrame copying all data; n iterations = O(n^2) total copies

right.code:
# 先收集到列表，最后一次性 concat → O(n)
frames = []
for file in files:
    frames.append(pd.read_csv(file))
result = pd.concat(frames, ignore_index=True)

# 或用列表推导更简洁
result = pd.concat(
    [pd.read_csv(f) for f in files],
    ignore_index=True
)

note.zh: 先收集到 list 再一次性 concat，只复制一次，时间复杂度 O(n)
note.en: Collect into a list first, then concat once; only one copy, O(n) time complexity

items.name: df.plot() / Series.plot()

desc.zh: 通用绘图入口，默认折线图
desc.en: General plot method, defaults to line chart

items.signature: df.plot(x=None, y=None, kind='line', ax=None, figsize=None, title=None, legend=True, xlabel=None, ylabel=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.DataFrame({'month': range(1,13), 'sales': [100,120,140,130,150,180,200,190,170,160,180,220]})
df.plot(x='month', y='sales', title='Monthly Sales')
plt.show()

desc.zh: 'line'/'bar'/'barh'/'hist'/'box'/'scatter'/'pie'/'area'/'kde'
desc.en: 'line'/'bar'/'barh'/'hist'/'box'/'scatter'/'pie'/'area'/'kde'

desc.zh: x/y 轴对应的列名
desc.en: Column names for x/y axis

desc.zh: 图片大小 (宽, 高) 英寸
desc.en: Figure size (width, height) in inches

desc.zh: 图表标题
desc.en: Chart title

desc.zh: True=每列单独画子图
desc.en: True=separate subplot for each column

desc.zh: 在指定的 matplotlib Axes 上画图
desc.en: Draw on specified matplotlib Axes

items.name: df.plot.bar() / df.plot.barh()

desc.zh: 柱状图 / 水平柱状图
desc.en: Bar chart / horizontal bar chart

items.signature:
df.plot.bar(x=None, y=None, stacked=False)
df.plot.barh(x=None, y=None, stacked=False)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'city': ['BJ','SH','GZ'], 'sales': [300,450,280]})
df.plot.bar(x='city', y='sales', title='Sales by City')

desc.zh: True=堆叠柱状图
desc.en: True=stacked bar chart

desc.zh: 柱子颜色
desc.en: Bar color(s)

items.name: df.plot.hist()

desc.zh: 直方图（查看分布）
desc.en: Histogram (view distribution)

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'score': np.random.normal(75, 10, 200)})
df.plot.hist(bins=20, title='Score Distribution')

desc.zh: 分箱数量
desc.en: Number of bins

desc.zh: 透明度 0-1
desc.en: Transparency 0-1

desc.zh: True=堆叠
desc.en: True=stacked

items.name: df.plot.scatter()

desc.zh: 散点图（查看两变量关系）
desc.en: Scatter plot (view relationship between two variables)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'height': [160,165,170,175,180], 'weight': [50,55,65,70,80]})
df.plot.scatter(x='height', y='weight', title='Height vs Weight')

desc.zh: x/y 轴列名
desc.en: Column names for x/y axes

desc.zh: 颜色列名或颜色数组
desc.en: Column for color or color array

desc.zh: 点大小列名或大小数组
desc.en: Column for point size or size array

items.name: df.plot.box()

desc.zh: 箱线图（查看分布和异常值）
desc.en: Box plot (view distribution and outliers)

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': np.random.normal(0,1,100), 'B': np.random.normal(2,1.5,100)})
df.plot.box(title='Distribution Comparison')

desc.zh: 按此列分组画箱线图
desc.en: Column to group by

desc.zh: True=垂直，False=水平
desc.en: True=vertical, False=horizontal

items.name: df.plot.pie()

desc.zh: 饼图（查看比例）
desc.en: Pie chart (view proportions)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'share': [40,30,20,10]}, index=['A','B','C','D'])
df.plot.pie(y='share', autopct='%1.0f%%', title='Market Share')

desc.zh: 数值列名
desc.en: Column with values

desc.zh: 百分比格式，如 '%1.1f%%'
desc.en: Percentage format, e.g. '%1.1f%%'

desc.zh: 起始角度
desc.en: Start angle

items.name: df.plot.area()

desc.zh: 面积图（堆叠的折线图）
desc.en: Area chart (stacked line chart)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'Q1': [10,20,30], 'Q2': [15,25,35], 'Q3': [20,30,40]})
df.plot.area(stacked=True, title='Quarterly Revenue')

desc.zh: True=堆叠，False=重叠
desc.en: True=stacked, False=overlapping

items.name: df.plot.kde() / df.plot.density()

desc.zh: 核密度估计图（平滑的直方图）
desc.en: Kernel density estimation (smoothed histogram)

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

s = pd.Series(np.random.normal(0, 1, 1000))
s.plot.kde(title='Normal Distribution')

desc.zh: 带宽方法，越小越贴合数据
desc.en: Bandwidth method, smaller = fits data more closely

items.code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(15, 4))
df['A'].plot.hist(ax=axes[0], title='Distribution A')
df.plot.scatter(x='A', y='B', ax=axes[1], title='A vs B')
df[['A','B']].plot.box(ax=axes[2], title='Box Plot')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

note.zh: 用 matplotlib 的 subplots + ax 参数组合多图
note.en: Use matplotlib subplots + ax parameter to combine multiple plots

items.code:
ax = df.plot(title='My Chart')
fig = ax.get_figure()
fig.savefig('chart.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')

# 或直接用 plt
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df.plot()
plt.savefig('chart.pdf')

note.zh: savefig 支持 png/pdf/svg，bbox_inches='tight' 去掉多余白边
note.en: savefig supports png/pdf/svg, bbox_inches='tight' removes whitespace

items.code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.rcParams['font.sans-serif'] = ['SimHei', 'Arial Unicode MS']  # 黑体
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False  # 负号显示

note.zh: macOS 用 'Arial Unicode MS'，Windows 用 'SimHei' 或 'Microsoft YaHei'
note.en: macOS: 'Arial Unicode MS', Windows: 'SimHei' or 'Microsoft YaHei'

wrong.code: df.plot()  # 什么都没显示

note.zh: 某些环境需要显式调用 plt.show() 或设置 magic
note.en: Some environments need explicit plt.show() or magic command

right.code:
%matplotlib inline  # Jupyter magic
df.plot()
# 或
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df.plot()
plt.show()

note.zh: Jupyter 中加 %matplotlib inline，脚本中加 plt.show()
note.en: Add %matplotlib inline in Jupyter, plt.show() in scripts

title.zh: plot 返回 Axes 不是 Figure

wrong.code:
fig = df.plot()  # 这是 Axes，不是 Figure！
fig.savefig('x.png')  # AttributeError

note.zh: plot() 返回 matplotlib Axes 对象
note.en: plot() returns matplotlib Axes object

right.code:
ax = df.plot()
fig = ax.get_figure()  # 从 Axes 获取 Figure
fig.savefig('x.png')

note.zh: 通过 ax.get_figure() 获取 Figure 对象再保存
note.en: Get Figure from Axes via ax.get_figure(), then save

items.name: df.style.format()

desc.zh: 格式化显示值（不改变数据）
desc.en: Format display values (doesn't change data)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'price': [1234.5, 678.9], 'change': [0.1234, -0.0567]})
df.style.format({'price': '${:,.0f}', 'change': '{:+.1%}'})

desc.zh: 格式字符串、字典（每列不同）或函数
desc.en: Format string, dict (per column), or callable

desc.zh: 浮点数小数位数
desc.en: Decimal places for floats

desc.zh: 只格式化指定的行/列
desc.en: Only format specified rows/columns

items.name: df.style.highlight_max() / highlight_min()

desc.zh: 高亮最大/最小值单元格
desc.en: Highlight cells with max/min values

items.signature:
df.style.highlight_max(color='yellow', axis=0, subset=None)
df.style.highlight_min(color='yellow', axis=0, subset=None)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 5, 3], 'B': [4, 2, 6]})
df.style.highlight_max(color='lightgreen').highlight_min(color='lightcoral')

desc.zh: 高亮颜色
desc.en: Highlight color

desc.zh: 0=每列找最大/小，1=每行
desc.en: 0=per column, 1=per row

items.name: df.style.background_gradient()

desc.zh: 按值大小渐变背景色（热力图效果）
desc.en: Gradient background color by value (heatmap effect)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'Q1': [80,60,90], 'Q2': [70,85,75]}, index=['A','B','C'])
df.style.background_gradient(cmap='RdYlGn')

desc.zh: 颜色映射：'RdYlGn'(红黄绿)/'Blues'/'coolwarm'等
desc.en: Colormap: 'RdYlGn'/'Blues'/'coolwarm' etc.

desc.zh: 0=每列渐变，1=每行渐变，None=全局
desc.en: 0=per column, 1=per row, None=global

items.name: df.style.bar()

desc.zh: 在单元格内画条形图
desc.en: Draw bar charts within cells

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({'name': ['A','B','C'], 'score': [85, 92, 78]})
df.style.bar(subset='score', color='lightblue')

desc.zh: 条形颜色，传列表=[负值色, 正值色]
desc.en: Bar color, list=[negative, positive]

desc.zh: 'left'=从左开始, 'mid'=从中间(0)开始, 'zero'=从零开始
desc.en: 'left'=from left, 'mid'=from center, 'zero'=from zero

items.name: df.style.to_html() / to_excel()

desc.zh: 导出样式化的表格为 HTML/Excel
desc.en: Export styled table to HTML/Excel

items.example:
import pandas as pd

styled = df.style.format(precision=2).highlight_max()

# 导出 HTML
html = styled.to_html()

# 导出 Excel（保留样式）
styled.to_excel('styled.xlsx', engine='openpyxl')

items.code:
(df.style
    .format(precision=1)
    .highlight_max(color='lightgreen')
    .highlight_min(color='lightcoral')
    .background_gradient(subset=['score'], cmap='Blues')
    .bar(subset=['revenue'], color='lightblue')
    .set_caption('Sales Report')
)

note.zh: Styler 支持链式调用，从左到右依次应用
note.en: Styler supports chaining, applied left to right

items.name: np.array()

desc.zh: 从列表、元组等创建 NumPy 数组，是最基础的数组创建方式
desc.en: Create a NumPy array from list, tuple, or other sequence — the most fundamental array creation

items.signature: np.array(object, dtype=None, copy=True, order='K', subok=False, ndmin=0)
items.example:
import numpy as np

# 一维数组
a = np.array([1, 2, 3])
print(a, a.dtype)

# 二维数组 + 指定类型
b = np.array([[1, 2], [3, 4]], dtype='float64')
print(b)

# ndmin 控制最小维度
c = np.array([1, 2, 3], ndmin=2)
print(c, c.shape)

desc.zh: 输入数据：列表、元组、嵌套序列、另一个 ndarray 等
desc.en: Input data: list, tuple, nested sequence, another ndarray, etc.

desc.zh: 目标数据类型，如 'float64', 'int32'；None 时自动推断
desc.en: Desired data type such as 'float64', 'int32'; None for auto-inference

desc.zh: 是否强制复制数据；True 保证返回新副本
desc.en: Whether to force a copy; True guarantees a new copy is returned

desc.zh: 结果数组的最小维度，不足时会在前面补维度
desc.en: Minimum number of dimensions; pads with extra dimensions on the left

items.name: np.arange()

desc.zh: 生成等差数列数组，类似 Python range 但返回 ndarray
desc.en: Generate evenly spaced values (like Python range but returns ndarray)

items.example:
import numpy as np

print(np.arange(5))
print(np.arange(2, 10, 2))
print(np.arange(0, 1, 0.3))

desc.zh: 起始值（包含）
desc.en: Start value (inclusive)

desc.zh: 终止值（不包含）
desc.en: End value (exclusive)

desc.zh: 步长；可为浮点数，但建议浮点等分用 linspace
desc.en: Step size; may be float, but prefer linspace for float spacing

desc.zh: 输出数组类型；None 时从输入推断
desc.en: Output array dtype; None infers from inputs

items.name: np.linspace()

desc.zh: 生成等分数列，指定元素个数而非步长，适合浮点等分
desc.en: Generate evenly spaced values by specifying count (not step), ideal for float ranges

items.signature: np.linspace(start, stop, num=50, endpoint=True, retstep=False, dtype=None)
items.example:
import numpy as np

# 0 到 1 之间等分 5 个点（含端点）
print(np.linspace(0, 1, 5))

# 不含端点
print(np.linspace(0, 1, 5, endpoint=False))

desc.zh: 序列起始值
desc.en: Start of the sequence

desc.zh: 序列终止值
desc.en: End of the sequence

desc.zh: 要生成的样本数量
desc.en: Number of samples to generate

desc.zh: 是否包含 stop 值；True 时最后一个元素恰好等于 stop
desc.en: Whether to include stop; True means last element equals stop exactly

items.name: np.zeros() / np.ones() / np.full()

desc.zh: 创建指定形状的全零、全一或指定值填充的数组
desc.en: Create arrays filled with zeros, ones, or a specified constant value

items.signature:
np.zeros(shape, dtype=float)
np.ones(shape, dtype=float)
np.full(shape, fill_value, dtype=None)
items.example:
import numpy as np

print(np.zeros((2, 3)))
print(np.ones(4, dtype='int32'))
print(np.full((2, 2), 7))

desc.zh: 数组形状，如 5 表示一维长度 5，(2,3) 表示 2 行 3 列
desc.en: Array shape: int for 1D, tuple like (2,3) for 2D

desc.zh: np.full 专用：填充值
desc.en: For np.full: the constant fill value

desc.zh: 数据类型；zeros/ones 默认 float64，full 从 fill_value 推断
desc.en: Data type; zeros/ones default to float64, full infers from fill_value

items.name: np.random.seed() / np.random.default_rng()

desc.zh: 设置随机种子以确保结果可复现；推荐新代码用 default_rng
desc.en: Set random seed for reproducibility; prefer default_rng for new code

items.example:
import numpy as np

# 旧式（全局状态）
np.random.seed(42)
print(np.random.rand(3))

# 新式（推荐）
rng = np.random.default_rng(42)
print(rng.random(3))

desc.zh: 随机种子；相同种子产生相同随机序列
desc.en: Random seed; same seed produces same random sequence

desc.zh: default_rng 返回 Generator 对象，通过 .random()/.integers() 等方法生成随机数
desc.en: default_rng returns a Generator object; use .random()/.integers() etc. to draw samples

desc.zh: np.random.seed() 设置全局状态（不推荐），default_rng() 创建独立生成器（推荐）
desc.en: np.random.seed() sets global state (discouraged), default_rng() creates isolated generator (preferred)

items.name: np.random.normal() / uniform() / randint() / choice()

desc.zh: 生成服从特定分布的随机数组：正态、均匀、整数、随机选取
desc.en: Generate random arrays from various distributions: normal, uniform, integer, and random choice

items.signature:
np.random.normal(loc=0.0, scale=1.0, size=None)
np.random.uniform(low=0.0, high=1.0, size=None)
np.random.randint(low, high=None, size=None)
np.random.choice(a, size=None, replace=True, p=None)
items.example:
import numpy as np
np.random.seed(42)

print('normal:', np.random.normal(0, 1, 5).round(2))
print('uniform:', np.random.uniform(10, 20, 4).round(2))
print('randint:', np.random.randint(1, 100, 5))
print('choice:', np.random.choice(['A', 'B', 'C'], 6))

desc.zh: 分布中心（normal）或下界（uniform/randint）
desc.en: Distribution center (normal) or lower bound (uniform/randint)

desc.zh: 标准差（normal）或上界（uniform/randint）
desc.en: Standard deviation (normal) or upper bound (uniform/randint)

desc.zh: 输出形状；None 返回标量
desc.en: Output shape; None returns a scalar

desc.zh: choice 专用：a=候选数组, p=概率权重, replace=是否有放回
desc.en: For choice: a=candidate array, p=probability weights, replace=with replacement

items.name: np.reshape() / np.ravel() / np.flatten()

desc.zh: 改变数组形状：reshape 任意变形，ravel/flatten 展平为一维
desc.en: Change array shape: reshape for arbitrary reshaping, ravel/flatten to 1D

items.example:
import numpy as np

a = np.arange(12)
print(a.reshape(3, 4))
print(a.reshape(3, 4).ravel())
# flatten 返回副本，ravel 返回视图
print(a.reshape(3, 4).flatten())

desc.zh: 新形状；可用 -1 表示自动推断该维度，如 reshape(3, -1)
desc.en: New shape; use -1 for auto-inferred dimension, e.g. reshape(3, -1)

desc.zh: 读写顺序：'C' 行优先（默认），'F' 列优先
desc.en: Read/write order: 'C' row-major (default), 'F' column-major

desc.zh: ravel 返回视图（共享内存，更快），flatten 返回副本（独立，更安全）
desc.en: ravel returns a view (shared memory, faster), flatten returns a copy (independent, safer)

items.name: np.concatenate() / np.vstack() / np.hstack()

desc.zh: 沿指定轴拼接多个数组：concatenate 通用，vstack/hstack 便捷
desc.en: Join arrays along an axis: concatenate is general, vstack/hstack are shortcuts

items.example:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([[1, 2], [3, 4]])
b = np.array([[5, 6]])

print(np.concatenate([a, b], axis=0))  # 纵向
print(np.vstack([a, b]))               # 等价
print(np.hstack([a, a]))               # 横向

desc.zh: 要拼接的数组序列；除拼接轴外，其他维度必须一致
desc.en: Sequence of arrays to join; all dimensions except the join axis must match

desc.zh: 拼接轴：0=纵向（行方向），1=横向（列方向），None=先展平再拼接
desc.en: Join axis: 0=vertical (rows), 1=horizontal (cols), None=flatten first

desc.zh: vstack = concatenate(axis=0) + 自动扩维，hstack = concatenate(axis=1)
desc.en: vstack = concatenate(axis=0) with auto-dim expansion, hstack = concatenate(axis=1)

items.name: np.sort() / np.argsort() / np.argmax() / np.argmin()

desc.zh: 排序与索引查找：sort 排序，argsort 返回排序索引，argmax/argmin 返回极值索引
desc.en: Sorting and index lookup: sort for ordering, argsort for sort indices, argmax/argmin for extrema indices

items.signature:
np.sort(a, axis=-1, kind=None)
np.argsort(a, axis=-1, kind=None)
np.argmax(a, axis=None)
np.argmin(a, axis=None)
items.example:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([30, 10, 50, 20, 40])
print('sorted:', np.sort(a))
print('argsort:', np.argsort(a))
print('argmax:', np.argmax(a), '→ value:', a[np.argmax(a)])
print('argmin:', np.argmin(a), '→ value:', a[np.argmin(a)])
items.output:
sorted: [10 20 30 40 50]
argsort: [1 3 0 4 2]
argmax: 2 → value: 50
argmin: 1 → value: 10

desc.zh: 待排序/查找的数组
desc.en: Array to sort or search

desc.zh: 排序轴：sort/argsort 默认最后一轴，argmax/argmin 默认 None（展平后查找）
desc.en: Axis: sort/argsort default to last axis, argmax/argmin default to None (flattened)

desc.zh: 排序算法：'quicksort', 'mergesort', 'heapsort', 'stable'
desc.en: Sorting algorithm: 'quicksort', 'mergesort', 'heapsort', 'stable'

items.name: np.unique()

desc.zh: 返回数组中的唯一值，可同时返回计数、索引等附加信息
desc.en: Return unique values in an array, optionally with counts, indices, and inverse

items.example:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([3, 1, 2, 3, 2, 1, 1])
values, counts = np.unique(a, return_counts=True)
for v, c in zip(values, counts):
    print(f'{v}: {c} times')
items.output:
1: 3 times
2: 2 times
3: 2 times

desc.zh: 输入数组
desc.en: Input array

desc.zh: 是否返回每个唯一值的出现次数
desc.en: Whether to return the count of each unique value

desc.zh: 是否返回每个唯一值在原数组中首次出现的索引
desc.en: Whether to return the index of first occurrence of each unique value

desc.zh: 是否返回从唯一值数组重建原数组的索引
desc.en: Whether to return indices to reconstruct the original array from unique values

items.name: np.where()

desc.zh: 条件选择：满足条件取 x，不满足取 y；pandas 中最常用的 NumPy 函数之一
desc.en: Conditional selection: pick x where condition is true, y otherwise — one of the most used NumPy functions in pandas

items.example:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([1, -2, 3, -4, 5])
result = np.where(a > 0, a, 0)
print(result)

# 嵌套 np.where 实现多条件
label = np.where(a > 0, 'pos',
            np.where(a < 0, 'neg', 'zero'))
print(label)
items.output:
[1 0 3 0 5]
['pos' 'neg' 'pos' 'neg' 'pos']

desc.zh: 布尔条件数组；逐元素判断
desc.en: Boolean condition array; evaluated element-wise

desc.zh: 条件为 True 时的取值
desc.en: Value(s) where condition is True

desc.zh: 条件为 False 时的取值
desc.en: Value(s) where condition is False

items.name: np.select()

desc.zh: 多条件选择：比嵌套 np.where 更清晰的多分支逻辑
desc.en: Multi-condition selection: cleaner alternative to nested np.where for multiple branches

items.example:
import numpy as np

scores = np.array([95, 82, 67, 45, 88])
conditions = [
    scores >= 90,
    scores >= 80,
    scores >= 60
]
choices = ['A', 'B', 'C']

grades = np.select(conditions, choices, default='F')
print(grades)

desc.zh: 条件列表；按顺序匹配，第一个为 True 的条件生效
desc.en: List of conditions; matched in order, first True condition wins

desc.zh: 对应每个条件的取值列表，长度必须与 condlist 相同
desc.en: Values for each condition; must have same length as condlist

desc.zh: 所有条件均不满足时的默认值
desc.en: Default value when no condition is met

items.name: np.clip()

desc.zh: 将数组值裁剪到指定范围 [min, max]，超出部分截断
desc.en: Clip array values to a specified range [min, max], truncating outliers

items.example:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([1, 5, 10, 15, 20])
print(np.clip(a, 3, 12))

# 只设下限或上限
print(np.clip(a, 5, None))  # 下限 5，无上限

desc.zh: 输入数组
desc.en: Input array

desc.zh: 下界；None 表示不设下限
desc.en: Lower bound; None means no lower clipping

desc.zh: 上界；None 表示不设上限
desc.en: Upper bound; None means no upper clipping

items.name: np.nan / np.inf / np.isnan() / np.isinf()

desc.zh: 特殊浮点值与检测函数：NaN（非数）和 Inf（无穷大）
desc.en: Special float values and detection: NaN (not-a-number) and Inf (infinity)

items.example:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([1.0, np.nan, np.inf, -np.inf, 0.0])
print('isnan:', np.isnan(a))
print('isinf:', np.isinf(a))
print('isfinite:', np.isfinite(a))

# NaN 的特殊性质
print('nan == nan:', np.nan == np.nan)
items.output:
isnan: [False  True False False False]
isinf: [False False  True  True False]
isfinite: [ True False False False  True]
nan == nan: False

desc.zh: IEEE 754 的 NaN 值；注意 nan != nan（永远为 False）
desc.en: IEEE 754 NaN value; note that nan != nan (always False)

desc.zh: 正无穷大；-np.inf 表示负无穷大
desc.en: Positive infinity; -np.inf for negative infinity

desc.zh: isnan/isinf 的输入数组，逐元素检测
desc.en: Input for isnan/isinf, checked element-wise

items.name: np.vectorize()

desc.zh: 将普通 Python 函数包装为可逐元素作用于数组的向量化函数
desc.en: Wrap a plain Python function to operate element-wise on arrays (vectorized interface)

items.example:
import numpy as np

def grade(score):
    if score >= 90: return 'A'
    elif score >= 80: return 'B'
    elif score >= 60: return 'C'
    else: return 'F'

vgrade = np.vectorize(grade)
scores = np.array([95, 82, 67, 45, 88])
print(vgrade(scores))

desc.zh: 接受标量输入的普通 Python 函数
desc.en: A regular Python function that accepts scalar input

desc.zh: 输出数据类型；None 时通过调用一次函数来推断
desc.en: Output dtype(s); None infers by calling the function once

desc.zh: 不进行向量化的参数名或位置集合
desc.en: Set of parameter names or positions to exclude from vectorization

items.code:
import numpy as np

# 标量广播
a = np.array([1, 2, 3])
print(a * 10)  # [10, 20, 30]

# 不同形状广播
matrix = np.array([[1, 2, 3],
                   [4, 5, 6]])
row = np.array([10, 20, 30])
print(matrix + row)  # 行向量自动广播到每一行

# 广播规则：从右向左对齐维度，1 可广播到 N

note.zh: 广播让不同形状的数组进行运算时自动扩展维度，避免手动复制数据
note.en: Broadcasting auto-expands dimensions for operations between differently shaped arrays, avoiding manual data copying

items.code:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([10, 25, 3, 48, 17, 6])

# 单条件
print(a[a > 10])  # [25, 48, 17]

# 多条件（必须用 & | ~，不能用 and or not）
print(a[(a > 5) & (a < 30)])  # [10, 25, 17, 6]

# 计数
print(np.sum(a > 10))  # 3

note.zh: 布尔数组可直接作为索引筛选元素；多条件必须用 &, |, ~ 且加括号
note.en: Boolean arrays can directly index to filter elements; use &, |, ~ (not and/or/not) with parentheses for multi-conditions

items.code:
import numpy as np

# 反面：Python 循环（慢）
a = list(range(100000))
result = [x ** 2 + 2 * x + 1 for x in a]

# 正面：向量化运算（快 50-100x）
a = np.arange(100000)
result = a ** 2 + 2 * a + 1

# 条件向量化也可以
result = np.where(a > 50000, a * 2, a * 0.5)

note.zh: NumPy 的核心优势在于向量化运算；尽量用数组运算替代 Python for 循环
note.en: NumPy's core advantage is vectorized operations; always prefer array operations over Python for-loops

items.code:
import numpy as np

arr = np.array([10, 20, 30, 40, 50])

# 用整数数组索引（取第0、2、4个元素）
print(arr[[0, 2, 4]])  # [10, 30, 50]

# 二维花式索引
matrix = np.arange(12).reshape(3, 4)
print(matrix[[0, 2], [1, 3]])  # [1, 11]  取 (0,1) 和 (2,3)

# 用布尔数组索引
mask = np.array([True, False, True, False, True])
print(arr[mask])  # [10, 30, 50]

# 花式索引返回的是副本（不是 view）
subset = arr[[0, 2]]
subset[0] = 999  # 不影响原数组

note.zh: 花式索引用整数数组或布尔数组选取元素。与切片不同，花式索引返回副本而非视图
note.en: Fancy indexing uses integer/boolean arrays to select elements. Unlike slicing, fancy indexing returns a copy, not a view

wrong.code:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([1.0, np.nan, 3.0])

# 错误：直接比较 nan
print(a == np.nan)   # [False, False, False] — 全是 False！
print(a != np.nan)   # [True, True, True]

# nan 与自身不相等是 IEEE 754 标准
if np.nan == np.nan:
    print('equal')  # 永远不会执行

note.zh: np.nan == np.nan 返回 False，这是 IEEE 754 标准规定的，不能用 == 检测 NaN
note.en: np.nan == np.nan returns False per IEEE 754; you cannot use == to detect NaN

right.code:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([1.0, np.nan, 3.0])

# 正确：用 np.isnan() 检测
print(np.isnan(a))    # [False, True, False]

# pandas 中用 pd.isna() / pd.notna()
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series(a)
print(s.isna())       # 0 False, 1 True, 2 False
print(s.dropna())     # 0 1.0, 2 3.0

note.zh: 始终用 np.isnan() 或 pd.isna() 检测缺失值，不要用 == 比较
note.en: Always use np.isnan() or pd.isna() to detect missing values, never use ==

title.zh: 浅拷贝 vs 深拷贝（view vs copy）
title.en: Shallow vs deep copy (view vs copy)

wrong.code:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([1, 2, 3, 4, 5])

# 切片是视图（view），修改会影响原数组！
b = a[1:4]
b[0] = 99
print(a)  # [1, 99, 3, 4, 5] — 原数组被修改了！

# reshape 也通常返回视图
c = a.reshape(1, -1)
c[0, 0] = 100
print(a)  # [100, 99, 3, 4, 5] — 又被改了！

note.zh: NumPy 切片和 reshape 通常返回视图（共享内存），修改视图会改变原数组
note.en: NumPy slicing and reshape typically return views (shared memory); modifying the view changes the original

right.code:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([1, 2, 3, 4, 5])

# 方法1: .copy() 显式复制
b = a[1:4].copy()
b[0] = 99
print(a)  # [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] — 原数组不受影响

# 方法2: np.array() 默认 copy=True
c = np.array(a)

# 检查是否是视图
print(b.base is None)         # True → 独立副本
print(a[1:4].base is not None) # True → 是视图

note.zh: 需要独立副本时显式调用 .copy()；可用 .base 检查是否是视图（base 非 None 说明是视图）
note.en: Use .copy() explicitly for independent copies; check .base to verify (non-None base means it's a view)

items.name: df.to_numpy() / df.values

desc.zh: 将 DataFrame 或 Series 转换为 NumPy 数组；推荐用 to_numpy()
desc.en: Convert DataFrame or Series to NumPy array; prefer to_numpy() over .values

items.signature:
df.to_numpy(dtype=None, copy=False, na_value=_NoDefault)
df.values  # property, no params
items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'a': [1, 2, 3], 'b': [4.0, 5.0, 6.0]})

arr1 = df.to_numpy()
print(arr1, arr1.dtype)

arr2 = df.values
print(arr2 is arr1)  # 可能共享内存

# 指定类型
arr3 = df.to_numpy(dtype='float32')
print(arr3.dtype)

desc.zh: 目标数据类型；None 时自动推断（混合类型统一为最通用类型）
desc.en: Target dtype; None auto-infers (mixed types unified to most general dtype)

desc.zh: 是否强制复制；False 时可能返回视图
desc.en: Whether to force copy; False may return a view

desc.zh: 用于替换 NA/NaN 的值；默认不替换
desc.en: Value to use for NA/NaN; default keeps them as-is

items.name: pd.DataFrame(np_array, columns=)

desc.zh: 将 NumPy 数组转为 DataFrame，需手动指定列名
desc.en: Convert a NumPy array to DataFrame, specifying column names manually

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

arr = np.array([[1, 'Alice', 88.5],
                [2, 'Bob', 92.0],
                [3, 'Charlie', 78.5]])

df = pd.DataFrame(arr, columns=['id', 'name', 'score'])
print(df)
print(df.dtypes)  # 注意：全部是 object 类型
items.output:
id     name score
0  1    Alice  88.5
1  2      Bob  92.0
2  3  Charlie  78.5
id       object
name     object
score    object
dtype: object

desc.zh: 二维 NumPy 数组；混合类型的数组会导致所有列为 object
desc.en: 2D NumPy array; mixed-type arrays result in all-object columns

desc.zh: 列名列表；None 时自动生成 0, 1, 2, ...
desc.en: Column name list; None auto-generates 0, 1, 2, ...

desc.zh: 强制所有列使用此类型；通常不设，而是后续用 astype 逐列转换
desc.en: Force all columns to this dtype; usually leave as None and convert per-column with astype

items.name: np.where() 在 pandas 中的应用

desc.zh: 用 np.where 根据条件创建新列，比 apply + if/else 快数十倍
desc.en: Use np.where to create conditional columns — 10-100x faster than apply with if/else

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana'],
    'score': [95, 58, 72, 88]
})

df['pass'] = np.where(df['score'] >= 60, 'Pass', 'Fail')
print(df)
items.output:
name  score  pass
0    Alice     95  Pass
1      Bob     58  Fail
2  Charlie     72  Pass
3    Diana     88  Pass

desc.zh: pandas 布尔 Series，如 df['score'] >= 60
desc.en: A pandas boolean Series, e.g. df['score'] >= 60

desc.zh: 条件为 True 时的值；可以是标量或另一列
desc.en: Value when True; can be a scalar or another column

desc.zh: 条件为 False 时的值；可以是标量或另一列
desc.en: Value when False; can be a scalar or another column

items.name: np.select() 在 pandas 中的应用

desc.zh: 用 np.select 实现多条件分支列创建，比嵌套 np.where 更清晰
desc.en: Use np.select for multi-condition column creation — cleaner than nested np.where

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie', 'Diana'],
    'score': [95, 58, 72, 45]
})

conditions = [
    df['score'] >= 90,
    df['score'] >= 60,
    df['score'] >= 0
]
choices = ['A', 'B', 'C']

df['grade'] = np.select(conditions, choices, default='F')
print(df)
items.output:
name  score grade
0    Alice     95     A
1      Bob     58     C
2  Charlie     72     B
3    Diana     45     C

desc.zh: pandas 布尔 Series 列表；顺序重要，第一个匹配的条件生效
desc.en: List of pandas boolean Series; order matters, first match wins

desc.zh: 对应每个条件的取值
desc.en: Values corresponding to each condition

desc.zh: 所有条件不满足时的默认值
desc.en: Default value when no condition matches

items.name: df.apply(np.func)

desc.zh: 在 pandas 中使用 NumPy 函数：直接向量化调用通常比 apply 更快
desc.en: Using NumPy functions in pandas: direct vectorized calls are usually faster than apply

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'value': [1, 4, 9, 16, 25]
})

# 方法1: apply（慢）
df['sqrt_apply'] = df['value'].apply(np.sqrt)

# 方法2: 直接向量化（快）
df['sqrt_direct'] = np.sqrt(df['value'])

print(df)
print('结果相同:', df['sqrt_apply'].equals(df['sqrt_direct']))
items.output:
value  sqrt_apply  sqrt_direct
0      1         1.0          1.0
1      4         2.0          2.0
2      9         3.0          3.0
3     16         4.0          4.0
4     25         5.0          5.0
结果相同: True

desc.zh: NumPy 函数如 np.sqrt, np.log, np.exp 等；推荐直接调用而非用 apply 包装
desc.en: NumPy function like np.sqrt, np.log, np.exp; prefer direct call over wrapping with apply

desc.zh: 0=按列应用，1=按行应用
desc.en: 0=apply per column, 1=apply per row

desc.zh: 大多数 NumPy ufunc 可直接接受 Series，无需 apply：np.sqrt(df['col'])
desc.en: Most NumPy ufuncs accept Series directly without apply: np.sqrt(df['col'])

items.name: pd.to_numeric()

desc.zh: 将字符串或混合类型列转为数值类型，errors='coerce' 将无效值变为 NaN
desc.en: Convert string or mixed-type columns to numeric; errors='coerce' turns invalid values to NaN

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

s = pd.Series(['1', '2.5', 'three', '4', None])

# errors='coerce': 无法转换的变为 NaN
result = pd.to_numeric(s, errors='coerce')
print(result)
print(result.dtype)
items.output:
0    1.0
1    2.5
2    NaN
3    4.0
4    NaN
dtype: float64

desc.zh: 要转换为数值的输入
desc.en: Input to convert to numeric

desc.zh: 'raise' 报错, 'coerce' 转为 NaN, 'ignore' 保持原样
desc.en: 'raise' to error, 'coerce' to NaN, 'ignore' to keep original

desc.zh: 向下转型：'integer', 'signed', 'unsigned', 'float' 以节省内存
desc.en: Downcast: 'integer', 'signed', 'unsigned', 'float' to save memory

items.name: np.vectorize(func)(series)

desc.zh: 用 np.vectorize 将自定义标量函数应用到整个 Series，语法更简洁
desc.en: Apply a custom scalar function to an entire Series via np.vectorize for cleaner syntax

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

def categorize(val):
    if val > 100: return 'high'
    elif val > 50: return 'medium'
    else: return 'low'

df = pd.DataFrame({'revenue': [120, 45, 80, 200, 30]})
df['level'] = np.vectorize(categorize)(df['revenue'])
print(df)
items.output:
revenue   level
0      120    high
1       45     low
2       80  medium
3      200    high
4       30     low

desc.zh: 接受标量输入的自定义函数
desc.en: Custom function that accepts scalar input

desc.zh: 要逐元素处理的 pandas Series
desc.en: The pandas Series to process element-wise

desc.zh: np.vectorize 本质是 Python 循环包装，性能不如真正的向量化操作，但比 apply 语法更简洁
desc.en: np.vectorize is a Python loop wrapper — not truly vectorized, but cleaner syntax than apply

items.name: Series.map() vs np.vectorize()

desc.zh: 两种逐元素映射方式的对比：map 更 pandas 风格，vectorize 更 NumPy 风格
desc.en: Comparison of two element-wise mapping approaches: map is more pandas-idiomatic, vectorize is more NumPy-style

items.example:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

s = pd.Series([1, 2, 3, 4, 5])

# Series.map — pandas 风格
result1 = s.map(lambda x: x ** 2)

# np.vectorize — NumPy 风格
result2 = np.vectorize(lambda x: x ** 2)(s)

print('map:', result1.tolist())
print('vec:', result2.tolist())

# map 独有优势：支持字典映射
mapping = {1: 'one', 2: 'two', 3: 'three'}
print('dict:', s.map(mapping).tolist())

desc.zh: map 可接受函数、字典或 Series 作为映射；字典映射是 map 的独有优势
desc.en: map accepts function, dict, or Series as mapping; dict mapping is map's unique advantage

desc.zh: map 专用：'ignore' 表示跳过 NaN 值不传入函数
desc.en: For map: 'ignore' skips NaN values without passing them to the function

desc.zh: 两者性能接近（都是 Python 循环）；优先用 map（更 pandas 风格），复杂逻辑可考虑 vectorize
desc.en: Similar performance (both Python loops); prefer map (more pandas-idiomatic), consider vectorize for complex logic

items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'price': [100, 200, 150, 300],
    'quantity': [5, 3, 8, 2]
})

# 反面：apply lambda（逐行 Python 循环）
df['total_slow'] = df.apply(
    lambda row: row['price'] * row['quantity'], axis=1
)

# 正面：向量化运算（底层 C 实现，快 10-100x）
df['total_fast'] = df['price'] * df['quantity']

print(df)

note.zh: pandas 列之间的四则运算自动向量化，比 apply(axis=1) 快 10-100 倍
note.en: Arithmetic between pandas columns is auto-vectorized, 10-100x faster than apply(axis=1)

items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'score': [95, 82, 67, 45, 55]})

# 嵌套 np.where（可读性一般）
df['grade'] = np.where(
    df['score'] >= 90, 'A',
    np.where(df['score'] >= 80, 'B',
        np.where(df['score'] >= 60, 'C', 'F')))

# 推荐：np.select（更清晰）
conds = [df['score']>=90, df['score']>=80, df['score']>=60]
df['grade2'] = np.select(conds, ['A','B','C'], default='F')

print(df)

note.zh: 2 个条件用 np.where，3+ 个条件推荐 np.select 更清晰
note.en: Use np.where for 2 conditions, np.select for 3+ conditions for better readability

items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'math': [80, 90, 70],
    'english': [85, 75, 95],
    'science': [90, 80, 85]
})

# 利用 NumPy 广播：所有科目乘以不同权重
weights = np.array([0.4, 0.3, 0.3])  # 数学40%, 英语30%, 理科30%
df = df.assign(
    weighted_total=(df[['math','english','science']].values * weights).sum(axis=1)
)
print(df)

note.zh: 先用 .values 转为 NumPy 数组，利用广播与权重数组相乘，再用 assign 赋值回 DataFrame
note.en: Convert to NumPy via .values, broadcast-multiply with weights, then assign back to DataFrame

title.zh: 用 NumPy 生成测试数据

items.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

rng = np.random.default_rng(42)
n = 1000

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'id': np.arange(1, n + 1),
    'name': rng.choice(['Alice','Bob','Charlie','Diana','Eve'], n),
    'age': rng.integers(18, 65, n),
    'salary': rng.normal(50000, 15000, n).round(2),
    'department': rng.choice(['Engineering','Marketing','Sales','HR'], n),
    'score': rng.uniform(0, 100, n).round(1)
})
print(df.head())
print(f'Shape: {df.shape}')

note.zh: 用 NumPy 随机生成器快速创建仿真数据，非常适合练习和测试
note.en: Use NumPy random generator to quickly create mock data, great for practice and testing

title.zh: df.values 返回的是 view（修改会影响原数据）
title.en: df.values returns a view (modifications affect original data)

wrong.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'a': [1.0, 2.0, 3.0], 'b': [4.0, 5.0, 6.0]})
arr = df.values

# 修改数组会影响 DataFrame！
arr[0, 0] = 999
print(df)  # a 列第一个值变成了 999！

note.zh: df.values 可能返回视图（尤其是同类型列），修改数组会意外改变 DataFrame
note.en: df.values may return a view (especially for same-dtype columns); modifying the array unexpectedly changes the DataFrame

right.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.DataFrame({'a': [1.0, 2.0, 3.0], 'b': [4.0, 5.0, 6.0]})

# 方法1: to_numpy(copy=True)
arr = df.to_numpy(copy=True)
arr[0, 0] = 999
print(df)  # DataFrame 不受影响

# 方法2: .copy()
arr2 = df.values.copy()

note.zh: 需要安全副本时用 df.to_numpy(copy=True) 或 df.values.copy()
note.en: Use df.to_numpy(copy=True) or df.values.copy() when you need a safe independent copy

title.zh: NumPy 没有 NaN-safe 运算（用 np.nanmean 而非 np.mean）
title.en: NumPy has no NaN-safe operations by default (use np.nanmean, not np.mean)

wrong.code:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([1.0, 2.0, np.nan, 4.0, 5.0])

print(np.mean(a))   # nan — 一个 NaN 污染整个结果！
print(np.sum(a))    # nan
print(np.std(a))    # nan

note.zh: np.mean/sum/std 遇到 NaN 会返回 NaN，不会自动忽略缺失值
note.en: np.mean/sum/std return NaN when encountering NaN; they do NOT auto-skip missing values

right.code:
import numpy as np

a = np.array([1.0, 2.0, np.nan, 4.0, 5.0])

# 用 nan-safe 版本
print(np.nanmean(a))  # 3.0
print(np.nansum(a))   # 12.0
print(np.nanstd(a))   # 1.414...

# pandas 默认就是 NaN-safe 的
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series(a)
print(s.mean())       # 3.0 — 自动跳过 NaN

note.zh: NumPy 中用 np.nanmean/nansum/nanstd 系列函数跳过 NaN；pandas 默认自动跳过
note.en: Use np.nanmean/nansum/nanstd in NumPy to skip NaN; pandas skips NaN by default

title.zh: dtype 不匹配导致的隐式转换
title.en: Implicit type conversion from dtype mismatch

wrong.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# 整数列赋值 NaN 会自动转为 float！
df = pd.DataFrame({'id': [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]})
print(df['id'].dtype)  # int64

df.loc[2, 'id'] = np.nan
print(df['id'].dtype)  # float64 — 类型被偷偷改了！
print(df)

note.zh: numpy int64 不支持 NaN，赋值 NaN 会导致整列从 int64 隐式转为 float64
note.en: numpy int64 cannot hold NaN; assigning NaN silently converts the entire column from int64 to float64

right.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# 方法1: 使用 pandas 的 nullable integer 类型
df = pd.DataFrame({'id': pd.array([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], dtype='Int64')})
df.loc[2, 'id'] = pd.NA
print(df['id'].dtype)  # Int64（保持整数！）
print(df)

# 方法2: 提前规划，避免在整数列中出现 NaN
# 方法3: 用 -1 或 0 等哨兵值代替 NaN

note.zh: 使用 pandas 的 nullable 类型（Int64, Float64, boolean）来安全地处理缺失值
note.en: Use pandas nullable types (Int64, Float64, boolean) to safely handle missing values without silent type changes

title.zh: apply vs map vs transform vs applymap
title.en: apply vs map vs transform vs applymap

items.name: df.apply(func, axis=0)

desc.zh: 沿轴对行或列应用函数，可返回任意形状
desc.en: Apply function along axis, can return any shape

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'A': [1, 2, 3],
    'B': [10, 20, 30]
})

# Column-wise: range per column
print(df.apply(lambda col: col.max() - col.min()))
print('---')
# Row-wise: sum per row
print(df.apply(lambda row: row.sum(), axis=1))
items.output:
A     2
B    20
dtype: int64
---
0    11
1    22
2    33
dtype: int64

desc.zh: 应用到每行/列的函数，接收 Series 返回标量或 Series
desc.en: Function applied to each row/column, receives Series, returns scalar or Series

desc.zh: 0=按列应用（每列是一个 Series），1=按行应用（每行是一个 Series）
desc.en: 0=apply per column (each column is a Series), 1=apply per row (each row is a Series)

desc.zh: True 时传入 ndarray 而非 Series，对 NumPy 函数更快
desc.en: True passes ndarray instead of Series, faster for NumPy functions

desc.zh: 'expand' 展开列表为列，'reduce' 尽量返回 Series，'broadcast' 保持原形状
desc.en: 'expand' expands list into columns, 'reduce' returns Series if possible, 'broadcast' keeps original shape

items.name: Series.map(arg)

desc.zh: 逐元素映射，可用字典/函数/Series，未匹配的键变为 NaN
desc.en: Element-wise mapping with dict/function/Series; unmatched keys become NaN

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series(['cat', 'dog', 'bird', 'cat'])

# Dict mapping (unmapped → NaN)
print(s.map({'cat': 1, 'dog': 2}))
print('---')
# Function mapping
print(s.map(str.upper))
items.output:
0    1.0
1    2.0
2    NaN
3    1.0
dtype: float64
---
0     CAT
1     DOG
2    BIRD
3     CAT
dtype: object

desc.zh: 映射关系：字典（键→值），函数（逐元素调用），或 Series（索引→值）
desc.en: Mapping: dict (key→value), function (called per element), or Series (index→value)

desc.zh: 'ignore' 跳过 NaN 不传入函数，保持 NaN 不变
desc.en: 'ignore' skips NaN values without passing to function, keeps NaN as-is

items.name: GroupBy.transform(func)

desc.zh: 分组后逐元素变换，返回与原 DataFrame 同形状，可直接赋值为新列
desc.en: Group-wise element transform, returns same shape as input, can be assigned directly as a new column

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'group': ['A', 'A', 'B', 'B'],
    'value': [10, 20, 30, 40]
})

# Group mean broadcast back
df['group_mean'] = df.groupby('group')['value'].transform('mean')
print(df)
items.output:
group  value  group_mean
0     A     10        15.0
1     A     20        15.0
2     B     30        35.0
3     B     40        35.0

desc.zh: 变换函数（如 'mean'、'sum'、lambda），必须返回与输入同形状的结果
desc.en: Transform function (e.g. 'mean', 'sum', lambda), must return same-shaped result as input

items.name: DataFrame.map(func) (原 applymap)

desc.zh: 对 DataFrame 每个标量元素应用函数（pandas 2.1 起替代 applymap）
desc.en: Apply function element-wise to each scalar in DataFrame (replaces applymap since pandas 2.1)

desc.zh: 应用到每个标量元素的函数（接收标量，返回标量）
desc.en: Function applied to each scalar element (receives scalar, returns scalar)

desc.zh: 'ignore' 跳过 NaN 不传入函数
desc.en: 'ignore' skips NaN values without passing to function

items.name: Series.apply(func)

desc.zh: 对 Series 每个元素应用函数，比 map 更灵活（支持额外参数和非标量返回值）
desc.en: Apply function to each element, more flexible than map (supports extra args and non-scalar returns)

items.example:
import pandas as pd

s = pd.Series(['hello world', 'foo bar', 'test'])

# Return non-scalar (list)
print(s.apply(lambda x: x.split()))
print('---')
# With extra args
print(s.apply(lambda x, n: x[:n], args=(3,)))
items.output:
0    [hello, world]
1        [foo, bar]
2           [test]
dtype: object
---
0    hel
1    foo
2    tes
dtype: object

desc.zh: 应用到每个元素的函数；可通过 args 传递额外位置参数
desc.en: Function applied to each element; extra positional args can be passed via args

desc.zh: 是否尝试推断更合适的返回类型
desc.en: Whether to try to infer a better dtype for the result

desc.zh: 传递给 func 的额外位置参数
desc.en: Extra positional arguments to pass to func

items.name: df.pipe(func)

desc.zh: 将整个 DataFrame 传入函数，用于构建可读的链式数据处理流水线
desc.en: Pass entire DataFrame to function, enabling readable method-chaining pipelines

items.output:
a   b  total  is_outlier
0    1  10     11       False
1    2  20     22       False
2    3  30     33       False
3  100  40    140        True

desc.zh: 接收 DataFrame 作为第一个参数的函数；也可传 (func, 'arg_name') 元组指定 DataFrame 传入的参数名
desc.en: Function receiving DataFrame as first argument; can also be (func, 'arg_name') tuple to specify which param receives the DataFrame

title.zh: 逐元素映射 → 用 Series.map()

items.code:
# 字典映射
df['grade'] = df['score'].map({1: 'A', 2: 'B', 3: 'C'})

# 简单函数
df['upper'] = df['name'].map(str.upper)

note.zh: map 适合简单的一对一映射（字典或简单函数），性能最好
note.en: map is best for simple one-to-one mappings (dict or simple func), fastest

title.zh: 每列/行聚合 → 用 df.apply()

items.code:
# 每列求极差
df.apply(lambda col: col.max() - col.min())

# 每行拼接
df.apply(lambda row: f"{row['first']} {row['last']}", axis=1)

note.zh: apply 逐行/列处理，适合需要多列参与的运算，但比向量化慢
note.en: apply processes row/col, good for multi-column ops but slower than vectorized

title.zh: 分组后保持形状 → 用 transform()

items.code:
# 每组内计算占比
df['pct'] = df.groupby('dept')['salary'].transform(lambda x: x / x.sum())

# 每组内排名
df['rank'] = df.groupby('dept')['salary'].transform('rank')

note.zh: transform 返回与输入完全同形状的结果，可直接赋值为新列
note.en: transform returns same shape as input, can be assigned directly as new column

items.code:
# 慢：apply
df['total'] = df.apply(lambda r: r['price'] * r['qty'], axis=1)

# 快 10-100x：向量化
df['total'] = df['price'] * df['qty']

note.zh: 能用向量化就不用 apply，性能差距 10-100 倍
note.en: Use vectorized ops when possible, 10-100x faster than apply

title.zh: apply vs transform 返回形状不同
title.en: apply vs transform return different shapes

wrong.code:
# apply 可以改变形状（聚合）
df.groupby('g')['v'].apply(list)  # 返回每组一个 list
# 不能直接赋值为新列！

note.zh: apply 返回形状可能与原数据不同，无法直接赋值
note.en: apply may return different shape, can't assign directly

right.code:
# transform 保持形状
df['v_mean'] = df.groupby('g')['v'].transform('mean')
# 直接赋值为新列 ✓

note.zh: transform 返回与原 Series 完全同形状，可直接赋值
note.en: transform returns same shape as original, can assign directly

wrong.code:
# pandas < 2.1
df.map(func)  # AttributeError!
df.applymap(func)  # 旧写法，2.1 后弃用

note.zh: applymap 在 2.1 后更名为 map，注意版本兼容
note.en: applymap renamed to map in 2.1, check your pandas version

right.code:
# pandas >= 2.1
df.map(func)  # ✓

# 兼容写法
getattr(df, 'map', df.applymap)(func)

note.zh: 新版用 df.map()，需要兼容旧版时用 getattr 回退
note.en: Use df.map() in new versions, getattr fallback for compatibility

title.zh: Series.map 遇到字典没有的 key 返回 NaN
title.en: Series.map returns NaN for unmapped keys

wrong.code:
s = pd.Series(['a', 'b', 'c'])
s.map({'a': 1, 'b': 2})  # c → NaN!

note.zh: 字典中没有的值会变成 NaN，可能导致数据丢失
note.en: Values not in dict become NaN, may cause data loss

right.code:
# 方案1：用 replace 保留原值
s.replace({'a': 1, 'b': 2})  # c → 'c'

# 方案2：用 map + fillna
s.map({'a': 1, 'b': 2}).fillna(s)

note.zh: 用 replace 或 map+fillna 保留未映射的原值
note.en: Use replace or map+fillna to keep unmapped values

title.zh: merge vs join vs concat 对比
title.en: merge vs join vs concat Comparison

items.name: df.merge(right, on=key)

desc.zh: SQL 式合并，按列值匹配两个 DataFrame
desc.en: SQL-style merge on column values between two DataFrames

items.signature: df.merge(right, how='inner', on=None, left_on=None, right_on=None, suffixes=('_x', '_y'), indicator=False)
items.example:
import pandas as pd

df1 = pd.DataFrame({'id': [1, 2, 3], 'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie']})
df2 = pd.DataFrame({'id': [2, 3, 4], 'score': [85, 92, 78]})

print(df1.merge(df2, on='id', how='left'))
print('---')
print(df1.merge(df2, on='id', how='inner', indicator=True))
items.output:
id     name  score
0   1    Alice    NaN
1   2      Bob   85.0
2   3  Charlie   92.0
---
   id     name  score      _merge
0   2      Bob     85        both
1   3  Charlie     92        both

desc.zh: 合并方式：'left'/'right'/'outer'/'inner'/'cross'
desc.en: Merge type: 'left'/'right'/'outer'/'inner'/'cross'

desc.zh: 连接键列名，两边都必须有此列；None 时使用两边共同列名
desc.en: Join key column name(s), must exist in both; None uses common column names

desc.zh: 左侧 DataFrame 的连接键（当两边列名不同时使用）
desc.en: Left DataFrame join key (when column names differ between sides)

desc.zh: 重叠列名的后缀；如 ('_left', '_right')
desc.en: Suffixes for overlapping column names; e.g. ('_left', '_right')

desc.zh: True 添加 _merge 列标记每行来源（'left_only'/'right_only'/'both'）
desc.en: True adds _merge column showing row source ('left_only'/'right_only'/'both')

items.name: df.join(other, on=key)

desc.zh: 按索引合并，语法更简洁
desc.en: Join on index, simpler syntax

items.example: df1.join(df2, lsuffix='_l', rsuffix='_r')
items.output: 按索引左连接

desc.zh: None 则用索引，指定则用该列匹配右边索引
desc.en: None uses index; if set, matches right index

desc.zh: 默认左连接（merge 默认 inner）
desc.en: Defaults to left (merge defaults to inner)

items.name: pd.concat(objs)

desc.zh: 沿轴拼接，不按值匹配
desc.en: Concatenate along axis, no value matching

items.example: pd.concat([df1, df2], ignore_index=True)
items.output: 纵向堆叠，重新编号索引

desc.zh: 0=纵向拼接行，1=横向拼接列
desc.en: 0=stack rows, 1=stack columns

desc.zh: True 则重新编号索引
desc.en: True resets the index

desc.zh: 添加层级索引标识来源
desc.en: Add hierarchical index to identify source

items.name: df.copy(deep=True)

desc.zh: 创建深拷贝，修改副本不影响原数据
desc.en: Deep copy, modifying copy won't affect original

items.example:
df2 = df.copy()
df2['col'] = 0  # df 不受影响

desc.zh: True=深拷贝所有数据，False=浅拷贝只复制索引和列引用
desc.en: True=deep copy all data, False=shallow copy indices only

items.name: inplace=True 参数

desc.zh: 就地修改，不返回新对象（返回 None）
desc.en: Modify in place, returns None

items.example:
df.drop('col', axis=1, inplace=True)  # 返回 None
df.fillna(0, inplace=True)  # 返回 None

desc.zh: True=修改原对象并返回 None，False=返回新对象
desc.en: True=modify original & return None, False=return new object

items.name: df.loc[] 赋值

desc.zh: 通过 loc 直接修改原 DataFrame 中的值，避免 SettingWithCopyWarning
desc.en: Directly modify values in original DataFrame via loc, avoids SettingWithCopyWarning

items.example:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    'name': ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Charlie'],
    'age': [25, 35, 28],
    'group': ['', '', '']
})

df.loc[df['age'] > 30, 'group'] = 'senior'
df.loc[df['age'] <= 30, 'group'] = 'junior'
print(df)
items.output:
name  age   group
0    Alice   25  junior
1      Bob   35  senior
2  Charlie   28  junior

desc.zh: 行选择器：布尔 Series、标签切片或单个标签
desc.en: Row selector: boolean Series, label slice, or single label

desc.zh: 要修改的列名
desc.en: Column name(s) to modify

desc.zh: 新值：标量广播到所有匹配行，或与匹配行等长的数组
desc.en: New value: scalar broadcasts to all matched rows, or array matching row count

items.name: pd.options.mode.copy_on_write

desc.zh: pandas 3.0 默认启用 Copy-on-Write（CoW），切片返回懒拷贝，修改时自动复制
desc.en: Copy-on-Write (CoW) enabled by default in pandas 3.0; slices return lazy copies, auto-copy on modification

items.example:
import pandas as pd

pd.set_option('mode.copy_on_write', True)

df = pd.DataFrame({'a': [1, 2, 3], 'b': [4, 5, 6]})
subset = df[df['a'] > 1]  # lazy copy
subset['b'] = 99          # does NOT modify df
print('Original df unchanged:')
print(df)
items.output:
Original df unchanged:
   a  b
0  1  4
1  2  5
2  3  6

desc.zh: 启用后所有索引操作返回懒拷贝，写入时自动触发实际复制，消除 SettingWithCopyWarning
desc.en: When enabled, all indexing returns lazy copies; actual copy is triggered on write, eliminating SettingWithCopyWarning

items.code:
# 推荐：赋值写法，支持链式调用
df = (df
    .drop(columns=['tmp'])
    .rename(columns={'old': 'new'})
    .sort_values('date')
)

# 不推荐：inplace 无法链式
df.drop(columns=['tmp'], inplace=True)
df.rename(columns={'old': 'new'}, inplace=True)
df.sort_values('date', inplace=True)

note.zh: 赋值写法更易读、可链式、不易出错，pandas 社区推荐弃用 inplace
note.en: Assignment is more readable, chainable, less error-prone; community recommends avoiding inplace

items.code:
# 需要独立修改子集时
subset = df[df['city'] == 'Beijing'].copy()
subset['flag'] = True  # 安全，不会警告

note.zh: 对切片赋值前先 .copy()，避免 SettingWithCopyWarning
note.en: .copy() before assigning to a slice to avoid SettingWithCopyWarning

title.zh: 用 loc 直接修改原数据
title.en: Use loc to modify original data directly

items.code:
# 直接修改原 DataFrame
df.loc[df['score'] < 60, 'pass'] = False
df.loc[df['score'] >= 60, 'pass'] = True

# 或用 np.where
import numpy as np
df['pass'] = np.where(df['score'] >= 60, True, False)

note.zh: 用 loc 单次索引赋值是最安全的就地修改方式
note.en: Single loc indexing is the safest way to modify in place

title.zh: 函数中返回新对象，不要 inplace
title.en: Return new objects in functions, don't inplace

items.code:
# 好：返回新 DataFrame
def clean(df):
    return (df
        .dropna(subset=['name'])
        .assign(name=lambda d: d['name'].str.strip())
    )

df_clean = clean(df)

note.zh: 函数式风格：输入不变，返回新对象，方便调试和测试
note.en: Functional style: immutable input, return new object, easier to debug and test

wrong.code:
df.sort_values('date', inplace=True).head()
# AttributeError: 'NoneType' has no attribute 'head'

note.zh: inplace=True 返回 None，不能继续调用方法
note.en: inplace=True returns None, cannot chain methods

right.code:
df = df.sort_values('date')
df.head()
# 或
df.sort_values('date').head()  # 不赋值，仅查看

note.zh: 赋值写法返回 DataFrame，可以继续链式调用
note.en: Assignment returns DataFrame, can chain methods

wrong.code:
df[df['age'] > 30]['salary'] = 50000
# SettingWithCopyWarning: 操作可能作用在副本上

note.zh: 两次索引 [cond]['col'] 可能产生副本，赋值不生效
note.en: Two indexing ops [cond]['col'] may create a copy, assignment has no effect

right.code:
df.loc[df['age'] > 30, 'salary'] = 50000
# 单次 loc 索引，直接修改原数据

note.zh: 用 loc 单次索引赋值，直接修改原 DataFrame
note.en: Use loc single indexing, directly modifies original DataFrame

title.zh: 忘记赋值导致修改丢失

wrong.code:
df.drop(columns=['tmp'])  # 返回新 DataFrame，但没人接收
# df 仍然有 'tmp' 列！

note.zh: 多数方法默认不修改原数据，需要赋值或 inplace
note.en: Most methods don't modify original by default, must assign or use inplace

right.code:
df = df.drop(columns=['tmp'])  # 赋值回去
# 或
df.drop(columns=['tmp'], inplace=True)  # 就地修改

note.zh: 记住赋值回变量，或用 inplace=True（不推荐）
note.en: Remember to assign back, or use inplace=True (not recommended)
